examples.en: I was assigned to Troop A of the 10th Cavalry.
examples.cn: 我被派往第10骑兵队的A连。

examples.en: Details are available from the Hon. Sec. A.R. Bushby.
examples.cn: 详情可咨询名誉秘书A.R.布什比。

examples.en: The officers and crew prepared to abandon ship in an orderly fashion.
examples.cn: 全体船员秩序井然地准备弃船。

examples.en: The scheme's investors, fearful of bankruptcy, decided to abandon the project.
examples.cn: 因为担心破产，该计划的投资者决定放弃这个项目。

abandon.paraphrase: vt.放弃，抛弃，离弃，丢弃，使屈从，停止进行，终止；n.放任，放纵，完全屈从于压制

examples.en: He refused to abase himself in the eyes of others.
examples.cn: 他不愿在他人面前被贬低.

examples.en: The president is not willing to abase himself before the nation.
examples.cn: 总统不愿在全国人民面前降低自己的威信.

abase.paraphrase: vt.使谦卑，使感到羞耻，使降低（地位、身份等），<古>降下；n.贬低，屈辱，贬低别人的人

examples.en: The patient is complaining of pain in the abdomen, doctor.
examples.cn: 大夫, 病人在叫肚子疼.

examples.en: A thin, hollow needle was carefully introduced into the patient's abdomen.
examples.cn: 一根细空心针被小心地插入病人腹部.

examples.en: She couldn't abide his success.
examples.cn: 她见不得他成功。

examples.en: Miss Furniss could not abide sloppiness.
examples.cn: 弗尼斯小姐受不了马马虎虎的作风。

abide.paraphrase: vt.容忍，忍受，等候，遵守；vi.持续，经受住，顶住，居住，逗留

examples.en: The public never had faith in his ability to handle the job.
examples.cn: 公众从来不相信他有能力胜任这一职位。

examples.en: Few would argue that this team has experience and proven ability.
examples.cn: 这个队伍的丰富经验和表现出来的实力是众所公认的。

examples.en: Chantal was lucky to be able to salvage her career.
examples.cn: 尚塔尔能保住她的事业算是走了运。

examples.en: Anton was able to transfer from Lavine's to an American company.
examples.cn: 安东成功地从拉文调到了一家美国公司.

able.paraphrase: adj.能够的，有能力的，有才干的，干练的

examples.en: Is the child abnormal in any way?
examples.cn: 这孩子是否在哪方面有点不正常?

examples.en: The abnormal bleeding is your body's own red flag of danger.
examples.cn: 非正常的出血是你的身体发出的危险信号。

abnormal.paraphrase: adj.反常的，异常的，不规则的，变态的，畸形的，邪门儿

examples.en: She invited 750 people aboard the luxury yacht, the Savarona.
examples.cn: 她邀请了750人乘坐豪华游艇“萨瓦罗纳”号。

examples.en: A large stash of drugs had been found aboard the yacht.
examples.cn: 在游艇上找到了一大批藏匿的毒品。

aboard.paraphrase: prep.在（船、飞机、车）上，上（船、飞机、车），上车；adv.在船（或飞机、车）上，上船（或飞机、车），靠船边，在船上，在火车上

examples.en: The following year Parliament voted to abolish the death penalty for murder.
examples.cn: 议会于翌年表决对谋杀罪废除死刑。

examples.en: plans to abolish the monarchy
examples.cn: 废除君主政体的计划

abolish.paraphrase: vt.废除，废止，取消，革除，消灭，撤销

examples.en: the abolition of serfdom in Russia in 1861
examples.cn: 1861年农奴制在俄国的废除

examples.en: Abraham Lincoln campaigned for the abolition of slavery, he succeeded.
examples.cn: 亚伯拉罕·林肯曾为废除奴隶制而战, 他成功了.

abolition.paraphrase: n.废除，废止，（常用A-）<美史>废除死刑，〈美〉废除黑奴制度

examples.en: Stories abound about when he was in charge.
examples.cn: 关于他在任时的传闻多不胜数。

examples.en: Questions abound as to the reasons for the president's decision.
examples.cn: 关于总裁作出这一决定的理由,人们提出了各种各样的疑问.

abound.paraphrase: vi.丰富，盛产，非常多，大量存在，充满

examples.en: No matter where you go in life or how old you get, there's always something new to learn about. After all, life is full of surprises.
examples.cn: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

examples.en: Instead of complaining about what's wrong, be grateful for what's right.
examples.cn: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

about.paraphrase: prep.关于，大约，在…周围；adv.大约，在附近，在四周，几乎；adj.在附近的，四处走动的，在起作用的，在流行中的

examples.en: He had to have one leg amputated above the knee.
examples.cn: 他的一条腿不得不从膝部以上截断。

examples.en: That big high-rise above us is where Brian lives.
examples.cn: 我们上面的那座摩天大楼就是布赖恩住的地方。

above.paraphrase: prep.（表示程度）超过，（表示等级）在…之上，（表示位置）在…正上方，（表示比较）优于；adv.在上面，以上，上述；n.上述；adj.上述的

examples.en: As they reached the start-finish line Prost jinked right and drew abreast.
examples.cn: 当他们接近起止线时，普罗斯特猛向右转，两辆车并排驶过了终点。

examples.en: As he drew abreast of the man he pretended to stumble.
examples.cn: 当他赶上那个男人时，他装出了要跌倒的样子。

abreast.paraphrase: adv.并列，并肩地，并排，不落后于；adj.并排的，并肩的

examples.en: Most of those who left the province to work abroad were unskilled.
examples.cn: 那些离开该省出国打工的人大部分都未经专门训练。

examples.en: He rented out his house while he worked abroad.
examples.cn: 他在国外工作期间把自己的房子租了出去。

abroad.paraphrase: adv.到国外，在海外，广为流传地；adj.往国外的；n.海外，异国

examples.en: Then in a tone of abrupt harshness, he added, "Open these trunks!".
examples.cn: 然后他又突然厉声说道，“把这些大箱子打开！”

examples.en: Cross was a little taken aback by her abrupt manner.
examples.cn: 她鲁莽的态度让克罗斯感到有点吃惊。

abrupt.paraphrase: adj.突然的，意外的，无理的，唐突的，不连贯的，陡峭的

examples.en: I suspect he isn't altogether unhappy about my absence.
examples.cn: 我猜想他对我的缺席并没有感到很不高兴。

examples.en: There has been much gossip about the possible reasons for his absence.
examples.cn: 关于他缺席的原因有很多传言。

absence.paraphrase: n.缺席，缺勤，缺乏，缺少，无，心不在焉，不注意

examples.en: I often do absent-minded things, particularly when I'm worried.
examples.cn: 我常做些心不在焉的事，尤其是在我焦虑不安时。

examples.en: You will have to put up with Grace's absent-mindedness.
examples.cn: 你须得忍受格蕾丝心不在焉的作风。

absent.paraphrase: adj.缺席的，不在场的，缺少的，缺乏的，不在意的，茫然的

examples.en: The industry minister described the affair as "an absolute scandal".
examples.cn: 工业部长将此事件形容为“绝对的丑闻”。

examples.en: I think he's an absolute stinker to do that to her.
examples.cn: 我认为他那样对待她真太缺德了。

absolute.paraphrase: adj. 绝对的，完全的，专制的；n. 绝对事物

examples.en: The banks would be forced to absorb large losses.
examples.cn: 银行将被迫承受巨大的损失。

examples.en: His ability to absorb bits of disconnected information was astonishing.
examples.cn: 他吸收利用互不相关的零碎信息的能耐惊人。

absorb.paraphrase: vt.吸收（液体、气体等），吸引（注意），吞并，合并，忍受，承担（费用）

examples.en: Abstain from sex or use condoms.
examples.cn: 禁绝性事或使用安全套。

examples.en: They say it would be political suicide for the party to abstain.
examples.cn: 他们说这个政党弃权无异于自毁政治前程。

abstain.paraphrase: vi.戒（尤指酒），戒除，弃权，避免

examples.en: Money was a commodity she never thought about except in the abstract.
examples.cn: 钱对她来说就是个抽象的东西，她从不去想钱。

examples.en: His painting went through both representational and abstract periods.
examples.cn: 他的绘画经历了具象风格和抽象风格两个阶段。

abstract.paraphrase: adj.抽象的，理论上的，难解的，抽象派的，茫然的；n.抽象概念，抽象派艺术作品，摘要，[化]萃取物；vt.提取，分离，转移（注意等），概括，摘录，<婉辞>剽窃

examples.en: It can be done without following some absurd, off-the-wall investment strategy.
examples.cn: 不用遵照那套荒唐愚蠢的投资策略也可以做到。

examples.en: This is patently absurd.
examples.cn: 这显然荒唐透顶。

absurd.paraphrase: adj.荒谬的，荒唐的，无理性的，杂乱无章的，荒诞主义的，荒诞的；n.无价值，无意义

examples.en: At the feast there was food and drink in abundance.
examples.cn: 宴会上有丰富的饮食.

examples.en: The shallow sea bed yields up an abundance of food.
examples.cn: 浅海床提供了丰富的食物。

abundance.paraphrase: n.丰富，充裕，大量，极多，盈余，丰度

examples.en: Birds are abundant in the tall vegetation.
examples.cn: 高大的植被中有着大量的鸟类。

examples.en: Mosquitoes are extremely abundant in this dark wet place.
examples.cn: 这个阴暗潮湿的地方蚊子非常多.

abundant.paraphrase: adj.大量的，充足的，丰富的，富有的，丰足，阜

examples.en: A small group of youths stayed behind to heckle and shout abuse.
examples.cn: 一小群小青年没走，在起哄、叫骂。

examples.en: They were jostled and subjected to a torrent of verbal abuse.
examples.cn: 他们被推来搡去，受到大肆的谩骂攻击。

abuse.paraphrase: n.滥用，恶习，侮辱，恶言；vt.滥用，虐待，辱骂

examples.en: Britain needs to bridge the technology gap between academia and industry.
examples.cn: 英国需要弥合学术界和企业界之间的技术差距。

examples.en: The government and academia should pay attention to this unusual fact.
examples.cn: 这种非常现象应引起政府监管部门与学术界的关注.

examples.en: Henry generally stayed ahead of the others in the academic subjects.
examples.cn: 亨利的文化课成绩通常都优于其他学生。

examples.en: There are wide variations caused by different academic programme structures.
examples.cn: 不同的教学项目结构造成了巨大的差异。

academic.paraphrase: adj.学院的，大学的，学会的，（学术，文艺）协会的，学究的，学理上的，空谈的，非实用的，〈美〉文科的，文学的，柏拉图学派的；n.学者，大学教师，大学生，学会会员，纸上空论，空论，[A-]柏拉图哲学信奉者

examples.en: Neil Howorth, director of the academy, tried to calm things down.
examples.cn: 研究院主任尼尔·豪沃思力图平息事态。

examples.en: Father Auberon's Academy Club positively heaved with dashing young men.
examples.cn: 父亲奥伯龙的“学院俱乐部”里真的是有为青年济济一堂。

academy.paraphrase: n.专科学校，学会，学院，一般的高等教育，私立学校，学术团体

examples.en: Britain would not accede to France's request.
examples.cn: 英国不肯同意法国的要求。

examples.en: I never understood why he didn't just accede to our demands at the outset.
examples.cn: 我一直搞不懂他为什么不一开始就同意我们的要求。

accede.paraphrase: vi.（正式）加入，答应，（通过财产的添附而）增加，开始任职

examples.en: We need to accelerate the pace of change in our backward country.
examples.cn: 我们应当为落后的祖国加快变革的脚步。

examples.en: Perhaps the fact that the car was tailgating him made him accelerate.
examples.cn: 或许是因为那辆汽车跟得太紧，他才加速的。

accelerate.paraphrase: vt.（使）加快，（使）增速，加速，催促，促进，速度增加；vi.加快，加速

examples.en: Brand's keen ear caught the trace of an accent.
examples.cn: 布兰德敏锐的耳朵听出了口音。

examples.en: There is often a strong accent on material success.
examples.cn: 经常大力强调物质成就。

accent.paraphrase: n.重音，口音，腔调，重音符号（标在字母上）

examples.en: He would have to accept it; there was no other way.
examples.cn: 对此他将别无选择，只有接受。

examples.en: Some of the older telephones still only accept tokens.
examples.cn: 一些较老式的电话机仍然只收代币。

accept.paraphrase: vi.承认，同意，承兑；vt.接受，承认，承担，承兑

examples.en: The air pollution exceeds most acceptable levels by 10 times or more.
examples.cn: 大气污染程度超出了普遍认可的标准10倍或更多。

examples.en: Brothels, she insists, are the acceptable face of prostitution.
examples.cn: 她坚持认为，妓院是卖淫可为人接受的一种形式。

acceptable.paraphrase: adj.可接受的，合意的，（社会上）认同的，（礼物等）令人满意的

examples.en: Even passive acceptance of the regime was a kind of collaboration.
examples.cn: 即使被动接受该政权也是一种通敌行为。

examples.en: Avant-garde music to this day has not found general public acceptance.
examples.cn: 先锋音乐时至今日都没有得到大众的广泛认可。

acceptance.paraphrase: n.接受，接纳，[金融]承兑，无怨接受（逆境、困境等），赞成

examples.en: The home is situated within easy access of shops and other facilities.
examples.cn: 房子位置便利，距离商店及其他设施都不远。

examples.en: How does a private pilot get access to the airways?
examples.cn: 私人飞行员如何进入航空路线呢？

access.paraphrase: n.入口，出口，接近，进入，增长，爆发；vt.接近，进入，使用，接近，获取

examples.en: She was charged with being an accessory to the embezzlement of funds.
examples.cn: 她被指控为这起挪用公款案的从犯。

examples.en: The company serves the national automotive aftermarket with a broad range of accessory and recreational-vehicle products.
examples.cn: 该公司为全国汽车零配件市场提供各种零配件和休闲旅游车产品。

accessory.paraphrase: n.附件，（衣服的）配饰，从犯，妇女饰品；adj.附加的，附属的，辅助的，同谋的

examples.en: Captain Cook safely navigated his ship without accident for 100 voyages.
examples.cn: 库克船长驾驶的船安全出航100次无事故。

examples.en: Through some unfortunate accident, the information reached me a day late.
examples.cn: 由于发生了不幸的意外，我知道消息的时候已经晚了一天。

accident.paraphrase: n.意外事件，事故，机遇，偶然，附属品

examples.en: The jury returned a verdict of accidental death.
examples.cn: 陪审团作出意外死亡的正式裁决。

examples.en: Accidental inhalation of the powder can be harmful.
examples.cn: 意外的粉尘吸入可能有害。

accidental.paraphrase: adj.意外的，偶然（发生）的，附属的；n.偶然，次要方面

examples.en: All this equipment has received international acclaim from the specialist hi-fi press.
examples.cn: 这套设备受到全球高保真音响专业报刊的赞誉。

examples.en: Angela Bassett has won critical acclaim for her excellent performance.
examples.cn: 安吉拉·贝塞特凭借其出色的表演赢得了评论界的好评。

acclaim.paraphrase: v.称赞，赞扬，向…欢呼，向…喝彩；n.公开赞扬，称誉，热烈欢迎或赞同

examples.en: Some animal and plant species cannot accommodate to the rapidly changing cond-itions.
examples.cn: 某些种类的动植物不能适应迅速变化的环境。

examples.en: There is usually room to accommodate up to 80 visitors.
examples.cn: 那里通常可以住得下80位来客。

accommodate.paraphrase: vt.容纳，使适应，向…提供住处，帮忙；vi.[后面省去反身代词]适应于，（眼）作调节，调节眼球的晶状体（使其变得适应不同距离的物体），调解，调停

examples.en: The authority must make suitable accommodation available to the family.
examples.cn: 当局必须给这个家庭提供适当的食宿条件。

examples.en: His instinct would be to seek a new accommodation with the nationalists.
examples.cn: 他本能的反应会是寻求与民族主义者取得新的和解。

examples.en: This volume of essays was designed to accompany an exhibition in Cologne.
examples.cn: 这本文集是为配合在科隆举办的一场展览而出的。

examples.en: He took time out from campaigning to accompany his mother to dinner.
examples.cn: 他从竞选活动中挤出一点时间陪母亲吃饭。

accompany.paraphrase: vt.陪伴，陪同，附加，补充，与…共存，为…伴奏；vi.伴奏

examples.en: Today I will do what others won't, so tomorrow I can accomplish what others can't.--Jerry Rice
examples.cn: 今天我做了别人不愿做的事，明天我就能做到别人所不能做的事。

examples.en: He exhorted his companions, "Try to accomplish your aim with diligence".
examples.cn: 他劝诫同伴说：“要通过勤奋努力实现自己的目标。”

accomplish.paraphrase: vt.完成，达到（目的），走完（路程、距离等），使完美

accord.paraphrase: n.协议，条约，（色彩的）协调，和解协议；vt.给予，使和谐一致，使符合，使适合；vi.符合，一致

examples.en: One's opinion tends to differ in accordance with one's standpoint.
examples.cn: 不同的立场势必形成不同的见解.

examples.en: Cancellation charges will apply in accordance with paragraph 4 above.
examples.cn: 按照上面第四节条款内容应该支付注销费.

examples.en: We have to discover his plans and act accordingly.
examples.cn: 我们得找出他的计划，照着办。

examples.en: Please inform us of your decision and we will act accordingly.
examples.cn: 请把你们的决定通知我们,我们会照着去办的.

accordingly.paraphrase: adv.因此，于是，依据，照着，相应地

examples.en: You have to take capital appreciation of the property into account.
examples.cn: 你必须将该处房产的资本增值考虑在内。

examples.en: He figured up the balance in their checking account.
examples.cn: 他算出了他们活期存款账户上的余额总和。

account.paraphrase: n.账，账目，存款，记述，报告，理由；vi.解释，导致，报账；vt.认为，把…视作

examples.en: The major service industries should be accountable to their customers.
examples.cn: 主要的服务行业应该对它们的顾客负责。

examples.en: Public officials can finally be held accountable for their actions.
examples.cn: 终于要对政府官员实行问责了。

accountable.paraphrase: adj.负有责任的，应对自己的行为做出说明的，可解释的，有解释义务的，可说明的

examples.en: Accountant John Talbot is a wizard with numbers.
examples.cn: 会计师约翰·塔尔博特精通数字。

examples.en: He's not a bad chap—quite human for an accountant.
examples.cn: 这个家伙人不坏——就会计来说已经很有人情味了。

examples.en: Lead can accumulate in the body until toxic levels are reached.
examples.cn: 铅会在体内积聚直至造成铅中毒。

examples.en: How can I accumulate enough cash to get out of debt?
examples.cn: 我怎么才能攒足钱还清债务呢？

accumulate.paraphrase: vt.& vi.堆积，积累；vi.（数量）逐渐增加，（质量）渐渐提高

examples.en: He cannot vouch for the accuracy of the story.
examples.cn: 他不能证明这一说法的准确性。

examples.en: Check the accuracy of everything in your CV.
examples.cn: 请核对简历中的每个细节，务必准确无误。

examples.en: Schools were told their exam information had to be spot-on and accurate.
examples.cn: 各学校接到通知，要求考试信息必须准确无误。

examples.en: Her description of the nature and action of poisons is amazingly accurate.
examples.cn: 他对一些毒药的性质和作用的描述惊人地准确。

accurate.paraphrase: adj.精确的，准确的，正确无误的

examples.en: The government denied the accusation that it was involved in the murders.
examples.cn: 政府否认了参与谋杀案的指控。

examples.en: This sounds like a barrage of accusation—I don'tintend it to be.
examples.cn: 这听起来像是接二连三的指责——这并非我的本意。

accusation.paraphrase: n.指责，谴责，指控，控告，（被告发、控告的）罪名

examples.en: Some people accuse the tax inspectors of bully-boy tactics.
examples.cn: 有些人指控税务稽查员使用了流氓手段。

examples.en: I hate it when people accuse us of that.
examples.cn: 我讨厌别人就那件事指责我们。

examples.en: It'shouldn't take long to accustom your students to working in groups.
examples.cn: 你的学生应该很快就会习惯分组学习的.

examples.en: It took him a while to accustom himself to the idea.
examples.cn: 他过了一段时间才习惯这个想法.

examples.en: Possibly we are accustomed, biologically speaking, to this background radiation.
examples.cn: 从生物机理上说，我们可能已经习惯了这种本底辐射。

examples.en: The team has accustomed itself to the pace of first division rugby.
examples.cn: 球队适应了英式橄榄球甲级联赛的节奏。

accustomed.paraphrase: adj.习惯的，通常的，独有的，适应的；v.使习惯于(accustom的过去式和过去分词)

examples.en: My head had begun to ache and my stomach felt funny.
examples.cn: 我的头开始疼起来，胃也有些不舒服。

examples.en: The pain, usually a dull ache, gets worse with exercise.
examples.cn: 通常不明显的疼痛在运动后会加剧。

examples.en: There are many who will work hard to achieve these goals.
examples.cn: 有志之士将会共同为实现这些目标而努力。

examples.en: Car firms are desperate to achieve economies of scale.
examples.cn: 汽车厂商拼命想要实现规模经济。

achieve.paraphrase: vt.取得，获得，实现，成功；vi.达到预期的目的，实现预期的结果，如愿以偿

examples.en: Only the achievement of these goals will bring lasting peace.
examples.cn: 只有达成这些目标才会带来持久的和平。

examples.en: To live together harmoniously as men and women is an achievement.
examples.cn: 夫妻能和睦相处就是一种成就。

examples.en: Nor is acid rain always, and universally, a bad thing.
examples.cn: 酸雨也并非在任何情况下都是坏事。

examples.en: This comedy of contemporary manners is told with compassion and acid humour.
examples.cn: 这部当代风尚喜剧杂糅了悲悯的情怀和尖酸的幽默。

acid.paraphrase: adj.酸味的，尖刻的，酸的，酸性的；n.<化>酸，酸味物质

examples.en: Some of the clergy refused to acknowledge the new king'slegitimacy.
examples.cn: 一部分神职人员拒绝承认新国王的合法地位。

examples.en: You have to acknowledge that we live in a racist society.
examples.cn: 你得承认我们生活在一个有种族偏见的社会中。

acknowledge.paraphrase: vt.承认，鸣谢，对…打招呼，告知已收到

examples.en: Acquaint him with your plans.
examples.cn: 把你的计划告知他.

examples.en: Please acquaint me with the facts of the case.
examples.cn: 请把这事的实情告诉我。

acquaint.paraphrase: vt.使熟悉，使认识，把某事通知某人，告知

examples.en: I am so pleased to make your acquaintance, Mr Tweed.
examples.cn: 很高兴认识您，特威德先生。

examples.en: Hammer's business pedigree almost gua-ranteed him the acquaintance of U.S. presidents.
examples.cn: 哈默的商业背景几乎保证了他能够结识美国总统。

acquaintance.paraphrase: n.相识的人，熟人，相识，对…有了解，知识，心得

examples.en: Perhaps we did acquire a somewhat fuddy-duddy image in the later years.
examples.cn: 可能在后来的几年里我们真的让人感到有些古板。

examples.en: He was the mastermind behind the plan to acquire the explosives.
examples.cn: 他就是密谋获取炸药的主谋。

examples.en: The acquisition helped BCCI make its initial entrance into the US market.
examples.cn: 那项并购帮助国际商业信贷银行首次跻身美国市场。

examples.en: From her wardrobe Laura took her latest acquisition, a bright red dress.
examples.cn: 劳拉从衣柜里拿出了她最近的购物战果，一件鲜红色连衣裙。

acquisition.paraphrase: n.获得，购置物，获得物，收购

examples.en: They ended up buying a prebuilt modular home on a two-acre lot.
examples.cn: 最后他们购买了一幢建在两英亩土地上的预制组合式房屋。

examples.en: The 77,000-acre estate contains five of the highest peaks in Scotland.
examples.cn: 7.7万英亩的私人土地上有5座苏格兰最高的山峰。

examples.en: The acrobat balanced a long pole on his left shoulder.
examples.cn: 杂技演员让一根长杆在他的左肩上保持平衡.

examples.en: An acrobat has to be agile.
examples.cn: 杂技演员必须身手敏捷.

acrobat.paraphrase: n.杂技演员，立场观点善变的人，主张、政见等变化无常的人

examples.en: They stumble across a ghost town inhabited by a rascally gold prospector.
examples.cn: 他们偶然来到一个居住着一位狡诈的淘金者的废墟之城。

examples.en: Lucy had strung a banner across the wall saying "Welcome Home Daddy".
examples.cn: 露西在墙上挂了一条横幅，上面写着“欢迎爸爸回家”。

across.paraphrase: prep.穿过，横穿，横过，与…交叉，在…对面；adv.横过，越过，在对面，交叉，斜对面

examples.en: Politicians across the political spectrum have denounced the act.
examples.cn: 各党派的政客们都对该行为表示谴责。

examples.en: It was imperative that he act as naturally as possible.
examples.cn: 最重要的是他要做到尽可能自然。

act.paraphrase: v.行动，表现，表演，起作用；n.行为，行动，法案，法令，短节目

examples.en: The lift started off, juddered, and went out of action.
examples.cn: 电梯开动了，接着剧烈震颤起来，然后就毫无反应了。

examples.en: Now there is a dawning realisation that drastic action is necessary.
examples.cn: 现在人们开始意识到必须采取断然的行动。

action.paraphrase: n.行动，活动，功能，作用，手段，[法]诉讼

examples.en: In April 1944 he was killed on active service.
examples.cn: 1944年4月他在战时服役中阵亡。

examples.en: An active and expansive market economy is a necessary condition for progress.
examples.cn: 积极扩张的市场经济是发展的必要条件。

active.paraphrase: adj.积极的，活跃的，有生气的，迅速的，敏捷的，有效的，起作用的；n.[语法]主动语态，积极分子，活跃的人

examples.en: He's been a trade union activist for many years.
examples.cn: 多年来他一直是工会的积极分子.

examples.en: ARussian human - rights activist , Lev Ponomaryov, was beaten up in Moscow.
examples.cn: 俄罗斯人权活动家波诺玛里约( LevPonomaryov )在莫斯科被遇袭.

activist.paraphrase: n.激进主义分子，积极分子，积极行动者；adj.激进主义的，激进主义分子的

examples.en: Mr Dobson promised to widen the organisation's scope of activity.
examples.cn: 多布森先生许诺拓宽该组织的活动范围。

examples.en: There are signs of paramilitary activity supported from abroad.
examples.cn: 有迹象表明，非法军事组织的活动得到了国外势力的支持。

activity.paraphrase: n.活动，活跃，敏捷，活动力，教育活动

examples.en: She now lives with actor Denis Lawson, 10 years her junior.
examples.cn: 她现在与比她小10岁的演员丹尼斯·劳森同居。

examples.en: It was an actor whose name escapes me for the moment.
examples.cn: 那个男演员的名字我一时想不起来了。

actor.paraphrase: n.演员（尤指男演员），行动者，参与者

examples.en: She'll make a good actress, if she gets the right training.
examples.cn: 如果训练得当，她会成为一名出色的演员。

examples.en: Jane is determined to stake her claim as an actress.
examples.cn: 简决心主张自己作为一名女演员的权利。

examples.en: Birthplace data are only the crudest indicator of actual migration paths.
examples.cn: 出生地信息只能非常粗略地显示实际移民过程。

examples.en: Check the actual construction of the chair by looking underneath.
examples.cn: 看看椅子的下面，检查一下它的实际构造。

actual.paraphrase: adj.真实的，实际的，现行的，现在的

examples.en: Into her nineties, her thinking remained acute and her character forceful.
examples.cn: 虽已年届九旬，她依然头脑敏锐，个性很强。

examples.en: In the dark my sense of hearing becomes so acute.
examples.cn: 黑暗中我的听觉变得异常灵敏。

acute.paraphrase: adj.尖的，锐的，敏锐的，敏感的，严重的，剧烈的，[医]急性的

examples.en: Shelves were built to adapt the library for use as an office.
examples.cn: 为将图书馆改作办公室而做了一些架子。

examples.en: Buddhism had to adapt to the new world or perish.
examples.cn: 佛教必须适应新时代，否则将会消亡。

adapt.paraphrase: vi.适应于，适应不同情况（或环境）(to)；vt.改编，改写，改变…以适合(for)

examples.en: Children are highly adaptable—they just need time to readjust.
examples.cn: 儿童的适应能力很强—他们只是需要时间重新适应。

examples.en: He is an adaptable man and will soon learn the new work.
examples.cn: 他是个适应性很强的人,很快就将学会这种工作.

adaptable.paraphrase: adj.可适应的，有适应能力的，适合的，可改编的

examples.en: Remove from the heat, add the parsley, toss and serve at once.
examples.cn: 端离炉子，加上欧芹，颠起翻面后就立刻上桌。

examples.en: His comments are bound to add fuel to the debate.
examples.cn: 他的话必将为争论推波助澜。

add.paraphrase: vt.增加，补充，附带说明，把…包括在内；vi.增加，做加法，累积而成，扩大；n.加法，加法运算，（一篇报道的）补充部分

examples.en: She is a TV addict and watches as much as she can.
examples.cn: 她是个电视迷，看起电视来没完没了。

examples.en: The self-confessed drug addict was arrested 13 months ago.
examples.cn: 那个自己坦白的瘾君子在13个月前被逮捕。

addict.paraphrase: n.有瘾的人，入迷的人，（吸毒）成瘾者；vt.使沉溺，使上瘾，使自己沾染（某些恶习）

examples.en: This plywood addition helps to strengthen the structure.
examples.cn: 多层胶合板有助于加固结构。

examples.en: In addition, the respondent disclosed professional confidences to one of the patients.
examples.cn: 另外，被告还向其中一位病人透露了行业机密。

addition.paraphrase: n.加，增加，附加，[数]加法，增加的人或事物

examples.en: There are additional publications of special relevance to new graduates.
examples.cn: 还有对于新毕业生来说特别重要的其他出版物。

examples.en: Shares and bonds can bring one quite a considerable additional income.
examples.cn: 股票和债券能给人带来不菲的额外收入。

additional.paraphrase: adj.额外的，附加的，另外的，追加的，补充，外加

examples.en: Complementary to the three additive light primaries, there are three subtractive primaries.
examples.cn: 与加色法三原色互为补色的颜色为减色法三原色.

examples.en: Colour is often an additive in foods.
examples.cn: 颜料经常是各种食物中的添加物.

additive.paraphrase: n.添加剂，添加物，[数]加法；adj.附加的，[化]加成的，加和的，[数]加法的

examples.en: Someone cranked up the volume of the public address system.
examples.cn: 有人调大了公共广播系统的音量。

examples.en: Send your details on a card to the following address.
examples.cn: 在明信片上写明你的近况寄到下面的地址。

address.paraphrase: n.地址，通信处，演说，称呼；v.写姓名地址，演说，向…说话，称呼

examples.en: The direct marketing industry has become adept at packaging special offers.
examples.cn: 直接邮寄广告业在特卖品的包装方面已经变得非常熟练了。

examples.en: Kitzi was an adept at getting people to talk confidentially to him.
examples.cn: 基齐很善于引导别人与其谈心。

adept.paraphrase: adj.精于…的，擅长于…的，巧妙的

examples.en: Within this lecture I cannot pretend to deal adequately with dreams.
examples.cn: 在这一次讲座中，我不敢自诩能对梦境作透彻的分析。

examples.en: "I think I've covered that business more than adequately," he said gravely.
examples.cn: “我想我已经把那件事说得够详细了，”他正色说道。

examples.en: Sikhs were expected to adhere strictly to the religious rules concerning appearance.
examples.cn: 锡克教徒应当严格遵守该教对外表的规定。

examples.en: All members of the association adhere to a strict code of practice.
examples.cn: 协会的所有成员都遵守一套严格的行为规范。

adhere.paraphrase: vi.黏附，附着，坚持，追随；vt.使粘附，遵循，坚持，追随，依附

examples.en: These young students live in adjacent rooms.
examples.cn: 这些年轻的学生住在毗连的房间里.

examples.en: The schools were adjacent but there were separate doors.
examples.cn: 这些学校紧挨着，但各自独门独户。

adjacent.paraphrase: adj.邻近的，毗邻的，（时间上）紧接着的，相邻

examples.en: a morphosyntactic rule of adjective agreement
examples.cn: 有关形容词一致的形态句法规则

examples.en: In " the black cat " the adjective " black " modifies the noun " cat " .
examples.cn: 在the black cat这一词组中,形容词 black 修饰名词cat.

adjective.paraphrase: n.形容词；adj.形容词的，附属的，不独立的，[法]有关程序的

examples.en: It is forbidden to adjoin to a postcard any sample of merchandise.
examples.cn: 在明信片上附贴商品的样品是不许可的.

examples.en: The two houses adjoin.
examples.cn: 这两座房子邻接.

adjoin.paraphrase: vt.& vi.邻近，毗连，接，贴连，附加，使结合

examples.en: Adjust the lighting so it is soft and restful.
examples.cn: 调节灯光使其看上去既柔和又能给人带来舒缓感。

examples.en: Adjust the aerial's position and direction for the best reception.
examples.cn: 调整天线的位置和方向以达到最佳接收效果。

adjust.paraphrase: vt.& vi.（改变…以）适应，调整，校正，调准（望远镜等），对准，校正，校准（机械等），核算（盈亏），[保]评定（赔偿要求）

examples.en: Paramedics are trained to administer certain drugs.
examples.cn: 护理人员们接受了配发某些药物的培训。

examples.en: Next summer's exams would be straightforward to administer and mark.
examples.cn: 明年夏天的考试在执行和评分上都将很简单。

administer.paraphrase: vt.管理，治理（国家），给予，执行；vi.执行遗产管理人的职责，给予帮助，担当管理人

examples.en: His increasing alignment with the Reagan administration nearly cost him re-election.
examples.cn: 与里根政府日益紧密的关系差点让他失去了连任的机会。

examples.en: The administration has now endorsed the bill and can't turn back.
examples.cn: 政府部门如今已经签署了那项法案，没有挽回的余地。

administration.paraphrase: n.管理，实行，（政府）行政机关，（法律、处罚等的）施行

examples.en: We took time to stop and admire the view.
examples.cn: 我们特意驻足欣赏风景。

examples.en: We admire her dedication to the cause of humanity.
examples.cn: 我们敬佩她对人类事业的献身精神。

admire.paraphrase: vt.赞赏，称赞，欣赏，<美口>想要

examples.en: Were you just trying to trap her into making some admission?
examples.cn: 你刚才是想诱使她供认吗？

examples.en: By his own admission, he evaded taxes as a Florida real-estate speculator.
examples.cn: 他亲口承认自己在佛罗里达从事房地产投机生意时逃过税。

admission.paraphrase: n.准许进入，承认，坦白，入场费

examples.en: I have to admit that I have bad handwriting.
examples.cn: 我不得不承认自己的字写得不好看。

examples.en: You have to admit that you are, in fact, in difficulties.
examples.cn: 你不得不承认，你事实上是陷入了困境。

admit.paraphrase: vt.& vi.许可进入，承认，供认；vt.允许，确认；vi.承认，允许

examples.en: He spent his adolescent years playing guitar in the church band.
examples.cn: 他在教堂的乐队里弹吉他，度过了他的青少年时期。

examples.en: Adolescent suicide is rarely an impulsive reaction to immediate distress.
examples.cn: 青少年自杀很少是由于突然发生不幸而作出的冲动反应。

adolescent.paraphrase: n.少年，少女；adj.青春期的，青少年的，未成熟的

examples.en: Britain is to adopt a more re-strictive policy on arms sales.
examples.cn: 英国将对武器出售采取更具限制性的政策。

examples.en: Britain is free to adopt policies to bolster its economy.
examples.cn: 英国可以自由制定政策以振兴经济。

adopt.paraphrase: vt.采用，采取，采纳，收养，正式接受，接受，批准

examples.en: They threatened to expel him from his adoptive country.
examples.cn: 他们威胁将他驱逐出他的移居国。

examples.en: Galway in Ireland is my adoptive home.
examples.cn: 爱尔兰的戈尔韦是我的第二故乡。

adoptive.paraphrase: adj.收养的，有收养关系的，被采纳的，装出来的

examples.en: We adore them for their generosity.
examples.cn: 我们钦佩他们的慷慨.

examples.en: I adore good books and the theatre.
examples.cn: 我爱读好书，也喜欢看戏。

adore.paraphrase: vt.爱慕，崇拜，非常喜欢，敬佩；vi.崇拜，爱慕

examples.en: His adult life mirrored the downward course of his father's life.
examples.cn: 他成年后的生活反映出了他父亲的生活在走下坡路。

examples.en: Which adult in these children's lives will provide the nurturing they need?
examples.cn: 这些孩子生活中的哪个成人会为他们提供所需的养育呢？

adult.paraphrase: adj.成熟的，（智力、思想、行为）成熟的，成年人的，成年的；n.成年的人或动物

examples.en: It is a good idea to place your order well in advance.
examples.cn: 早早就提前下单是个好主意。

examples.en: Generally, warm colours advance in painting and cold colours recede.
examples.cn: 通常，绘画中暖色调为近感色，而冷色调为远感色。

advance.paraphrase: vt.（使）前进，将…提前，预付，提出；vi.（数量等）增加，向前推（至下一步），上涨；n.增长，借款，（价格、价值的）上涨，预付款；adj.预先的，先行的

examples.en: The way Swedes integrate immigrants is, she feels, 100% more advanced.
examples.cn: 她觉得瑞典人帮助移民适应当地生活的方式百分百地更为先进。

examples.en: The demonstrators fled when soldiers toting machine guns advanced on the crowd.
examples.cn: 当持有机枪的士兵向人群进逼时，示威者逃散了。

advanced.paraphrase: adj.先进的，高等的，高深的，年老的，晚期的；v.前进(advance的过去式和过去分词)，增加，上涨

examples.en: I want to take advantage of your lifetime of scholarship.
examples.cn: 我希望能够用到您一生的学识。

examples.en: She took advantage of him even after they were divorced.
examples.cn: 甚至在他们离婚后，她还在占他的便宜。

advantage.paraphrase: n.有利条件，益处，优越（性），处于支配地位；vt.有利于，有益于，促进，使处于有利地位；vi.得益，获利

examples.en: the advent of new technology
examples.cn: 新技术的出现

examples.en: The advent of the Euro will redefine Europe.
examples.cn: 欧元的出现将重新定义欧洲.

advent.paraphrase: n.出现，到来，基督降临节（圣诞节前的四个星期）

examples.en: They'rewritten as adventure stories. They're not intended to be deep.
examples.cn: 它们是作为历险故事来写的，并没打算追求深刻。

examples.en: But Jules was not eager for classroom learning, he hungered for adventure.
examples.cn: 但朱尔斯对坐在课堂里学习并不热心，他渴望冒险。

adventure.paraphrase: n.冒险活动，冒险经历，奇遇

examples.en: We add the suffix " ly " to make the adjective " quick " into the adverb " quickly ".
examples.cn: 我们在形容词 “ quick ” 后加 “ ly ” 构成副词 “ quickly ”.

examples.en: Fill in each blank with the adjective or the adverb given in its proper degree.
examples.cn: 用所给形容词或副词的适当形式填空.

examples.en: Dirt and disease are adverse to the best growth of children.
examples.cn: 肮脏与疾病对儿童健康成长不利.

examples.en: Despite the adverse conditions, the road was finished in just eight months.
examples.cn: 尽管存在种种不利情况，公路还是仅用8个月就完工了。

adverse.paraphrase: adj.不利的，有害的，逆的，相反的

examples.en: It's simply unethical to promote and advertise such a dangerous product.
examples.cn: 宣传推广如此危险的产品完全是不道德的。

examples.en: I shall advertise for someone to go with me.
examples.cn: 我将登广告寻人和我同去。

advertise.paraphrase: vt.做广告，做宣传，通告，通知，宣扬；vi.登广告，做广告，做宣传

examples.en: That would not be a good advertisement for Hungary's emerging democracy.
examples.cn: 那并不能有效地体现匈牙利新兴的民主意识。

examples.en: Miss Parrish recently placed an advertisement in the local news-paper.
examples.cn: 帕里什小姐最近在本埠报纸上登了一则广告。

advertisement.paraphrase: n.广告，宣传，公告，出公告，做广告

examples.en: The city directory showed no such return address as the advertiser had left.
examples.cn: 本市的住址簿上查不到登启事人留下的那个回信地址.

examples.en: As an advertiser today, you weigh new factors into your media mix.
examples.cn: 作为一个当今的广告主, 你须衡量媒体混合的新因素.

examples.en: Substantial numbers of rank and file members ignored their union's advice.
examples.cn: 有相当一部分普通员工不理睬工会的建议。

examples.en: She did not take kindly to being offered advice.
examples.cn: 她不喜欢别人给她提建议。

advice.paraphrase: n.劝告，忠告，（商业）通知，建议，（政治，外交上的）报导，报告

examples.en: Early booking is advisable.
examples.cn: 早订票是明智的。

examples.en: It was advisable for you not to mention that.
examples.cn: 你不提及那件事是明智的.

advisable.paraphrase: adj.明智的，可取的，能劝告的，适当的

examples.en: Dietary experts can advise on the ins and outs of dieting.
examples.cn: 饮食专家可以对日常饮食的方方面面提出建议。

examples.en: A family doctor will be able to advise on suitable birth control.
examples.cn: 家庭医生能够就合适的节育措施提出建议。

advise.paraphrase: vt.（商业）通知，报告，提议，建议；vi.接受劝告，商量，建议，提供意见

examples.en: The group does not advocate the use of violence.
examples.cn: 该团体不支持使用暴力。

examples.en: Often the interviewer will need to play devil's advocate in order to get a discussion going.
examples.cn: 采访者常常需要故意唱唱反调以使访谈继续下去。

advocate.paraphrase: vt.提倡，拥护，鼓吹，为…辩护；n.（辩护）律师，提倡者，支持者

examples.en: The scientists conducted two aerial surveys followed by two ground surveys.
examples.cn: 科学家们在两次地面勘测后又进行了两次空中勘测。

examples.en: The seagulls swirled in aerial combat over the barges.
examples.cn: 海鸥盘旋在驳船上方，展开空中的搏斗。

aerial.paraphrase: adj.空气的，航空的，空中的，空想的；n.[电讯] 天线

examples.en: Advanced Aeronautics booster color changes for Apollo and Carrier Drones.
examples.cn: 先进航空学将会改变阿波罗和舰载机的加速器颜色.

examples.en: Finally, the Civil Aeronautics Board ( CAB ) has jurisdiction over civil aviation, including routes, rates, and sudsidies.
examples.cn: 最后, 民用航空局 ( CAB ) 对民航(包括航线, 运费和津贴)有管辖权.

aeronautics.paraphrase: n.航空学，飞行术；adj.航空（学）的

examples.en: The centre of pressure moves rearward and the aeroplane becomes unbalanced.
examples.cn: 气压中心后移使飞机失去平衡。

examples.en: The aeroplane was gyrating about the sky in a most unpleasant fashion.
examples.cn: 飞机在空中盘旋，令人不堪忍受。

examples.en: an aesthetic appreciation of the landscape
examples.cn: 用审美的眼光欣赏风景

examples.en: From an aesthetic point of view it's a thetic view.
examples.cn: 从美学观点来说,这是个武断的看法.

aesthetic.paraphrase: adj.美的，美学的，有关美的，审美的，具有审美趣味的；n.美学标准，美感，审美观

examples.en: "This ain't no affair of yours, boy!" McClosky said threateningly.
examples.cn: “小子，这不关你的事！”麦克洛斯基威胁道。

examples.en: He claims he was made the fall guy for the affair.
examples.cn: 他声称自己是这起事件的替罪羊。

affair.paraphrase: n.事情，事件，事务，个人的事，私事，风流韵事

examples.en: Poor housing and family stress can affect both physical and mental health.
examples.cn: 住房条件差、家庭压力大会影响身心两方面的健康。

examples.en: Scientists call this the "it won't affect me" syndrome.
examples.cn: 科学家把这种现象称为“我无所谓”的典型表现。

affect.paraphrase: vt.影响，假装，感动，（疾病）侵袭；n.感情，情感，心情，[精神病学]（表露或觉察到的）情绪反应

examples.en: Their affection for her soon increased almost to idolatry.
examples.cn: 他们对她的喜爱不久就发展到了盲目崇拜的地步。

examples.en: Normally, such an outward display of affection is reserved for his mother.
examples.cn: 通常，只有在母亲面前他的情感才会如此外露。

affection.paraphrase: n.喜爱，慈爱，情感或感情，意向，疾病，病情

examples.en: He said he wanted to affiliate with a U.S. firm because he needed "expert advice and counsel in legal affairs".
examples.cn: 他说他因为需要“在法律事务上得到专家的意见和建议”，所以想与一家美国律师事务所建立合作关系。

examples.en: The Government will not allow the staff association to affiliate with outside unions.
examples.cn: 政府不会允许其公务员协会与外部工会有紧密联系。

affiliate.paraphrase: vt.使隶属于，接纳…为成员，使紧密联系；vt.& vi.加入，与…有关，为…工作

examples.en: Sam was born in the country and had a deep affinity with nature.
examples.cn: 萨姆在乡下出生，特别喜爱大自然。

examples.en: Many girls do show an affinity for craft skills.
examples.cn: 确实有许多女孩子喜爱手工.

affinity.paraphrase: n.密切关系，姻亲关系，（男女之间的）吸引力，吸引人的异性，类同，类似，近似

examples.en: We gave them the opportunity to express their feelings, to affirm themselves.
examples.cn: 我们给了他们一个机会表达自己的感情, 他们可以借此挺一挺腰杆.

examples.en: This report is positively denied in official circles, who affirm that nothing of the kind occurred , but that the story is made out of whole cloth.
examples.cn: 这篇报导为官方人士所断然否认, 他们断言根本没有这回事, 其内容纯属捏造.

affirm.paraphrase: vt.& vi.断言，肯定，证实，确实，[法]不经宣誓而庄严宣布，承认

examples.en: The Strand is one of London's busiest and most affluent streets.
examples.cn: 斯特兰德街是伦敦最繁华、最富足的街道之一。

examples.en: The diet of the affluent has not changed much over the decades.
examples.cn: 几十年来富人们的饮食习惯并未发生太大的变化。

affluent.paraphrase: adj.富裕的，富足的，流畅，滔滔不绝的；n.富裕的人，支流

examples.en: They pay full rates. Mind you, they can afford it.
examples.cn: 他们付全价，请注意，他们是付得起的。

examples.en: They could not afford to spoil those maps by careless colouring.
examples.cn: 若是上色的时候不小心弄坏了那些地图，他们可承担不起。

afford.paraphrase: vt.买得起，担负得起，提供，给予

examples.en: Why should a great community like a university be afraid of nihilism?
examples.cn: 为什么像大学这样人才济济的社区要害怕虚无主义呢？

examples.en: "I'm afraid he's ill." — "I'm sorry to hear that."
examples.cn: “恐怕他生病了。”——“真是遗憾。”

afraid.paraphrase: adj.害怕的，担心的，恐怕，畏惧，害怕

examples.en: No matter where you go in life or how old you get, there's always something new to learn about. After all, life is full of surprises.
examples.cn: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

examples.en: The mystery hero imme-diately alerted police after spotting a bomb.
examples.cn: 那个无名英雄发现炸弹后马上报了警。

after.paraphrase: prep.…后的，（表示时间）在…以后，（表示位置、顺序）在…后面；conj.在…以后；adv.以后，继后；adj.后来的，以后的

examples.en: The President met this afternoon with his top military advisers.
examples.cn: 总统今天下午会见了他最得力的军事顾问。

examples.en: It was a marvellous afternoon with a huge turnout of people.
examples.cn: 那是个美妙的下午，出席人数众多。

examples.en: The world breaks everyone, and afterward, many are stronger at the broken places.
examples.cn: 生活总是让我们遍体鳞伤，但到后来，那些受伤的地方会变得更坚强。

examples.en: Not long afterward she received five calls in one day.
examples.cn: 不久之后，她一天内就接到了5个电话。

examples.en: Before the race, he is fine. But afterwards he is worn out.
examples.cn: 赛前他状态很好，赛后就筋疲力尽了。

examples.en: She wondered where they were going to rendezvous afterwards.
examples.cn: 她想知道之后他们要去哪里约会。

afterwards.paraphrase: adv.然后，后来地，以后，之后，继

examples.en: The central heating's been turned off. I've turned it on again.
examples.cn: 中央供暖系统已经关上。我又将它打开了。

examples.en: Ever tried. Ever failed. No matter. Try Again. Fail again. Fail better.
examples.cn: 努力过，失败过，没关系，屡战屡败，屡败屡战，每一次失败都比上一次更好。

examples.en: He spent 25 years campaigning against racist and unjust immigration laws.
examples.cn: 他用了25年的时间与带有种族歧视色彩和没有公正可言的移民法作斗争。

examples.en: "One thing you can never insure against is corruption among your staff."—"Agreed."
examples.cn: “永远也防不胜防的就是员工内部的贪污腐败。”——“同意。”

examples.en: Beauty is an attitude. It has nothing to do with age.
examples.cn: 美是一种态度，与年龄无关。

examples.en: In some cases there is a mini-mum age limit.
examples.cn: 有些情况下有最低年龄限制。

age.paraphrase: n.年龄，时代，老年，年龄段；vt.& vi.（使）长大，使显老，使变老，使苍老；vi.[化学]老化，陈化，熟化，（吸毒者随年龄增长而主动）戒毒，戒除毒品；vt.[化学]使老化，使陈化，使熟化，估计，推测（马的年龄）

examples.en: The agency should reduce turnaround time by 11 per cent.
examples.cn: 该代理机构应削减11%的周转时间。

examples.en: The advertising agency rang up 1.4 billion dollars in yearly sales.
examples.cn: 这家广告代理商每年销售额达14亿美元。

examples.en: Never before has a summit had such a crowded agenda.
examples.cn: 以前从来没有一次峰会的日程排得这么满。

examples.en: On arrival, a six-course meal was top of the agenda.
examples.cn: 他们到达之后要做的第一件事是吃一顿六道菜的大餐。

agenda.paraphrase: n.议事日程，待议诸事项一览表，日常工作事项，议程（ agendum的名词复数）

examples.en: We went straight to the estate agent and wrote out a cheque.
examples.cn: 我们径直到房地产经纪人那里开了一张支票。

examples.en: Cheap flights are available from budget travel agent from £240.
examples.cn: 收费低廉的旅行社可以提供240英镑起的低价机票。

agent.paraphrase: n.代理人，代理商，药剂，特工；vt.由…作中介，由…代理；adj.代理的

examples.en: Men aggravate me when they go on about how impractical women are.
examples.cn: 男人们不断地谈论女人是如何不切实际的时候使我恼火.

examples.en: Threats will only aggravate her.
examples.cn: 恐吓只能激怒她.

aggravate.paraphrase: vt.加重，使恶化，使恼火，激怒

examples.en: Her aggressive moods alternated with gentle or more co-operative states.
examples.cn: 她情绪多变，时而咄咄逼人，时而又显得温柔平和或乐于合作。

examples.en: He is respected as a very aggressive and competitive executive.
examples.cn: 他是一位锐意进取、竞争意识很强的主管，颇受尊敬。

aggressive.paraphrase: adj.侵略的，侵犯的，攻势的，（美）有进取心的，积极行动的，有进取心的，有闯劲的，好争斗的，借故生端的，爱打架的，要打架的

examples.en: Don't agitate yourself over it.
examples.cn: 别为这件事焦虑.

examples.en: All you need to do is gently agitate the water with a finger or paintbrush.
examples.cn: 你只需要用手指或刷子轻轻地搅动水。

agitate.paraphrase: vt.搅动，摇动，使不安，激烈讨论；vi.鼓动，煽动

examples.en: Just a few days ago, I finished a commission.
examples.cn: 就在几天前，我完成了一项委托创作任务。

examples.en: Mechanization happened years ago on the farms of Islay.
examples.cn: 数年前，艾莱的农场就实现了机械化。

examples.en: The Aussie was in agony with a broken finger.
examples.cn: 这个澳大利亚人承受着断指之痛。

examples.en: He staggered around the playground, screaming in agony.
examples.cn: 他绕着运动场跌跌撞撞地走着，并且痛苦地大叫。

agony.paraphrase: n.极大的痛苦，苦恼，烦闷，临死的挣扎，（感情的）迸发

examples.en: I think you'd agree he's a very respected columnist.
examples.cn: 我想你得承认他是个备受尊敬的专栏作家。

examples.en: The dampness of the forest did not agree with him physically.
examples.cn: 他的身体不能适应森林的潮湿。

agree.paraphrase: vt.& vi.同意，赞同；vi.[语]一致，符合，商定，约定，意见相合，（气候、食物等）适宜；vt.同意，承认，使和谐一致，认为正确无误

examples.en: "It's not an agreeable state of affairs," concurs Heitham.
examples.cn: “目前的事态并不令人满意。”海瑟姆赞同道。

examples.en: Lloyd George was most anxious to be agreeable and pleasant.
examples.cn: 劳埃德·乔治极力想表现得平易近人、和蔼亲切。

agreeable.paraphrase: adj.令人愉快的，惬意的，有礼貌的，同意的，接受的，适合的，一致的

examples.en: The agreement has raised hopes that the war may end soon.
examples.cn: 那项协议使人们感到战争有望很快结束。

examples.en: Friendship means understanding, not agreement. It means forgiveness, not forgetting.It means the memories last, even if contact is lost.
examples.cn: 友情是理解，不是妥协；是原谅，不是遗忘。即使不联系，感情依然在。

agreement.paraphrase: n.协定，协议，同意，一致，合同书，（词之间性、数、人称方面与…）一致

examples.en: Much of the plan runs counter to European agriculture and environmental policy.
examples.cn: 该计划的很多内容与欧洲农业及环境方面的政策相冲突。

examples.en: The Farmers' Club is an organisation for people involved in agriculture.
examples.cn: 农场主俱乐部是为农业界人士创办的组织。

agriculture.paraphrase: n.农业，农耕，农业生产，农学

examples.en: Mark was out of earshot, walking ahead of them.
examples.cn: 马克走在前面，听不见他们的声音。

examples.en: He pushed everyone full speed ahead until production hit a bottleneck.
examples.cn: 他催促所有人拼命干活，直到生产遭遇瓶颈。

ahead.paraphrase: adv.在（某人或某事物的）前面，向前，预先，在将来，为未来

examples.en: He keeps coming to the aid of this damsel in distress.
examples.cn: 他不断出手相助这位落难女子。

examples.en: I thought a phonetic spelling might aid in pronunciation.
examples.cn: 我想语音拼写可能有助于发音。

aid.paraphrase: n.帮助，助手，外援，辅助设备；vt.帮助，资助，救助，促进；vi.帮助

examples.en: Their ultimate aim was a market economy for Hungary.
examples.cn: 他们最终的目标是为匈牙利建立起市场经济体制。

examples.en: In a naval battle your aim is to sink the enemy's ship.
examples.cn: 在海战中目标就是击沉敌船。

aim.paraphrase: vt.瞄准，对准，踢向，挥向；vi.旨在，以…为目标，致力于，决定；n.目的，目标，瞄准

examples.en: America has enough firepower in the area to mount sustained air strikes.
examples.cn: 美国在该地区拥有足够的火力发动持续的空中打击。

examples.en: The volume of scheduled flights is straining the air traffic control system.
examples.cn: 定期航班的数量正让空中交通指挥系统不堪重负。

air.paraphrase: n.天空，气氛，空运，（简单易记的）曲调；vt.& vi.晾晒，烘干，播送，广播；vt.使房间通风， 透气

examples.en: A few moments later they were airborne and winging their way south.
examples.cn: 过了一会儿，他们已然搭上飞机赶往南方了。

examples.en: First Airborne Division was heavily outgunned by German forces.
examples.cn: 第一空降师完全被德军的凶猛火力压住了。

airborne.paraphrase: adj.空运的，飞机载的，航空的，空气所带的，空气传播的

examples.en: Since its inception the company has produced 53 different aircraft designs.
examples.cn: 该公司自成立以来已经完成了53种不同样式飞行器的设计。

examples.en: A light aircraft crash-landed on a putting green yesterday.
examples.cn: 一架轻型飞机昨天在一个高尔夫球场的球洞区紧急降落了。

examples.en: The airline had losses of $35m and was bailed out by Qantas.
examples.cn: 这家航空公司亏损达3,500万美元，而澳航出资帮助其摆脱了困境。

examples.en: The £85m programme will involve an extensive rebranding of the airline.
examples.cn: 这个8,500万英镑的项目将包括全面重塑该航空公司的形象。

examples.en: They arrived in Belgium by airplane .
examples.cn: 他们乘飞机到达比利时。

examples.en: The insured value of the airplane was greater than its book value.
examples.cn: 该飞机的投保价值高于它的实际账面价值。

examples.en: An airliner came close to disaster while approaching Heathrow Airport.
examples.cn: 一架大型客机在飞近希思罗机场时差点儿发生空难。

examples.en: He returned to the airport to find his car alarm going off.
examples.cn: 他回到机场时听到自己的汽车报警器响了。

examples.en: He was in no hurry to walk down the aisle.
examples.cn: 他并不急于结婚。

examples.en: A quick movement across the aisle caught his eye.
examples.cn: 有个人影在走道里一闪而过，引起了他的注意。

aisle.paraphrase: n.过道，通道，侧廊，耳堂，狭长的通路

examples.en: This process is akin to piecing together a jigsaw puzzle.
examples.cn: 这个过程和拼图相似。

examples.en: What he felt was more akin to pity than love.
examples.cn: 他感受到的更像怜悯，而不是爱。

akin.paraphrase: adj.同族的，相似的，同源的，关系密切的

examples.en: He expressed alarm about the government's increasingly bellicose statements.
examples.cn: 他对政府越来越具挑衅性的声明表示担忧。

examples.en: Any escape, once it's detected, sets off the alarm.
examples.cn: 一旦发现有泄漏，警报就会响起来。

alarm.paraphrase: n.惊恐，警报，闹铃，动员令；vt.使惊恐，警告，给（门等）安装警报器

examples.en: Their first album was painfully frank to the point of being confessional.
examples.cn: 他们的第一张专辑是那么的坦率，近乎自白。

examples.en: They are recording a follow-up to their successful 1989 album.
examples.cn: 他们正在灌录他们1989年畅销专辑的续篇。

album.paraphrase: n.相册，集邮簿，签名册，唱片

examples.en: In 1985, he began to show signs of alcohol and drug dependency.
examples.cn: 在1985年，他开始表现出酗酒嗜毒的迹象。

examples.en: He was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence of alcohol.
examples.cn: 他因涉嫌酒后驾驶被捕。

alcohol.paraphrase: n.乙醇，酒精，含酒精的饮料

examples.en: The bank is alert to the danger.
examples.cn: 银行充分意识到了危险。

examples.en: The armed forces were on high alert to guard against any retaliation.
examples.cn: 武装部队保持高度戒备，以防发生任何报复行动。

alert.paraphrase: adj.警觉的，警惕的，注意的，思维敏捷的，活泼的；n.警报，警戒状态；vt.向…报警

examples.en: When war broke out, he was interned as an enemy alien.
examples.cn: 战争爆发时，他作为敌国人士遭到关押。

examples.en: Leningrad was the third alien city to offer him a surrogate home.
examples.cn: 列宁格勒是他在异地安家的第三个外国城市。

alien.paraphrase: adj.外国的，相异的，异已的，不相容的；n.外国人，外侨，局外人，外星人；vt.让渡，转让，疏远，离间

examples.en: The govern-ment cannot afford to alienate either group.
examples.cn: 疏远两个团体中的任何一方都是政府承受不起的。

examples.en: A new format would alienate its ageing readership without attracting young readers.
examples.cn: 新的版式会疏远上了年纪的读者群，并且也不会吸引年轻读者。

alienate.paraphrase: vt.使疏远，离间，使转移，放弃，[法]转让，让渡（财产或权利）

examples.en: Mr Bowles could engender delight in students and musicians alike.
examples.cn: 鲍尔斯先生能够让学生和音乐家都感到快乐。

examples.en: The language of Darwin was intelligible to experts and non-experts alike.
examples.cn: 达尔文的语言无论对专家还是非专业人士而言都明白易懂。

alike.paraphrase: adj.同样的，相似的；adv.同样地，两者都，同样地，类似于

examples.en: The big factories are trying to stay alive by cutting costs.
examples.cn: 大型工厂正试图通过削减成本以维持生存。

examples.en: It's an affront to human dignity to keep someone alive like this.
examples.cn: 如此维持一个人的生命是对人类尊严的冒犯。

alive.paraphrase: adj.活着的，活泼的，有生气的，敏感的

examples.en: No matter where you go in life or how old you get, there's always something new to learn about. After all, life is full of surprises.
examples.cn: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

examples.en: If you wait, all that happens is that you get older.
examples.cn: 如果你等待，发生的只有变老。

all.paraphrase: adj.全部的，一切的，各种的，极度的，尽量的；pron.全部，一切，每个人，每件东西，全部情况；adv.全部地，完全地，每个，非常；n.全体，[常作A-]整体，[常与my， your， his， her等连用]（某人）所有的一切

examples.en: That allegation is a flat-out lie.
examples.cn: 那项指控是彻头彻尾的谎言。

examples.en: The allegation has caused one lecturer's career to bite the dust.
examples.cn: 这项指控断送了一名讲师的前程。

allegation.paraphrase: n.陈述，主张，宣称，陈词，陈述，指控

examples.en: The newspaper reporters allege that the man was murdered but they have given no proof.
examples.cn: 新闻记者们宣称这个男人是被谋杀的,但他们没提出证据.

examples.en: To aver is to allege in a pleading.
examples.cn: 立证是在辩护中引例证明.

allege.paraphrase: vt.断言，宣称，辩解，提出…作为理由

examples.en: They swore their allegiance to the USA and received their naturalization papers.
examples.cn: 他们起誓忠诚于美国，随后就接到了批准他们入籍的文件。

examples.en: The constitution requires members of parliament to take an oath of allegiance.
examples.cn: 宪法规定，议员必须宣誓效忠。

allegiance.paraphrase: n.忠诚，拥护，（封建）臣道，忠节

examples.en: Someone allergic to milk is likely to react to cheese.
examples.cn: 对牛奶过敏的人可能对奶酪也有不良反应。

examples.en: Soya milk can cause allergic reactions in some children.
examples.cn: 有些孩子会对豆浆过敏。

allergic.paraphrase: adj.过敏的，过敏症的，对…极讨厌的

examples.en: Nowadays, a great deal can be done to alleviate back pain.
examples.cn: 如今，减轻背部疼痛可以有许多方法。

examples.en: A number of measures were taken to alleviate the problem.
examples.cn: 采取了一系列措施缓解这个问题。

examples.en: There are signs that the alliance is now fraying at the edges.
examples.cn: 有迹象表明该联盟现正分崩离析。

examples.en: What will be the effect of the alliance between IBM and Apple?
examples.cn: 若IBM公司和苹果公司联合将会有什么效果呢？

alliance.paraphrase: n.（国家、政党等的）结盟，同盟，联盟，联合，联姻，同盟条约，同盟者

examples.en: They intend to allocate more places to mature students this year.
examples.cn: 今年他们打算给成人学生提供更多的名额。

examples.en: Local authorities have to learn to allocate resources efficiently.
examples.cn: 地方政府必须学会有效地分配资源.

examples.en: Enquiries are so large that we can only than allot you 200 cases.
examples.cn: 询盘如此之多,我们只能分给你们200箱货.

examples.en: The government is ready to allot houses in that area.
examples.cn: 政府准备在那个地区分配住房.

allot.paraphrase: vt.分配，摊派给，分派，派给，拨给，指定（款项等）作某种用途

examples.en: Why should a successful company allow another firm to pick its brains?
examples.cn: 为什么一个成功的企业就得允许别的公司来讨教呢？

examples.en: Police warned motorists to allow extra time to get to work.
examples.cn: 警方告诫驾车者出门上班要留出富余时间。

allow.paraphrase: vt.允许，承认，给予，准许（做某事）；vi.容许，考虑

examples.en: The personal allowance depends on your age and marital status.
examples.cn: 个人免税额的多少取决于年龄和婚姻状况。

examples.en: He lives on a single parent's allowance of £70 a week.
examples.cn: 他靠每周70英镑的单亲家庭生活补助过日子。

allowance.paraphrase: n.津贴，补贴，零用钱，限额，折扣，默许，默认；vt.给（某人）零用钱或津贴，按定量供给

examples.en: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
examples.cn: 黄铜是铜锌合金。

examples.en: The worker worked in a little copper with the alloy.
examples.cn: 工人在合金里搀了一点铜.

alloy.paraphrase: n.合金，（合金中的）劣等金属，搀杂品，成色；v.合铸，熔合（金属），铸成合金，在…中搀以杂质，使（金属）减低成色

examples.en: a close ally and friend of the prime minister
examples.cn: 首相的一个亲密盟友和伙伴

examples.en: The United States is a close ally of South Korea.
examples.cn: 美国是韩国的亲密盟友。

ally.paraphrase: n.同盟国，同盟者，助手，支持者，协约国，联盟；vt.&vi.（使）联盟，（使）同盟，（使）结盟，（使）联姻

examples.en: It's almost a foregone conclusion that you'll get what you want.
examples.cn: 你将得到你想要的，这几乎是确定无疑的。

examples.en: The representatives almost came to blows at a meeting.
examples.cn: 代表们在一次会议上差点动起手来。

almost.paraphrase: adv.几乎，差不多，将近，快要，近乎

examples.en: He had always been an outcast, unwanted and alone.
examples.cn: 他一直都被视为异类，无人理睬，形单影只。

examples.en: Don't leave a child alone in a room with an open fire.
examples.cn: 房间里有裸露的明火时，不要让孩子独处其中。

alone.paraphrase: adj.单独的，独一无二的，独自的；adv.单独地，独自地，孤独地，只，只有

examples.en: Come along, lad. Time for you to get home.
examples.cn: 来吧，小伙子。你该回家了。

examples.en: Good luck is when an opportunity comes along and you're prepared for it.
examples.cn: 好运就是当机会来临时，你早已做好了准备。

along.paraphrase: adv.一起，向前，进展，到某处；prep.沿着，顺着，靠着…边

examples.en: Daisy strode alongside her, breathing heavily but keeping pace.
examples.cn: 黛西在她身边大步走着，大口喘着气，但是没有落后。

examples.en: A variety of heavy industries grew up alongside the port.
examples.cn: 各种重工业沿着港口逐渐发展起来。

alongside.paraphrase: adv.在…的侧面，在…旁边，与…并排；prep.在…旁边，横靠，傍着

examples.en: Prue entered the passage in her notebook, then read it aloud again.
examples.cn: 普吕把那一段写在她的笔记本上，然后又大声念了一遍。

examples.en: Prudently, Joanna spoke none of this aloud.
examples.cn: 出于慎重，乔安娜说这些话时一直压低声音。

examples.en: Q comes between P and R in the English alphabet.
examples.cn: 英语字母表中，Q在P和R之间。

examples.en: The modern Russian alphabet has 31 letters.
examples.cn: 现代俄语字母表有31个字母。

alphabet.paraphrase: n.字母表，字母系统，入门，初步

examples.en: The material consisted only of already published, unclassified information.
examples.cn: 这份材料里只有一些已公开的、非保密性质的信息。

examples.en: The country's politicians are already heaving a collective sigh of relief.
examples.cn: 该国的政界人士均已松了口气。

examples.en: Surfing the Internet is fun, but it's also a time waster.
examples.cn: 上网很有意思，但也很浪费时间。

examples.en: Once wholesale prices are deregulated, consumer prices will also rise.
examples.cn: 一旦批发价格放开，零售价格也会随之上涨。

examples.en: Barry Humphries's alter ego Dame Edna has taken the US by storm.
examples.cn: 巴里·汉弗莱斯凭借埃德娜夫人一角轰动全美。

examples.en: She is, first and foremost, her husband's alter ego.
examples.cn: 她首先是丈夫的知己。

alter.paraphrase: vt.改变，更改，改建（房屋），（人）变老；vi.改变，修改

examples.en: His group was forced to turn back and take an alternate route.
examples.cn: 他的小组被迫返回并选择了另一条路线。

examples.en: Now you just alternate layers of that mixture and eggplant.
examples.cn: 现在你只需把茄子和拌料一层层交替放好。

alternate.paraphrase: adj.轮流的，交替的，间隔的，代替的；vi.交替，轮流；vt.使交替，使轮流；n.〈美〉（委员）代理人，候补者，替换物

examples.en: It seems clear that he has no reasonable alternative.
examples.cn: 他没有其他合适的选择，这一点似乎很清楚。

examples.en: There may be alternative methods of substantiation other than written records.
examples.cn: 除书面记录外，可能还有其他方法可以证实。

alternative.paraphrase: adj.替代的，备选的，其他的，另类的；n.可供选择的事物

examples.en: Although people sometimes buy property sight unseen, it'sa remarkably bad idea.
examples.cn: 尽管人们有时没看房就买了房，但这真是一个很糟糕的主意。

examples.en: Although he was only grumbling, his choice of words made Rodney angry.
examples.cn: 尽管他只是在咕哝，可是他的措词却让罗德妮恼火。

examples.en: Your attitude, not your aptitude, will determine your altitude.--Zig Ziglar
examples.cn: 决定你人生高度的，不是你的才能，而是你的态度。

examples.en: The plane was flying at an altitude of 2000 meters.
examples.cn: 这时飞机的高度是2000公尺.

altitude.paraphrase: n.高度，海拔高度，高位，高等，[天]地平纬度，[数]顶垂线

examples.en: His objective was to kill the space station project altogether.
examples.cn: 他的目的是使空间站项目全面停止。

examples.en: I don't think a sedentary life would altogether suit me.
examples.cn: 我认为长期伏案的生活一点也不适合我。

altogether.paraphrase: adv.全部地，完全地，总共，总而言之；n.〈口〉裸体

examples.en: Copper, brass and aluminium are separated and remelted for reuse.
examples.cn: 铜、黄铜和铝被分门别类重新熔化以进行再利用。

examples.en: The building is impeccably modernist: glass, aluminium and grey.
examples.cn: 这座楼完全是现代主义风格：采用玻璃和铝质材料，以灰色作为基调。

examples.en: He had a house there and a dock and a little aluminum boat.
examples.cn: 他在那儿有一所房子、一个泊船的码头和一艘小铝船。

examples.en: Aluminum is made from bauxite.
examples.cn: 铝是从铝土矿中提炼出的.

examples.en: The ideological divisions between the parties aren't always obvious.
examples.cn: 政党之间的意识形态界线并不总是泾渭分明的。

examples.en: No matter where you go in life or how old you get, there's always something new to learn about. After all, life is full of surprises.
examples.cn: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

always.paraphrase: adv.总是，老是，永远，始终，常常，不断地

examples.en: Angela says she longs to join an amateur dramatics class.
examples.cn: 安杰拉说她渴望参加业余戏剧班。

examples.en: The Amateur Softball Association's roster of umpires has declined to 57,000.
examples.cn: 业余垒球协会的裁判员名单上的人数已经减少到了57,000名。

amateur.paraphrase: n.业余爱好者，外行，生手；adj.业余的，非职业的，外行的

examples.en: Neil's ability to utter banalities never ceased to amaze me.
examples.cn: 每次我都很惊讶，尼尔怎么能讲出这么索然无味的东西。

examples.en: He never ceases to amaze me.
examples.cn: 他总能给我惊喜。

amaze.paraphrase: vt.使大为吃惊，使惊奇；n.吃惊，好奇

examples.en: This small country has an amazing variety of landforms.
examples.cn: 这个小国家拥有令人惊叹的丰富的地貌类型。

examples.en: The most amazing thing about nature is its infinite variety.
examples.cn: 大自然最让人惊叹的是它的无限多样性。

amazing.paraphrase: adj.令人惊异的；vt.使大为吃惊，使惊奇( amaze的现在分词)，使惊异：感到非常好奇；n.吃惊，好奇

examples.en: I've been invited to meet with the American Ambassador.
examples.cn: 我受邀会见美国大使。

examples.en: Also among the speakers was the new American ambassador to Moscow.
examples.cn: 发言者当中还有驻莫斯科的新任美国大使。

ambassador.paraphrase: n.大使，使节，（派驻联合国等国际组织的）代表，特使，[比喻]使者

examples.en: Cars did not stop when the lights were on amber.
examples.cn: 交通灯变成橙黄色时，汽车没有停下来。

examples.en: The tea was darkly amber, the way he liked it.
examples.cn: 茶呈暗琥珀色，正是他希望的样子。

amber.paraphrase: n.琥珀，琥珀色，[军]线状无烟火药；adj.琥珀色的，琥珀制的；v.使成琥珀色

examples.en: This agreement is very ambiguous and open to various interpretations.
examples.cn: 这份协议非常含糊，可以有多种解释。

examples.en: The manifesto is long-winded, repetitious and often ambiguous or poorly drafted.
examples.cn: 这份声明冗长繁复，多处存在歧义或行文拙劣。

ambiguous.paraphrase: adj.含糊的，不明确的，引起歧义的，有两种或多种意思的，模棱两可

examples.en: He had nursed an ambition to lead his own big orchestra.
examples.cn: 他一直有一个梦想，希望能指挥一支自己的顶级管弦乐队。

examples.en: He is a man of extraordinary vitality, driving ambition and political nous.
examples.cn: 他是一个精力非凡、志向远大、政治上很有见识的人。

ambition.paraphrase: n.抱负，渴望得到的东西，追求的目标，夙愿；vt.追求，有…野心

examples.en: This is an ambitious and intriguing movie, full of striking imagery.
examples.cn: 这是一部气势恢宏、引人入胜的电影，充满了动人心魄的瑰丽意象。

examples.en: Chris is so ambitious, so determined to do it all.
examples.cn: 克里斯踌躇满志，决心要将它都做完。

ambitious.paraphrase: adj.有雄心的，有野心的，费力的，耗资的

examples.en: He screamed for his wife to call an ambulance.
examples.cn: 他尖叫着让他老婆打电话叫救护车。

examples.en: We gave the gate money to the St John Ambulance brigade.
examples.cn: 我们将门票收入都捐给了圣约翰急救队。

examples.en: We would rather withdraw the draft resolution than amend it.
examples.cn: 与其修改决议草案,不如予以撤回.

examples.en: The teacher advised him to amend his way of living.
examples.cn: 老师劝他改变生活方式.

examples.en: Sara, while remaining outwardly amiable toward all concerned, was inwardly furious.
examples.cn: 萨拉尽管表面上对所有相关的人依然和蔼可亲，内心却怒火中烧。

examples.en: an amiable tone of voice
examples.cn: 亲切的声调

examples.en: Dr Amid was assisted by a young Asian nurse.
examples.cn: 阿米德医生的助手是一位年轻的亚裔护士。

examples.en: They announced, amid much ballyhoo, that they had made a breakthrough.
examples.cn: 在一通大吹大擂中，他们宣布自己取得了突破。

amid.paraphrase: prep.（表示位置）在…中间，（表示环境）处于…环境中，由于存在…情况，（表示让步）尽管有…的情况

examples.en: A former associate of Mr. Pierce's was among the project's boosters.
examples.cn: 皮尔斯先生的一个前合伙人是这个计划的热心支持者之一。

examples.en: "One thing you can never insure against is corruption among your staff."—"Agreed."
examples.cn: “永远也防不胜防的就是员工内部的贪污腐败。”——“同意。”

among.paraphrase: prep.（表示牵涉）经过，（表示位置）处在…中，（表示范围）在…之内，（表示所属）为…所特有

examples.en: An e-mail is already circulating amongst news staff calling for voluntary redundancies.
examples.cn: 在新闻部员工中已经在转发一封电子邮件,呼吁大家自愿裁汰.

examples.en: He decided no assassin would chance a shot from amongst that crowd.
examples.cn: 他认定，没有刺客会冒险混在人群里开枪。

amongst.paraphrase: prep.（表示位置）处在…中，（表示范围）在…之内，（表示牵涉）经过，（表示所属）为…所特有

examples.en: The evaluation of conduct involves some amount of generalization.
examples.cn: 对操行的评价会含有一些泛泛之论。

examples.en: They will need a reasonable amount of desk area and good light.
examples.cn: 他们将需要一个面积较大的摆放办公桌的地方和充足的照明。

amount.paraphrase: n.量，数量，总额，本利之和，全部效果，全部含义；vi.（在意义、价值、效果、程度等方面）等于，等同，接近，合计，总共，发展成为

amphibian.paraphrase: n.两栖动物，水陆两用车，水旱两生植物，水陆两用飞行器；adj.两栖（类）的，水陆两用的，具有双重性格的

examples.en: The equivalent of two tablespoons of polyunsaturated oils is ample each day.
examples.cn: 每天相当于两大汤匙多重不饱和油的量就足够了。

examples.en: There'll be ample opportunity to relax, swim and soak up some sun.
examples.cn: 将会有充足的机会去放松、游泳和晒太阳。

ample.paraphrase: adj.足够的，充足的，丰富的，宽敞的，广大的，富裕的

examples.en: a 25 watt amplifier
examples.cn: 一台25瓦扩音器

examples.en: All the speakers hook up to a single amplifier.
examples.cn: 所有喇叭都接在单一的扩音器上.

amplifier.paraphrase: n.扩音器，放大器，扩大的人，详述者

amplify.paraphrase: vt.放大，扩大，增强，详述；vi.详述，引申，发挥

examples.en: Their antics never fail to amuse.
examples.cn: 他们滑稽的举止总是让人发笑。

examples.en: Tom makes up stories to amuse his little brother.
examples.cn: 汤姆编故事逗他的小弟弟.

amuse.paraphrase: vt.使人发笑，逗乐，使消遣，娱乐

examples.en: Good luck is when an opportunity comes along and you're prepared for it.
examples.cn: 好运就是当机会来临时，你早已做好了准备。

examples.en: Beauty is an attitude. It has nothing to do with age.
examples.cn: 美是一种态度，与年龄无关。

an.paraphrase: art.一（在元音字母前代替不定代词a），一任一某一，一个

examples.en: The energy economy of pregnancy is dominated by the biological adaptation of pregnancy anabolism.
examples.cn: 妊娠的能量利用,受妊娠期合成代谢的生物学适应性所支配.

examples.en: A continuously open wound inhibits anabolism.
examples.cn: 持续存在的开放伤口,会抑制合成代谢.

examples.en: Its proposed signal is a hybrid, part analog and part digital.
examples.cn: 其拟议中的信号是一种部分模拟与部分数字的混合波导联结.

examples.en: The voltage may provides an analog representation of the temperature difference.
examples.cn: 电压可以成为温差的模拟表示.

analog.paraphrase: n.类似物，同源语，<电脑>模拟；adj.（钟表）有长短针的，<电脑>模拟的

examples.en: Analogue computers are generalpurpose devices which employ laws of physics for performing mathematical operations.
examples.cn: 模拟计算机是用物理定律进行数学运算的通用装置.

examples.en: The analogue signals from the video tape are converted into digital code.
examples.cn: 采自该录像带的模拟信号被转换成数字代码。

analogue.paraphrase: n.相似物，相似的情况，对应的人，<语>同源词；adj.模拟计算机的，类似的，相似物的

examples.en: A close analogy with the art of singing can be made.
examples.cn: 可以用歌唱艺术作类比.

examples.en: The teacher drew an analogy between the human heart and a pump.
examples.cn: 老师打了个比喻，把人的心脏比作水泵。

analogy.paraphrase: n.类似，相似，比拟，类比，类推

examples.en: The teacher tried to analyse the cause of our failure.
examples.cn: 教师设法仔细分析我们失败的原因.

examples.en: Data mining is used to analyse individuals' buying habits.
examples.cn: 数据采掘被用来分析个体的购买习惯。

examples.en: The practice is to keep on record any analysis of samples.
examples.cn: 习惯上要把所有的样品分析记录在案。

examples.en: Throughout, she illustrates her analysis with excerpts from discussions.
examples.cn: 自始至终，她摘引讨论内容来阐明她的分析。

analysis.paraphrase: n.分析，分解，梗概，要略，[数]解析，验定

examples.en: Constance's husband is a financial analyst.
examples.cn: 康斯坦斯的丈夫是一名财政分析家.

examples.en: The latter studies are extremely useful to the analyst.
examples.cn: 后者的这些研究对于分析工作者极为有用.

analyst.paraphrase: n.分析家，化验员，〈美〉精神病医师

examples.en: This sort of procedure is analytic in nature.
examples.cn: 这种方法从本质上讲是分析性的.

examples.en: The boy has an analytic mind.
examples.cn: 这男孩有分析的头脑.

analytic.paraphrase: adj.解析的，分解的，善于分析的，<语>分析型的

examples.en: All this questioning is so analytical and clinical — it kills romance.
examples.cn: 整个询问分析性和逻辑性太强，浪漫的气息荡然无存。

examples.en: She has a clear analytical mind.
examples.cn: 她头脑清醒，善于分析。

analytical.paraphrase: adj.分析的，分析法的，善于分析的

examples.en: The young man did not analyze the process of his captivation and enrapturement, for love to him was a mystery and could
examples.cn: 这年轻人没有分析自己蛊惑著迷的过程, 因为对他来说,爱是个不可分析的迷.

examples.en: We should analyze the cause and effect of this event.
examples.cn: 我们应该分析这场事变的因果.

analyze.paraphrase: vt.<美>分析，分解，解释，对…进行心理分析

examples.en: He had worked extensively on the anatomy of living animals.
examples.cn: 他在活体解剖方面经验丰富。

examples.en: The ball hit him in the most sensitive part of his anatomy.
examples.cn: 球击中了他身上最敏感的部位。

anatomy.paraphrase: n.解剖，分解，分析，（详细的）剖析，（生物体的）解剖结构，骨骼

examples.en: Her Chinese friends referred to the Empress as their venerable ancestor.
examples.cn: 她的中国朋友们说这位女皇是他们值得敬仰的祖先。

examples.en: The immediate ancestor of rock "n" roll is rhythm-and-blues.
examples.cn: 摇滚乐直接源自节奏布鲁斯。

ancestor.paraphrase: n.祖先，祖宗，被继承人，原型，（动物的）原种，先祖

examples.en: Sailing boats lay at anchor in the narrow waterway.
examples.cn: 帆船停泊在狭窄的水道上。

examples.en: NATO remains the United States' chief institutional anchor in Europe.
examples.cn: 北大西洋公约组织仍然是美国在欧洲首要的支柱机构。

anchor.paraphrase: n.锚，锚状物，靠山，压阵队员；vt.抛锚，抛锚泊船，使固定，使稳固，使稳定，在…任节目主持人；vi.抛锚，停泊，固定，[体]任主要运动员，主持节目；adj.最后一棒的，末捧的

examples.en: Ancient civilizations believed in the curative powers of fresh air and sunlight.
examples.cn: 远古文明相信新鲜的空气和阳光有治病的功效。

examples.en: They held his fate in the palms of their ancient hands.
examples.cn: 他们这些老人将他的命运掌握在手心里。

ancient.paraphrase: adj.古代的，已往的，古老的，过时的，年老的，老式的；n.古代人，古文明国的国民，<古>高龄老人，<古>旗手

examples.en: For what do we live, but to make sport for our neighbours, and laugh at them in our turn?
examples.cn: 我们活着是为了什么？不就是给邻居当笑柄，再反过来笑他们。

examples.en: The world breaks everyone, and afterward, many are stronger at the broken places.
examples.cn: 生活总是让我们遍体鳞伤，但到后来，那些受伤的地方会变得更坚强。

and.paraphrase: conj.和，与，而且，于是，然后，因此

examples.en: He introduced his speech with a humorous anecdote.
examples.cn: 他讲了一则幽默轶事作为讲演的引子.

examples.en: He departed from the text to tell an anecdote.
examples.cn: 他偏离课文讲起了一则轶事.

examples.en: She's ready to start anew.
examples.cn: 她准备重新开始。

examples.en: Slowly Jewish communities were reconstituted and Jewish life began anew.
examples.cn: 渐渐地，犹太社区得到重建，犹太人的生活重新开始。

examples.en: A delightful guide was my guardian angel for the first week of the tour.
examples.cn: 令人愉快的导游是我第一周旅行的守护神。

examples.en: Thank you a thousand times, you're an angel.
examples.cn: 万分感谢，你真是个大好人。

angel.paraphrase: n.天使，天使般的人，守护神，善良可爱的人，安琪儿

anger.paraphrase: n.生气，愤怒，怒气，愤懑；vt.& vi.激怒，使发怒，[医]〈旧，非正式〉使（伤口）炎或疼痛，恼火；vi.发怒，恼火

examples.en: The tree was leaning at a low angle from the ground.
examples.cn: 那棵树倾斜得非常厉害。

examples.en: The helicopter turned at an awful angle before righting itself.
examples.cn: 直升机在恢复平稳之前倾斜得很厉害。

angle.paraphrase: n.角，[比喻]（考虑、问题的）角度，观点，轮廓鲜明的突出体；vt.使形成（或弯成）角度，把…放置成一角度，调整（或对准）…的角度，使（新闻、报道等）带有倾向性；vi.垂钓，斜移，弯曲成一角度，从（某角度）报道

examples.en: I felt incredibly ashamed of myself for getting so angry.
examples.cn: 我对自己发那么大的火而深感惭愧。

examples.en: Sarah came forward with a tight and angry face.
examples.cn: 萨拉走上前来，紧绷着脸，怒气冲冲。

angry.paraphrase: adj.生气的，愤怒的，发怒的，（颜色等）刺目的，（伤口等）发炎的

examples.en: For a few brief minutes we forgot the anxiety and anguish.
examples.cn: 短短几分钟我们就忘记了焦虑与苦恼。

examples.en: Every line etched on her face told a story of personal anguish.
examples.cn: 她脸上的每条皱纹都讲述了一次痛苦的经历。

anguish.paraphrase: n.痛苦，苦恼，伤心，令人心酸；vt.使极度痛苦，使苦恼，悲痛万分；vi.感到极度的痛苦，苦恼

animal.paraphrase: n.动物，兽，牲畜，<俚>家畜，牲口，<俚>畜生（一般的人），兽性；adj.动物的，肉体的，肉欲的

examples.en: He had wrenched his ankle badly from the force of the fall.
examples.cn: 他因摔倒而严重扭伤了脚踝。

examples.en: Her ankle caught on a root, and she almost lost her balance.
examples.cn: 她的脚踝被树根绊了一下，差点摔倒。

examples.en: He also denied that he would seek to annex the country.
examples.cn: 他还否认会试图吞并该国。

examples.en: Hitler was determined to annex Austria to Germany.
examples.cn: 希特勒决定将奥地利并入德国。

annex.paraphrase: vt.附加，追加，吞并（国家、地区等），兼并，获得，得到；n.附录，附属物（品），附件，附属建筑

examples.en: Campaigners lit scores of bonfires in ceremonies to mark the anniversary.
examples.cn: 参加运动的人们在各种仪式上点起一垛垛篝火以纪念周年庆典。

examples.en: It was the fortieth anniversary of the death of the composer.
examples.cn: 这是该作曲家逝世40周年纪念日。

anniversary.paraphrase: n.周年纪念日；adj.周年的，周年纪念的，年年的，每年的

examples.en: She was planning to announce her engagement to Peter.
examples.cn: 她正计划宣布她和彼得订婚一事。

examples.en: She was bursting to announce the news but was sworn to secrecy.
examples.cn: 她急不可待想宣布这个消息，但却发过誓要守口如瓶。

announce.paraphrase: vi.宣布参加竞选，当播音员；vt.宣布，述说，声称，预告

examples.en: The announcement came after a three-hour Cabinet meeting in Downing Street.
examples.cn: 在唐宁街进行了长达3个小时的内阁会议后发布了这份公告。

examples.en: The announcement dashed hopes of an early end to the crisis.
examples.cn: 这一宣告使得人们期盼危机早日结束的希望落了空。

examples.en: As the years went by his nastiness began to annoy his readers.
examples.cn: 年深日久，他恶毒的文字开始让读者生厌。

examples.en: His constant joking was beginning to annoy her.
examples.cn: 他不停地开玩笑，已开始惹她生气。

annoy.paraphrase: vt.打扰，干扰，使烦恼，使恼怒；vi.惹恼，令人讨厌，打搅；n.烦恼（等于annoyance）

annual.paraphrase: adj.每年的，一年的，[植物]一年生的；n.年刊，一年生植物

examples.en: He was surprised by the venomous tone of the anonymous calls.
examples.cn: 那些匿名电话的恶毒语气很令他吃惊。

examples.en: Of course, that would have to be by anonymous vote.
examples.cn: 当然，那必须通过不记名投票的方式。

anonymous.paraphrase: adj.无名的，假名的，匿名的，没有特色的

examples.en: She reached into the wardrobe and extracted another tracksuit.
examples.cn: 她伸手又从衣橱里取出一件运动服。

examples.en: I hate to rush you but I have another appointment later on.
examples.cn: 我真不想催你，但我稍后还有一个约会。

another.paraphrase: adj.又一个，再一个，另一的，其他一种；pron.另一个，别个，再一个

examples.en: Two historical questions — you can answer them how you like.
examples.cn: 两个历史问题——你可以随便回答。

examples.en: Two men answer-ing the description of the suspects tried to enter Switzerland.
examples.cn: 与描述的疑犯样子相符的两名男子试图进入瑞士。

answer.paraphrase: vt.& vi.答复， 解答， 答辩，适应；n.回答，答案，反应，足以媲美的人

examples.en: Spassky had never previously lost to his antagonist.
examples.cn: 斯帕斯基以往从未输给过他的对手。

examples.en: The thing is to know the nature of your antagonist.
examples.cn: 要紧的是要了解你的对手的特性.

antagonist.paraphrase: n.敌手，反对者，<解>对抗肌，拮抗肌，<药>对抗药，（戏剧，小说等的）反面人物

examples.en: They erected a television antenna on the roof.
examples.cn: 他们在屋顶上架起了电视天线.

examples.en: Extended the radio antenna.
examples.cn: 把收音机的天线拉到最长。

antenna.paraphrase: n.[生] 触角，触须，感觉，直觉，天线

examples.en: Social anthropology examines family relationships in detail.
examples.cn: 社会人类学深入探讨家庭关系.

examples.en: Social anthropology is centrally concerned with the diversity of culture.
examples.cn: 社会人类学主要关于文化多样性.

examples.en: Antibotics are somewhat selective in their antibacterial actions.
examples.cn: 抗菌素的抗菌谱略有选择性.

examples.en: Penicillin and magnamycin had continued antibacterial activity over a period of 7 days.
examples.cn: 青霉素和碳霉素有持续七天的抗菌作用.

examples.en: What Jeff did was to anticipate my next question.
examples.cn: 杰夫预先回答了我的下一个问题。

examples.en: Do you expect your partner to anticipate your needs?
examples.cn: 你是否期望你的伴侣不等你提出就主动满足你的需要？

anticipate.paraphrase: vt.预感，预见，预料，先于…行动；vi.过早地提出，过早地考虑（或说、做）一件事，（在口头或用文字）预言，预测

examples.en: Windsor Castle is quite literally an antique treasure trove.
examples.cn: 温莎城堡确实是名副其实的古物宝藏。

examples.en: He finds material at auctions, antique shops and flea markets.
examples.cn: 他在拍卖行、古玩店和跳蚤市场中寻宝。

antique.paraphrase: adj.古老的，古代的，过时的，古董的，古时制造的，古风的；n.古玩，古董，古风，古希腊和古罗马艺术风格；v.仿古制作，使显得古色古香，寻觅古玩

examples.en: He had shouted down the phone at her, beside himself with anxiety.
examples.cn: 他焦急万分地对着电话那头的她大喊大叫。

examples.en: For a few brief minutes we forgot the anxiety and anguish.
examples.cn: 短短几分钟我们就忘记了焦虑与苦恼。

anxiety.paraphrase: n.焦虑，忧虑，切望，渴望，令人焦虑的事，挂念

examples.en: I believe he is most painfully anxious about Diana.
examples.cn: 我相信他肯定非常担心黛安娜。

examples.en: They were anxious to bring the washing in before it rained.
examples.cn: 他们急于在下雨前把洗好的衣服收进屋子。

anxious.paraphrase: adj.焦急的，渴望的，令人焦虑的，流露出忧虑的

examples.en: I don't want any more of that heavy stuff.
examples.cn: 我再也不想碰那种麻烦事了。

examples.en: You are welcome to visit the hospital at any time.
examples.cn: 你可以随时来医院。

any.paraphrase: adj.任何的，一点，一些，普通的，任何，随便哪一个；pron.任何，无论哪个，若干；adv.稍微，少许，什么，一些，一点

examples.en: Roy told his sorrowful tale with simple words anybody could understand.
examples.cn: 罗伊用简单的、人人都能理解的语言讲述了他那个伤感的故事。

examples.en: The doll-like figures in these stories are unlike anybody, let alone oneself.
examples.cn: 这些故事中的玩偶形象跟谁都不像，更不用说像自己了。

anybody.paraphrase: pron.任何人，无论谁，随便哪一个人；n.<口语>重要的人，有声名的人，平常人

examples.en: "Anyhow," she added briskly, "it's none of my business."
examples.cn: “不管怎样”，她轻松地补充说，“这不关我的事。”

examples.en: Mother certainly won't let him stay with her and anyhow he wouldn't.
examples.cn: 母亲当然不会让他和她住在一起，再说他也不愿意。

anyhow.paraphrase: adv.总之，无论如何，不管怎样，随随便便

examples.en: She'd do anything for a bit of pin money.
examples.cn: 为了挣点外快，她什么都肯做。

examples.en: People will work themselves up into a state about anything.
examples.cn: 人们总会沉不住气，为任何事感到担忧。

anything.paraphrase: pron.任何东西，（用于否定句、疑问句中以及 if 或 whether 和 prevent、ban、avoid 等动词后，代替 something）任何东西，重要东西，重要事物

examples.en: He can call me anytime.
examples.cn: 他随时可以给我打电话。

examples.en: The college admits students anytime during the year.
examples.cn: 该学院一年中随时招生。

anytime.paraphrase: adv.任何时候，总是，无例外地，在任何时候

examples.en: A miracle is something that seems impossible but happens anyway.
examples.cn: 奇迹就是看似不可能，却发生了。

examples.en: Recession has simply accelerated changes that have been reshaping the industry anyway.
examples.cn: 经济萧条只不过加速了原本就在改变行业状况的变化。

anyway.paraphrase: adv.无论如何，而且，尽管，至少

examples.en: I didn't see that my career as a film-maker was going anywhere.
examples.cn: 我发现我作为电影制片人的职业没有什么发展前途。

examples.en: Andrew went rigid when he saw a dog, any dog, anywhere.
examples.cn: 安德鲁过去只要看见狗，无论在哪里，无论什么狗，都会吓得一动不动。

anywhere.paraphrase: adv.什么地方，任何地方，无论何处，〈口〉（用于否定句〕根本(不）

examples.en: Their two faces were hardly more than eighteen inches apart.
examples.cn: 他俩的脸相隔还不到18英寸。

examples.en: Don't think it hasn't torn me apart to be away from you.
examples.cn: 不骗你，离开你让我痛苦万分。

apart.paraphrase: adv.相隔，相距，分散地，分开地，成部分，成碎片，分辨；adj.分离的，隔离的

examples.en: She went directly to Simon's apartment and knocked on the door.
examples.cn: 她直奔西蒙的房间，敲了敲门。

examples.en: Gerome tried to talk her into taking an apartment in Paris.
examples.cn: 杰罗姆试图说服她在巴黎买一套公寓。

apartment.paraphrase: n.寓所，住房，房间，公寓楼，（有特殊用途或专属某人的）豪华寓所

examples.en: I apologise if your enjoyment of the movie was spoiled.
examples.cn: 如果破坏了你看电影的兴致，我道歉。

examples.en: The press agent tied himself in knots trying to apologise.
examples.cn: 那个广告宣传人员急于道歉。

examples.en: Beryl came round this morning to apologize.
examples.cn: 贝丽尔今天上午来登门道歉了。

examples.en: Well, for Heaven's sake, you don't need to apologize.
examples.cn: 噢,看在上天的份上,你不用道歉.

examples.en: Nancy wasn't sure what to make of Mick's apology.
examples.cn: 南希不知应该如何理解米克的道歉。

examples.en: Westcott appealed to Waite for an apology, which he duly received.
examples.cn: 韦斯科特要求韦特道歉，且如愿以偿。

apology.paraphrase: n.道歉认错，愧悔，正式辩解，正式辩护，解释，〈口〉临时凑合的代用品

examples.en: The new film will ambush the unwary, appal the squeamish and get unwanted attention the prurient.
examples.cn: 这部新片将出其不意地震撼粗心的观众, 令胆小的观众感到惊骇,并得到好色之徒讨厌的关注.

examples.en: I was appal ( l ) ed at the news.
examples.cn: 我被这消息吓坏了.

appal.paraphrase: vt.使惊骇，使充满恐惧，惊吓；vi.减弱，变得苍白

examples.en: They lacked the scientific personnel to develop the technical apparatus much further.
examples.cn: 他们缺少能够进一步研发这一技术装置的科研人员。

examples.en: a piece of laboratory apparatus
examples.cn: 一件实验室仪器

apparatus.paraphrase: n.仪器，器械，机器，机构，机关，器官

examples.en: It rapidly became apparent that rock'n'roll was a very broad church indeed.
examples.cn: 摇滚乐实际无所不包，这一点很快就显而易见了。

examples.en: The presence of a star is already apparent in the early film.
examples.cn: 在早期影片中已经显露出了明星相。

apparent.paraphrase: adj.易看见的，可看见的，显然的，明明白白的，貌似的，表面的，显见

examples.en: She was taken to hospital, apparently amnesiac and shocked.
examples.cn: 她被送往医院，好像是受了惊吓出现了失忆。

examples.en: Apparently there's a very hush-hush project under way up north.
examples.cn: 貌似这里往北的地方有个非常机密的项目正在进行。

examples.en: Its new title was meant to give the party greater public appeal.
examples.cn: 新的党名意在使该党对公众具有更强的吸引力。

examples.en: The Appeal Court has quashed the convictions of all eleven people.
examples.cn: 上诉法庭已经撤销对所有11人的判决。

appeal.paraphrase: n.上诉，[体育]诉请，呼吁，（迫切的）要求（帮助、同情等）恳求；vi.（迫切）要求，有吸引力，求助（于），提请注意；vt.将…移交上级法院审理

examples.en: He was bailed to appear before local magistrates on 5 November.
examples.cn: 他获得保释，将于11月5日在地方法庭出庭受审。

examples.en: Lumpen shapes began to appear out of the shadows.
examples.cn: 阴影里闪出几个大大的黑影。

appear.paraphrase: vi.出现，显现，出庭，出场，演出，发表

examples.en: It was the president's second public appearance to date.
examples.cn: 这是总统到那时为止的第二次公开露面。

examples.en: Marilyn made her last public appearance at Madison Square Garden.
examples.cn: 玛丽莲最后一次公开亮相是在麦迪逊广场花园。

appearance.paraphrase: n.外貌，外观，出现，露面，[哲]现象

examples.en: We are not certain whether the appendix had already burst or not.
examples.cn: 我们不敢肯定阑尾是否已经破裂。

examples.en: This prospect was the subject of an appendix to the development plan.
examples.cn: 这是发展计划附件的主题规划.

examples.en: Symptoms are a slight fever, headache and loss of appetite.
examples.cn: 症状包括低烧、头痛和食欲不振。

examples.en: There is nothing like a long walk to arouse the appetite.
examples.cn: 没有什么比走很长的路更能激起食欲的了。

appetite.paraphrase: n.欲望，胃口，食欲，嗜好，爱好

examples.en: He started to applaud and the others joined in.
examples.cn: 他开始鼓掌，其他人也跟着鼓起掌来。

examples.en: Every person stood to applaud his unforgettable act of courage.
examples.cn: 所有人起立为他不可磨灭的英勇之举鼓掌。

applaud.paraphrase: vt.鼓掌欢迎，欢呼，称赞，赞许，赞成，同意；vi.夸赞，鼓掌

examples.en: Her dancing brought loud cheers, wolf whistles and applause.
examples.cn: 她的舞蹈赢来震耳的欢呼声、口哨声和掌声。

examples.en: His speech was greeted with a storm of applause.
examples.cn: 人们对他的演讲报以雷鸣般的掌声。

examples.en: He decided on roast chicken and vegetables, with apple pie to follow.
examples.cn: 他决定点烤鸡配蔬菜，然后是苹果派。

examples.en: What will be the effect of the alliance between IBM and Apple?
examples.cn: 若IBM公司和苹果公司联合将会有什么效果呢？

examples.en: These advances were the result of the intellectual appliance of science.
examples.cn: 这些进步是巧妙应用科学的结果。

examples.en: The appliance alone island , whereas campus network can contribute more.
examples.cn: 应用校园网可发挥更大的作用.

appliance.paraphrase: n.器具，器械，装置，家用电器

examples.en: The section of the form is not applicable in your case.
examples.cn: 表格这一部分不适合你的情况.

examples.en: Appraisal has traditionally been seen as most applicable to those in management and supervisory positions.
examples.cn: 传统上认为业绩评定最适用于那些身处管理和监督职位之人。

examples.en: This applicant is by far the better than that one.
examples.cn: 这个申请者远比那一个好.

examples.en: The job applicant must have good verbal skills.
examples.cn: 应聘这份工作的人必须具有良好的语言表达技能。

examples.en: De Gaulle vetoed Britain's application to join the EEC.
examples.cn: 戴高乐驳回了英国加入欧洲经济共同体的申请。

examples.en: How do the two techniques compare in terms of application?
examples.cn: 这两种手法实际运用起来哪个好一些？

application.paraphrase: n.适用，应用，运用，申请，请求，申请表格，勤勉，用功，敷用，敷用药

examples.en: The right thing would be to apply direct pressure to the wound.
examples.cn: 正确的做法是直接按住伤口。

examples.en: Investors can apply for a package of shares at a set price.
examples.cn: 投资者可以申购固定价格的股票组合。

apply.paraphrase: vt.应用，运用，申请，涂，敷（药）；vi.申请，请求，适用，适用，适合，专心致志

examples.en: "Why didn't you appoint Ron twelve months ago?"—"Good question."
examples.cn: “你为什么12个月前不任命罗恩呢？”——“问得好。”

examples.en: Our plan is to allocate one member of staff to handle appoint-ments.
examples.cn: 我们的计划是分派一位职员处理预约事宜。

appoint.paraphrase: vt.任命，委派，约定，指定，装设，布置

examples.en: What's your appraisal of the situation?
examples.cn: 你对局势是如何评估的?

examples.en: Self-appraisal is never easy.
examples.cn: 进行自我评价向来很难。

appraisal.paraphrase: n.评价，估量，鉴定，估价（尤指估价财产，以便征税）

examples.en: An expert came to appraise the value of my antiques.
examples.cn: 一位专家来对我的古玩作了估价.

examples.en: It is very high that people appraise to his thesis.
examples.cn: 人们对他的论文评价很高.

appraise.paraphrase: vt.估价，估计，估量，评价，鉴定

examples.en: It is easy to appreciate the craftsmanship of Armani.
examples.cn: 阿玛尼的精致工艺很容易博得人们的赞誉。

examples.en: I do very much appreciate the quietness and privacy here.
examples.cn: 我的确非常喜欢这里宁静幽雅、不受打扰的氛围。

appreciate.paraphrase: vt.感激，欣赏，领会，鉴别；vi.（使）增值，涨价

examples.en: You have to take capital appreciation of the property into account.
examples.cn: 你必须将该处房产的资本增值考虑在内。

examples.en: They have a stronger appreciation of the importance of economic incentives.
examples.cn: 他们对经济激励的重要性有了更深的理解。

appreciation.paraphrase: n.欣赏，鉴赏，感谢，评估，增值

examples.en: I was a little apprehensive about the effects of what I had said.
examples.cn: 我有点担忧我说的话的后果。

examples.en: He was rather apprehensive of failure.
examples.cn: 他相当害怕失败.

apprehensive.paraphrase: adj.忧虑的，有理解力的，惶惑

examples.en: At their approach the little boy scurried away and hid.
examples.cn: 他们走近时，小男孩急忙跑开藏了起来。

examples.en: We have a very communicative approach to teaching languages.
examples.cn: 我们在语言教学中非常强调交际教学法。

approach.paraphrase: vt.& vi.接近，走近，靠近；vt.接近，着手处理，使移近，试图贿赂（或影响，疏通）；n.方法，途径，接近；vi.靠近

examples.en: Most vacancies are at senior level, requiring appropriate qualifications.
examples.cn: 大多数空缺属于高层职位，要求具备相应的资历。

examples.en: A sense of period was evoked by complementing pictures with appropriate furniture.
examples.cn: 给照片配上一些合适的家具，唤起了一种年代感。

appropriate.paraphrase: adj.适当的，恰当的，合适的；v.盗用，侵吞，拨（专款等）

examples.en: A reformed party would have to win the approval of the people.
examples.cn: 一个革新的政党需要赢得人民的认可。

examples.en: Last November the commission gave its stamp of approval to the deal.
examples.cn: 去年11月，委员会核准了这宗交易。

examples.en: I didn't approve of his manner.
examples.cn: 我不喜欢他的态度。

examples.en: The council is considering whether to approve of the use of firearms.
examples.cn: 政务委员会正在考虑是否要批准动用武器。

approve.paraphrase: vt.& vi.赞成，同意；vt.批准，认可，核准，为…提供证据；vi.赞同，称许，称赞，满意、喜欢(of)

approximate.paraphrase: adj.约莫的，大概的，极相似的，[植]相近但不连接的；vi.接近于，近似于；vt.靠近，使接近，使结合

examples.en: In April 1944 he was killed on active service.
examples.cn: 1944年4月他在战时服役中阵亡。

examples.en: The present assembly will be dissolved on April 30th.
examples.cn: 现在的议会将于4月30日解散。

examples.en: She was apt to raise her voice and wave her hands about.
examples.cn: 她动不动就拔高嗓门，并挥舞双手。

examples.en: We are apt to wish for what we can't have.
examples.cn: 我们往往会祈求得不到的东西.

apt.paraphrase: adj.恰当的，适当的，有…倾向的，易于…的，聪明的，灵巧的；abbr.(=automatically programmed tool)自动数控程序，(=automatic picture transmission)（人造卫星）自动图像传输，(=advanced passenger train)先进型旅客特快列车，(=automative professional training)汽车专业训练

examples.en: Aquatic sports include swimming and rowing.
examples.cn: 水上运动包括游泳和划船.

examples.en: Most species live off aquatic snails.
examples.cn: 绝大多数种类以吃螺为生。

aquatic.paraphrase: adj.水生的，水产的，水上的，水中（进行）的；n.水生动植物，水上运动

examples.en: The choice of players for the team seemed completely arbitrary.
examples.cn: 看来这个队的队员完全是随意选定的。

examples.en: A good judge does not make arbitrary decisions.
examples.cn: 一个优秀的法官不会作武断的判决.

arbitrary.paraphrase: adj.随意的，任性的，随心所欲的，主观的，武断的，霸道的，专制的，专横的，独断独行的，乱

examples.en: Joan of Arc was finally canonized by Pope Benedict XV in 1920.
examples.cn: 圣女贞德终于在1920年由教皇本尼狄克十五世封为圣徒。

examples.en: His pass described a perfect arc through the leaden sky.
examples.cn: 他的传球在阴沉的天空中划出了一道完美的弧线。

arc.paraphrase: n.综合症状，弧（度），天穹，电弧，弧光。；vi.形成拱状物，循弧线行进；abbr.American Red Cross. 美国红十字会

examples.en: Traders in Marble Arch are facing huge rent increases.
examples.cn: 大理石拱门的经销商们面临租金的大幅上涨。

examples.en: They walked through the arch and into the cobbled courtyard.
examples.cn: 他们穿过拱门走进铺着鹅卵石的院子。

arch.paraphrase: n.弓形，拱门，拱形物，足弓，齿弓；vt.（使）弯成拱形，用拱连接，向后弯；vi.拱起，成为弓形；adj.主要的，首要的，调皮的，淘气的

examples.en: Carbon dating provides the archaeologist with a basic chronological framework.
examples.cn: 碳元素年代测定法给考古学家提供了基本的年代框架.

examples.en: He's an archaeologist and has been on a dig in Crete for the past year.
examples.cn: 他是位考古学家，过去的一年都在参与克里特岛上的一项考古发掘工作。
