chin.paraphrase: n.（尤指人的）颏，下巴，聊天，引体向上动作；v.用下巴夹住，聊天，作引体向上动作

examples.en: Queen Mary started the fashion for blue and white china in England.
examples.cn: 玛丽女王开启了青花瓷在英格兰的流行风尚。

examples.en: China enters a new five-year plan period next year.
examples.cn: 中国明年开始进入新一个五年计划期。

china.paraphrase: n.瓷器，瓷餐具，杯、盘、碟等的总称，陶器

examples.en: He used a hammer and chisel to chip away at the wall.
examples.cn: 他用榔头和凿子铲墙。

examples.en: The vacuum flask has a strong casing, which won't crack or chip.
examples.cn: 这种热水瓶瓶身坚固，不易断裂破碎。

chip.paraphrase: n.碎片，缺口，（作赌注用的）筹码，（足球）高球；vt.刻，削成，凿，从…上削下一小片；vi.剥落，碎裂

examples.en: Meanwhile, melt the white chocolate in a bowl suspended over simmering water.
examples.cn: 同时，把碗置于微沸的水上，将白巧克力放入碗中使其熔化。

examples.en: When depressed, they dramatically overindulge in chocolate and sweets.
examples.cn: 情绪低落的时候，她们就疯狂地猛吃巧克力和糖果。

chocolate.paraphrase: n.巧克力，巧克力糖，巧克力色；adj.（含有）巧克力的，巧克力色的

examples.en: In many societies children still marry someone of their parents' choice.
examples.cn: 在许多社会，子女结婚仍然只能听从父母之命。

examples.en: Helen's choice of lipstick was a good match for her skin-tone.
examples.cn: 海伦选择的唇膏很适合她的肤色。

choice.paraphrase: n.选择，选择权，精选品，入选者；adj.上等的，精选的

examples.en: The brandy made him choke, but it restored his nerve.
examples.cn: 虽说白兰地呛了他一下，却让他恢复了勇气。

examples.en: It's enough to make them choke with apoplectic rage.
examples.cn: 足以气得让他们说不出话来。

examples.en: Many other medications have an influence on cholesterol levels.
examples.cn: 许多其他的药物治疗对胆固醇水平都有一定的影响。

examples.en: Oxidized cholesterol may be responsible for furring up the arteries.
examples.cn: 氧化胆固醇可能是造成动脉堵塞的元凶。

examples.en: Knox had taken it on himself to choose the wine.
examples.cn: 诺克斯擅自作主，选了葡萄酒。

examples.en: For added protection choose a lipstick with a sun screen.
examples.cn: 选择防晒护唇膏来增强保护。

choose.paraphrase: vt.挑选，认为…比其它更可取，决定或选定；vi.选择，进行挑选

examples.en: Sometimes they have to chop down a tree for firewood.
examples.cn: 他们有时只好砍树当柴烧。

examples.en: Roughly chop the tomatoes and add them to the casserole.
examples.cn: 把西红柿大致切一切，然后放到炖锅里。

chop.paraphrase: v.切碎，砍，向下猛击，降低，终止；n.砍，剁，排骨，掌劈，嘴周围的地方

examples.en: Caroline sang two verses and the chorus of her song.
examples.cn: 卡罗琳唱了她歌曲中的两段和副歌部分。

examples.en: "All the best," called the other typists in chorus.
examples.cn: “祝万事如意，”其他打字员齐声喊道。

chorus.paraphrase: n.合唱，合唱队，（歌曲的）副歌，合唱歌（曲）；vt.合唱，齐声背诵，异口同声地说

examples.en: Christ died on the cross.
examples.cn: 耶稣死在十字架上。

examples.en: Christ! Look at the time—I'm late!
examples.cn: 天哪！看看时间，我迟到了！

examples.en: Ethiopia'sart springs from her early Christian as well as her Muslim heritage.
examples.cn: 埃塞俄比亚的艺术起源于其早期的基督教和伊斯兰教文化遗产。

examples.en: He ignores the traditional Christian dualism between body and soul.
examples.cn: 他无视传统基督教的肉体与灵魂的二元论。

christian.paraphrase: n.基督教徒，信徒，克里斯琴，<口>人类，文明人，正派人，[电影]克里斯蒂安；adj.信基督教的，基督教的，基督教徒的，<口>人（类）的，文明的，<口>正派的，高尚的

examples.en: "Prices are down 40 per cent since Christmas," he lamented.
examples.cn: “圣诞节以来物价降了4成，”他悲叹道。

examples.en: "Will Joe be here at Christmas?" — "I expect so."
examples.cn: “圣诞节时乔会来这里吗？”——“我想会的。”

examples.en: There is a lot of chrome on cars of that model.
examples.cn: 那种牌子的汽车上涂有许多铬黄.

examples.en: Now, new models use nice, shiny chrome, hex - head screws.
examples.cn: 现在, 新的模型使用漂亮的, 有光泽的镀铬六角形镙丝.

chrome.paraphrase: n.谷歌浏览器，铬，铬合金；vt.镀以铬，用铬化合物印染

examples.en: The scientists want to locate the position of the gene on a chromosome.
examples.cn: 科学家们希望找出该基因在染色体中的位置。

examples.en: At this point esch chromosome consist of a pair of chromatids and the two associated chromosomes are termed a tetrad.
examples.cn: 此时每条染色体由一对染色单体构成,这两条联合的染色体称为四分体.

examples.en: About 4% of the prison population have chronic psychiatric illnesses.
examples.cn: 大约4%的犯人有慢性精神疾病。

examples.en: 10,000 deaths a year from chronic lung disease are attributable to smoking.
examples.cn: 吸烟导致每年有1万人死于慢性肺病。

chronic.paraphrase: adj.慢性的，长期的，习惯性的，痼

examples.en: Harry inherited the house and a sizeable chunk of land.
examples.cn: 哈里继承了这座房子以及相当大的一片土地。

examples.en: Zurich's affluence came initially from cornering a sizeable chunk of the 14th Century silk trade.
examples.cn: 苏黎世的富足最初来自于14世纪对丝绸贸易的高度垄断。

chunk.paraphrase: n.厚厚的一块，（某物）相当大的数量或部分，强壮、结实的马

examples.en: He maintained an ambivalent attitude to the Church throughout his long life.
examples.cn: 在他漫长的一生中，他对基督教信仰始终是一种摇摆不定的态度。

examples.en: He was confirmed as a member of the Church of England.
examples.cn: 他领受了坚振礼，成为英国国教会的一员。

church.paraphrase: n.[宗]教堂，[宗]教徒，[宗]教派，[宗]教会；adj.教会的，礼拜的；vt.领…到教堂接受宗教仪式

examples.en: Put your cigaret out before you put the light out.
examples.cn: 在熄灯前要把雪茄烟弄熄.

examples.en: I like having cigaret with my drink.
examples.cn: 我喝酒时喜欢抽烟。

examples.en: The product looks and burns like a regular cigarette.
examples.cn: 这种产品看起来和点燃后都与常见的香烟没什么两样。

examples.en: Over coffee, she lit a cigarette, her eyes daring him to comment.
examples.cn: 喝咖啡时，她点燃了一支烟，用挑衅的眼神看着他，谅他也不敢吭声。

examples.en: Many cinema-goers were stunned by the film's violent and tragic end.
examples.cn: 许多来看电影的人都被这部影片暴力而悲惨的结局所震惊。

examples.en: Contemporary African cinema has much to offer in its vitality and freshness.
examples.cn: 当代非洲电影在活力和新颖性上颇足称道。

cinema.paraphrase: n.电影院，电影艺术，电影业，电影

examples.en: The process is not a circle but rather a spiral.
examples.cn: 这个过程不是一个圆周运动而是螺旋上升型的。

examples.en: He is a cultured man with a wide circle of friends.
examples.cn: 他为人文雅，结交广泛。

circle.paraphrase: n.圆，圆状物，一圈，圈子；vt.圈出，包围，绕…运转；vi.环绕，盘旋

examples.en: There is an internal circuit breaker to protect the instrument from overload.
examples.cn: 内置有断路器，防止设备过载。

examples.en: He was just starting to become known on the cabaret circuit.
examples.cn: 他在卡巴莱歌舞表演圈中刚刚开始有点名气。

circuit.paraphrase: n.电路，线路，巡回，唤醒，环形道，〔电〕电流；vt.巡回，周游

examples.en: a circular tour of the city
examples.cn: 环城游览

examples.en: The crater was two miles across and roughly circular.
examples.cn: 这个火山口2英里宽,差不多是一个圆形.

circular.paraphrase: adj.圆形的，环行的，迂回的，绕行的，供传阅的，流通的；n.通知，通告，印制的广告，传单

examples.en: Merchandise can now circulate freely among the EU countries.
examples.cn: 商品现在可以在欧盟各国自由流通。

examples.en: Leave a gap at the top and bottom so air can circulate.
examples.cn: 上下各留一个口子通风。

circulate.paraphrase: vt.& vi.（使）循环，（使）流通，（使）流传，散布；vi.传送，传递，传阅

examples.en: Massage is used to relax muscles, relieve stress and improve the circulation.
examples.cn: 按摩可以使肌肉放松，缓解压力和促进血液循环。

examples.en: Circulation is much more sluggish in the feet than in the hands.
examples.cn: 脚部的循环比手部的循环缓慢得多。

circulation.paraphrase: n.流通，传播，血液循环，发行量，（某段时间的）社交活动

examples.en: There are those, you know, who, by circumstance, end up homeless.
examples.cn: 您知道，会有那么一些人，因为命运捉弄而落得无家可归。

examples.en: You might say that we've been victims of circumstance.
examples.cn: 你可以说我们一直不走运吧。

circumstance.paraphrase: n.环境，境遇，事实，细节，典礼，仪式；vt.使处于某种特定的情况之下

examples.en: It could well turn into some kind of a media circus.
examples.cn: 这很可能会演变成媒体的一场闹剧。

examples.en: She dreamed of being a bareback rider in a circus.
examples.cn: 她梦想成为马戏团中的一名无鞍马骑手。

circus.paraphrase: n.马戏，马戏团，马戏表演（常在大帐篷里进行），环形广场，（用于某些地名）圆形广场，<口>乱哄哄的热闹场面

examples.en: It would be an endless task to cite such living examples.
examples.cn: 这样的实例举不胜举.

examples.en: I can cite quite a few instances to illustrate.
examples.cn: 我可以举出好几件事来说明.

cite.paraphrase: vt.引用，引证，[法]传讯，表扬，[军事]传（或通）令嘉奖；n.<口>例证，引文

examples.en: She's Italian by birth but is now an Australian citizen.
examples.cn: 她生于意大利，但现在是澳大利亚公民。

examples.en: She became a US citizen.
examples.cn: 她成了美国公民。

examples.en: Their German peers had a more developed sense of citizenship.
examples.cn: 和他们同龄的德国人有着更强烈的公民归属感。

examples.en: Israel offers automatic citizenship to all Jews who want it.
examples.cn: 以色列为所有希望获得公民身份的犹太人敞开大门。

examples.en: Leningrad was the third alien city to offer him a surrogate home.
examples.cn: 列宁格勒是他在异地安家的第三个外国城市。

examples.en: After years of neglect and decline the city was cleaning itself up.
examples.cn: 多年的玩忽职守和经济萧条过后，这个城市在进行自我整顿。

city.paraphrase: n.城市，全市居民，（由国王或女王授予特权，通常有大教堂的）特许市，（由政府授予特权的）特权市

examples.en: There are other forms of civil disorder — most notably, football hooliganism.
examples.cn: 还有其他形式的民众骚乱，最出名的是足球流氓行为。

examples.en: The strike has taken on overtones of a civil rights campaign.
examples.cn: 罢工带上了民权运动的意味。

civil.paraphrase: adj.公民的，市民的，文明的，有礼貌的，民用的，国民间的，[法]民事的，根据民法的

examples.en: They fell into that twilight zone between military personnel and civilian employees.
examples.cn: 他们成了军队人员与平民雇员之间身份界定不清的人。

examples.en: He is in charge of the civilian side of the UN mission.
examples.cn: 他在联合国使团中负责平民方面的事务。

civilian.paraphrase: n.平民，百姓，市民，文官，民法学者；adj.民用的，平民的

examples.en: Altman asserted, "We were making a political statement about western civilisation and greed."
examples.cn: 奥尔特曼坚称，“我们那时正要发表一份关于西方文明和贪婪的政治宣言。”

examples.en: Three major narratives intertwine within Foucault'stext, "Madness and Civilisation"
examples.cn: 3个主要故事在福柯的《疯癫与文明》一书当中密切相联。

examples.en: Civilization is on the brink of apocalypse.
examples.cn: 文明已濒临毁灭的边缘。

examples.en: the technology of modern civilization
examples.cn: 现代文明的技术

civilization.paraphrase: n.文明，文化，开化，教化，修养，文明社会

examples.en: We must civilize away the boy's bad habit.
examples.cn: 我们必须教育这孩子使其改掉恶习.

examples.en: "I think it would civilize people a bit more if they had decent conditions." — "I think you've hit the nail on the head."
examples.cn: “我认为，如果人们有良好的环境，就会更有教养一点。”——“我想你说到点子上了。”

civilize.paraphrase: vt.使文明，使开化，教化，启发；vi.变得文明

examples.en: Jane is determined to stake her claim as an actress.
examples.cn: 简决心主张自己作为一名女演员的权利。

examples.en: You must claim your prize by telephoning our claims line.
examples.cn: 您必须通过拨打我们的领奖电话来领取奖品。

claim.paraphrase: vt.声称，断言，需要，索取；vi.提出要求；n.（根据权利而提出的）要求，声称，断言，索赔

examples.en: Clamp one end of the plank to the edge of the table.
examples.cn: 把厚木板的一端用夹具固定在桌子的边上。

examples.en: Ironically, the latest clamp-down has just led to renewed international criticism.
examples.cn: 让人哭笑不得的是，最近的制裁结果只是导致新一波国际社会的批评。

clamp.paraphrase: vt.& vi.夹紧，夹住，锁住，把（砖等）堆高，堆存，脚步很重地走；n.钳，夹子，压板，压铁，车轮锁，（砖等的）堆；vt.紧紧抓住，紧夹住，被抓住，被夹紧

examples.en: Let's give her a big clap.
examples.cn: 我们给她用力鼓掌.

examples.en: The captain ordered his men to clap on more sail.
examples.cn: 船长命令船员多张帆.

clap.paraphrase: vt.& vi.拍手，鼓掌，轻轻拍打某人，急速放置，振翼，拍翅膀；n.鼓掌，拍手，拍手声，噼拍声，破裂声；vi.鼓掌，拍手，啪地关上

examples.en: The aim of this initial meeting is to clarify the issues.
examples.cn: 本次初步会议的目标是澄清这些问题。

examples.en: I am happy to clarify any points that are still unclear.
examples.cn: 我愿意说明任何仍然不清楚的地方.

clarify.paraphrase: vt.& vi.使清楚，澄清；vt.（尤指通过加热使黄油）纯净，说明，使（头脑、神智等）清醒；vi.（液体）变得澄清，净化，变得清楚

examples.en: This remarkable technology provides far greater clarity than conventional x-rays.
examples.cn: 这项卓越技术的清晰度比常规的X光高得多。

examples.en: He always put his point of view with clarity and with courage.
examples.cn: 他总是清楚而勇敢地提出自己的观点。

clarity.paraphrase: n.清楚，明晰，透明，明确，清晰度

examples.en: The police said the clash was a sequel to yesterday'snationwide strike.
examples.cn: 警方说这场冲突是昨天全国大罢工的余波。

examples.en: Don't make any policy decisions which clash with official company thinking.
examples.cn: 所作的任何决策都不要和公司官方理念相冲突。

clash.paraphrase: vt.发出撞击声；vi.争论，不合，交锋，撞击出刺耳的响声；n.冲突，不协调，撞击声

examples.en: She had sat there twiddling nervously with the clasp of her handbag.
examples.cn: 她坐在那里紧张地摆弄着手提包的扣钩。

examples.en: The clasp on his belt had broken.
examples.cn: 他的皮带上的钩子已经坏了.

clasp.paraphrase: n.扣钩，扣环，握紧，拥抱；vt.& vi.扣住，紧拥，紧握

examples.en: The price includes two economy class airfares from Brisbane to Los Angeles.
examples.cn: 这一价格包括两张从布里斯班到洛杉矶的经济舱机票。

examples.en: He was not perhaps physically the strongest in the class.
examples.cn: 他可能不是全班身体最壮的。

class.paraphrase: n.班，等级，阶级，种类；vt.把…归入某等级，把…看作（或分类、归类），把…编入某一班级；adj.很好的，优秀的，出色的；vi.属于…类（或等级），被列为某类（或某级）

examples.en: "They play classic rock'n"roll,' states her boyfriend, "My dad digs them too."
examples.cn: “他们演奏经典摇滚乐，”她的男朋友说道，“我爸爸也喜欢他们。”

examples.en: During the festival, we'll be showing 13 classic oldie films.
examples.cn: 我们将在电影节期间展映13部经典老片.

classic.paraphrase: adj.典型的，传统式样的，著名的，有趣的；n.文豪，文学名著，优秀的典范，古希腊与古罗马的文化研究（尤指对其语言与文学的研究）

examples.en: A performer in evening dress plays classical selections on the violin.
examples.cn: 一名身穿晚礼服的表演者用小提琴演奏了几段古典音乐。

examples.en: The images were Gothic or Byzantine rather than classical.
examples.cn: 这些形象属哥特式或者拜占庭式而非古典式。

classical.paraphrase: adj.古典的，经典的，传统的，古典文学的，第一流的；n.古典音乐

examples.en: These things belong in a different classification.
examples.cn: 这些东西属于不同的类别.

examples.en: This is a good system for classification.
examples.cn: 这是一个很好的分类法.

classification.paraphrase: n.分类，分级，类别，（动植物等的）分类学

examples.en: Men in the post office classify mail according to places it is to go.
examples.cn: 邮局里的人员将信件按寄送地点分类.

examples.en: It is necessary initially to classify the headaches into certain types.
examples.cn: 首先，必须将头痛分为几个类型。

examples.en: His classmate do not enjoy his company because he always backbite others.
examples.cn: 他的同学不喜欢和他在一起,因为他老是在背后诽谤别人.

examples.en: He made a profession of friendship to his classmate Mary.
examples.cn: 他向他的同学玛丽表白了他的友情.

examples.en: School trips give children firsthand experience not available in the classroom.
examples.cn: 学校组织的出游能让孩子们获得在课堂上得不到的亲身体验。

examples.en: The people that she had in her classroom were beginning learners.
examples.cn: 她带的这班学生都是初学者。

classroom.paraphrase: n.教室，课堂，教学活动，教学方法

examples.en: The third clause of the contract specifies steel sashes for the windows.
examples.cn: 合同的第三款指定使用钢窗.

examples.en: The intention of the clause is clear.
examples.cn: 那条款的含义是清楚的.

examples.en: The Chancellor will try to claw back £3.5 billion in next year's Budget.
examples.cn: 财政大臣在明年的预算中将争取收回35亿英镑。

examples.en: The dogs continued to paw and claw frantically at the chain mesh.
examples.cn: 那些狗继续用爪子疯狂地抓铁丝网。

claw.paraphrase: n.（动物的）爪，（蟹等的）钳，爪形器具；vt.& vi.用爪抓（或挖）

examples.en: When the clay feels like putty, it is ready to use.
examples.cn: 黏土摸起来像油灰时，就可以用了。

examples.en: As the wheel turned, the potter shaped the clay.
examples.cn: 轮子一边转动，制陶工人一边拉坯。

clay.paraphrase: n.黏土，泥土，（相对于灵魂而言的）人体，肉体，似黏土的东西，克莱（男子名， Clayton 的昵称）；vt.用黏土处理

examples.en: They were more concerned about the dogs' welfare than a clean getaway.
examples.cn: 他们更加关心那些狗的安危，而非自己如何干净利落地脱身。

examples.en: If you kept your nose clean, you had a job for life.
examples.cn: 如果你规规矩矩，就可以一辈子都捧着这个饭碗。

clean.paraphrase: adj.干净的，无污染的，空白的，文明的；v.打扫，变干净，除去…的灰尘，清除内脏；adv.彻底地，完全地；n.打扫，清扫

examples.en: Dig over any ground that is clear of crops and plants.
examples.cn: 把没种庄稼和植物的土地都深翻一遍。

examples.en: It was clear Cohen didn't understand what Millard was driving at.
examples.cn: 看得出科恩并不明白米勒德想说什么。

clear.paraphrase: adj.清楚的，明白的，清晰的，明亮的，清澈的，明确的；adv.完全地，清晰地，整整；vi.变明朗，变清澈；vt.扫除，除去，消除（嫌疑），使清楚，使干净；n.空隙，空间

examples.en: The letter showed horribly clearly the workings of a twisted mind.
examples.cn: 那封信非常清楚地表明了一个变态者的思维方式。

examples.en: He is clearly too partisan to be a referee.
examples.cn: 他倾向性过于明显，当不了裁判。

clearly.paraphrase: adv.明亮地，明净地，明确地，显然地

examples.en: Some of the clergy refused to acknowledge the new king'slegitimacy.
examples.cn: 一部分神职人员拒绝承认新国王的合法地位。

examples.en: The military has accused the clergy of mixing religion and politics.
examples.cn: 军方指责该牧师将宗教与政治混为一谈。

clergy.paraphrase: n.（尤指基督教堂内的）牧师，教士，〈废〉学问

examples.en: A stupid medical clerk had slipped the wrong tab on his X-ray.
examples.cn: 一个蠢笨的医护人员一不留神在他的X光片上贴错了标签。

examples.en: It was strange, how invisible a clerk could feel.
examples.cn: 一名办事员会感到如此受人忽视，令人觉得不可思议。

clerk.paraphrase: n.店员，办事员，职员，书记员，<古>牧师，教士；vi.当职员，当销售员

examples.en: Even clever people are not terribly clever when put on the spot.
examples.cn: 即便是聪明人在面对难题时也未必就能表现得特别聪明。

examples.en: Rowe does a very clever riff on the nature of prejudice.
examples.cn: 罗就偏见的本质讲了一番很精辟的话。

clever.paraphrase: adj.聪明的，灵巧的，英俊的，风采优雅的，性情温良的，油腔滑调的

examples.en: There was a metallic click and the gates swung open.
examples.cn: 随着一声金属碰击的咔嗒声，大门打开了。

examples.en: Double click on the icon to open the file.
examples.cn: 双击图标打开文件。

click.paraphrase: n.喀哒声，爪，掣子，[计]（鼠标）点击，[语言学]吸气音；vt.使发出喀哒声；vi.发出喀哒声，极成功，合得来，一见如，[计]鼠击

examples.en: When her deal is done, the client emerges with her purchase.
examples.cn: 交易完成后，委托人会出现并将她购买的东西交给她。

examples.en: If anyone wants me, I'm at lunch with a client.
examples.cn: 有人找我，就说我在跟客户吃午餐。

client.paraphrase: n.顾客，当事人，诉讼委托人，[计算机]客户端

examples.en: We hiked the Grand Canyon, exploring Indian cliff dwellings.
examples.cn: 我们去大峡谷徒步旅行，探究印第安人的崖居。

examples.en: A waterfall cascades down the cliff from the hills behind.
examples.cn: 一处瀑布从身后山崖上飞流直下。

examples.en: In the present climate, owners are hanging on to old ships.
examples.cn: 在目前的形势下，船东们都不愿淘汰掉旧船。

examples.en: In this economic climate new ideas were few and far between.
examples.cn: 在这种经济环境下，新想法极为罕见。

examples.en: For Pritchard, reaching an Olympics was the climax of her career.
examples.cn: 对普里查德来说，参加奥运会是她事业上的巅峰。

examples.en: Lambing is the climax of the sheep farmer's year.
examples.cn: 一年之中，产羔期最令羊农高兴。

climax.paraphrase: n.顶点，极点，高潮，层进法，[生物学]顶极群落；vt.& vi.达到顶点，达到巅峰，使达到高潮，使达到性高潮

examples.en: She started once again on the steep upward climb.
examples.cn: 她又开始沿着陡峭的山路往上爬。

examples.en: In an embarrassing climb-down, the Home Secretary lifted the deportation threat.
examples.cn: 内务大臣尴尬地作出让步，解除了将其驱逐出境的威胁。

climb.paraphrase: v.攀登，爬，登山，上升；n.攀登，山，岩，增值，晋升

examples.en: Callaham and Liddicoet found an elevational cline in ponderosa pine from Northern California.
examples.cn: 卡拉汉和利狄柯特发现加利福尼亚北部产的黄松有一海拔渐变群.

examples.en: Such a range of variation is termed a cline.
examples.cn: 这样一个变异区域称为梯度变异.

examples.en: The birds cling to the wall and nibble at the brickwork.
examples.cn: 鸟儿们紧贴在墙上，啄着砖缝。

examples.en: She had to cling onto the doorhandle until the pain passed.
examples.cn: 她不得不抓紧门把手，直到那阵疼痛过去。

cling.paraphrase: vi.附着于，紧贴，抓紧或抱住，坚持，沿（岸）前进，贴着（墙）走；vt.依恋，依附于

examples.en: She had an operation on her knee at the clinic.
examples.cn: 她在诊所做了个膝盖手术。

examples.en: He went to a clinic to cure his drinking and overeating.
examples.cn: 他去诊所戒酒并控制饮食。

clinic.paraphrase: n.诊所，门诊部，特殊病例分析，临床讲授，临床实习课

examples.en: The BBC World Service Television news showed the same film clip.
examples.cn: 英国广播公司对外电视频道的新闻节目播放了同样的电影剪辑片段。

examples.en: They moved out from the airport at a brisk clip.
examples.cn: 他们迅速撤离机场。

clip.paraphrase: n.（塑料或金属的）夹子，回纹针，修剪，剪报；vt.& vi.用别针别在某物上，用夹子夹在某物上；vt.剪，剪掉，缩短，给…剪毛（或发）；vi.剪，修剪，剪下报刊上的文章（或新闻、图片等），迅速行动

examples.en: It might, at last, silence the small but noisy intellectual clique.
examples.cn: 它可能最终会使这个聒噪的知识分子小圈子安静下来。

examples.en: The reactionary ruling clique was torn by internal strife.
examples.cn: 反动统治集团内部勾心斗角,四分五裂.

clique.paraphrase: n.<贬>小集团，小圈子，派系；vi.结派，结党

examples.en: She was released from prison in a cloak and dagger operation yesterday.
examples.cn: 在昨天的一次秘密行动中她从监狱获释。

examples.en: They left under the cloak of darkness.
examples.cn: 他们在黑暗的掩护下离开了。

cloak.paraphrase: n.披风，斗篷，外套，借口，掩饰，覆盖物；vt.遮盖，掩盖，用外衣遮蔽

examples.en: It was just gone 7 o'clock this evening when I finished.
examples.cn: 今晚我做完的时候刚过7点。

examples.en: Outside, Bruce glanced at his watch: "Dear me, nearly oneo'clock."
examples.cn: 出了门，布鲁斯瞥了一眼自己的手表，“天哪，快一点了。”

clock.paraphrase: n.钟，时钟，计时器，秒表，仪表；vt.记录（时间或速度），测…的速度；vi.打卡，记下时间

examples.en: Rotate the head clockwise and counterclockwise.
examples.cn: 按顺时针方向转动头部，然后再逆时针旋转。

examples.en: The dance moves in a counter-clockwise direction.
examples.cn: 这支舞是按逆时针方向跳的。

clockwise.paraphrase: adj.顺时针方向的，右旋的，正转的；adv.顺时针方向转动地，右旋地，正转地

examples.en: A team from the UK were the first to successfully clone an animal.
examples.cn: 英国的一个小组率先克隆动物成功。

examples.en: At the outset they must contain several ramets of every selected clone.
examples.cn: 在开始时每个入选无性系必须包括几个无性繁殖后代.

clone.paraphrase: n.（动植物的）克隆，无性繁殖系，复制人（或动植物），（不动脑筋）机械行事的人，机器人；vt.& vi.克隆，（使某物）无性繁殖，把…培养为纯种细胞，复制

examples.en: Three mortar shells had landed close to a crowd of people.
examples.cn: 3枚迫击炮弹落在人群旁。

examples.en: Warm weather has attracted the flat fish close to shore.
examples.cn: 煦暖的气候将比目鱼引到了近海。

close.paraphrase: adj.紧密的，亲密的，亲近的；vt.关，结束，使靠近；vi.关，结束，关闭；adv.紧密地；n.结束

examples.en: Wherever they went they were closely followed by security men.
examples.cn: 不管上哪儿，保安人员都紧跟在他们身后。

examples.en: He had worked closely with the President during his governorship.
examples.cn: 他在任州长期间与总统紧密合作。

closely.paraphrase: adv.接近地，紧密地，严密地，亲近地

examples.en: It's just an old rag I had in the closet.
examples.cn: 这只不过是我挂在壁橱里的旧衣服罢了.

examples.en: She packaged up the old clothes and put them in the closet.
examples.cn: 她把旧衣服包成一包放到衣橱里.

closet.paraphrase: n.壁橱，盥洗室，议事室，密室，贮藏室；adj.隐蔽的，暗藏的，不公开的，秘密的，私下的，空谈的；vt.把…关在房间里，把…引入内室密谈

examples.en: She passed the needle through the rough cloth, back and forth.
examples.cn: 她一针一针地缝那块粗布。

examples.en: In its untreated state the carbon fibre material is rather like cloth.
examples.cn: 原始的碳纤维材料很像布料。

cloth.paraphrase: n.布，织物，一块布，用作某种用途的布，桌布，擦布，揩布，（统称）牧师

examples.en: They clothe their children in the latest fashions.
examples.cn: 他们给他们的孩子穿最时髦的服装。

examples.en: We clothe our thoughts in words.
examples.cn: 我们用语言表达思想.

clothe.paraphrase: vt.给…提供衣服，把衣服穿（在身上），<文>覆盖，赋予；v.（用语言）表达，使蒙受（耻辱），赋与…以（权力，特性等），穿衣服

examples.en: Her bed was crisply made, her clothes put away.
examples.cn: 她的床收拾得很整洁，衣服也收起来了。

examples.en: His work clothes, having become saturated with oil, had to be cleaned.
examples.cn: 他的工作服已经被油浸透，该洗洗了。

clothes.paraphrase: n.衣服，衣物，寝具；v.穿（衣）( clothe的第三人称单数)，给…提供衣服，（用语言）表达，覆盖

examples.en: Alexandra looked plump and awkward in her cast-off clothing.
examples.cn: 亚历山德拉穿着那身过时的衣裳，显得臃肿笨拙。

examples.en: In warm weather, you should wear clothing that is cool and comfortable.
examples.cn: 在热天里，应该穿凉快舒适的衣服。

clothing.paraphrase: n.衣服，服装，[航]帆装；v.覆盖(clothe的现在分词)，给…提供衣服

examples.en: The American edition of "Cloud Street" is already in its third printing.
examples.cn: 美国版的《云街》已经是第三次印刷了。

examples.en: A sudden break in the cloud allowed rescuers to spot Michael Benson.
examples.cn: 天气的突然放晴帮助救援人员找到了迈克尔·本森。

cloud.paraphrase: n.云，云状物，一团，阴影；vi.布满云，显得阴沉，看起来忧愁）；vt.使难以理解，使…朦胧不清，使减少乐趣，混淆

examples.en: Bob always enjoys sailing, even though the weather is cloudy.
examples.cn: 鲍勃总是很喜欢航行, 即使空中乌云密布.

examples.en: a grey, cloudy day
examples.cn: 灰暗多云的天空

cloudy.paraphrase: adj.多云的，阴天的，朦胧的，愁容满面的

examples.en: People at the club think very highly of him.
examples.cn: 俱乐部的人很佩服他。

examples.en: This season the club has had 73,500 season-ticket holders.
examples.cn: 本赛季该俱乐部已经有73,500名持有季票的观众。

club.paraphrase: n.俱乐部，会所，社团，夜总会，（纸牌的）梅花；vt.联合，募集，用棍棒打，[棒球]击球；vi.组成俱乐部，共同出资；adj.俱乐部的

examples.en: I hadn't a clue to the meaning of "activism"
examples.cn: 我根本不明白activism的意思。

examples.en: The vital clue to the killer's identity was his nickname, Peanuts.
examples.cn: 查明杀手身份的重要线索是他的外号叫“花生”.

clue.paraphrase: n.线索，提示，（帮助警方破案的）线索，（纵横填字谜、游戏或问题的）提示词语；vt.<非正>为…提供最新情况（消息等）

examples.en: It was a clumsy looking aeroplane.
examples.cn: 那架飞机样子很难看。

examples.en: He is still smarting over criticism of his victorious but clumsy performance.
examples.cn: 他还在为别人批评他尽管最终胜出但表现笨拙感到闷闷不乐。

clumsy.paraphrase: adj.笨拙的，复杂难懂的，得罪人的，（文体等）臃肿的

examples.en: Chinese waiters stood in a cluster, sharing a private joke.
examples.cn: 华人服务生们站在一起，讲着只有他们自己才懂的笑话。

examples.en: A cluster of vultures crouched on the carcass of a dead buffalo.
examples.cn: 一群秃鹫蹲伏在一具野牛的尸体上。

cluster.paraphrase: n.丛，簇，串，群，[语言]辅音群；vi.丛生，群聚；vt.使密集，使聚集

examples.en: I staggered and had to clutch at a chair for support.
examples.cn: 我踉踉跄跄地，不得不抓住一把椅子稳住自己。

examples.en: Laura let out the clutch and pulled slowly away down the drive.
examples.cn: 劳拉松开离合器踏板，沿车道慢慢驶离。

clutch.paraphrase: vt.抓紧，紧握，抓住，抓取；vi.试图抓住，踩离合器；adj.紧要关头的，没有手提带的；n.紧抓，控制，离合器，紧要关头

coach.paraphrase: n.教练，（铁路）旅客车厢，长途客运汽车，四轮大马车；vt.& vi.训练，辅导；vt.训练，指导；vi.作指导，受训练[辅导]，坐马车旅行

examples.en: The power stations burn coal from the Ruhr region.
examples.cn: 发电站烧的煤产自鲁尔地区。

examples.en: Acid rain is not straightforwardly attributable to the burning of coal.
examples.cn: 酸雨并非简单地由烧煤造成。

coal.paraphrase: n.煤，煤块，煤堆，木炭；vi.上煤，加煤；vt.给…加煤，把…烧成炭

examples.en: It will be able to put together a governing coalition.
examples.cn: 它将可以组成一个执政联盟。

examples.en: The Liberal leader has announced his party's withdrawal from the ruling coalition.
examples.cn: 自由党领袖已宣布该党退出执政联盟。

coalition.paraphrase: n.结合体，联合，同盟，（两党或多党）联合政府

examples.en: She spoke in a quiet voice but used remarkably coarse expressions.
examples.cn: 她说话声音很小，但是用了些特别粗俗的字眼儿。

examples.en: Using a pestle and mortar, pulverise the bran to a coarse powder.
examples.cn: 用杵和臼，将麸皮磨成粗粉。

coarse.paraphrase: adj.粗鄙的，粗糙的，粗野的，粗制滥造的

examples.en: The boat was anchored off the northern coast of the peninsula.
examples.cn: 这艘船停泊在离该半岛北部海岸不远的地方。

examples.en: The Atlantic coast is within sight of the hotel.
examples.cn: 从宾馆可以看见大西洋海岸。

coast.paraphrase: n.海岸，滑坡；vi.（汽车或自行车）（尤指不用动力向山坡下）滑行，（做事）不出力，不费力地取得成功，（不用多少动力）快速平稳地移动；vt.沿海岸航行

examples.en: I opened my coat and let him see the belt.
examples.cn: 我解开外衣，让他看那条皮带。

examples.en: He cleaned the flakes away with his coat sleeve.
examples.cn: 他用大衣袖子把碎屑掸掉。

coat.paraphrase: n.上衣，外套；vt.给…穿上上衣[外套]，盖上

examples.en: He spent a number of years hooked on cocaine, heroin and alcohol.
examples.cn: 他有好几年时间吸食可卡因和海洛因成瘾，还整日酗酒。

examples.en: She became a prostitute in order to pay for her cocaine habit.
examples.cn: 她以娼养吸。

examples.en: His hands were too weak to cock his revolver.
examples.cn: 他的手没劲儿，扳不动左轮手枪的扳机。

examples.en: He was in danger of making a real cock-up of this.
examples.cn: 他很有可能会把这事弄得一团糟。

cock.paraphrase: n.公鸡，成熟雄鸟，首领，领导，龙头；vt.使某物竖起，使某物倾斜，使朝上，扳上扳机；vi.翘起，竖起，大摇大摆

examples.en: "Tired and emotional" is a code word for being drunk.
examples.cn: “又累又激动”是形容人喝醉酒的一种委婉说法。

examples.en: I think nationalism is just a code word for racism.
examples.cn: 我认为民族主义不过是种族主义的代名词。

code.paraphrase: n.行为准则，代码，密码，法典，信号；vt.将…译成电码，编码，加密；vi.为…编码，指定遗传密码

coffee.paraphrase: n.咖啡豆，咖啡粉，（一杯）咖啡，非正式的社交集会

examples.en: The coffin had been draped in a Union Jack.
examples.cn: 灵柩上覆盖着英国国旗。

examples.en: A steady procession of people filed past the coffin.
examples.cn: 人们排成一队，一个接一个地从灵柩旁走过。

examples.en: The front cog has 44 teeth.
examples.cn: 前齿轮有44个齿。

examples.en: The wheel engages with the cog and turns it.
examples.cn: 轮子咬住轮齿并带动它转动。

cog.paraphrase: vt.& vi.（用假骰子）欺骗，行贿，（大机构中的）无足轻重的成员；n.钝齿，雄榫

examples.en: Cognitive consonance is a consistency between the knowledge , ideas and beliefs .
examples.cn: 认识一致是知识、思想和信念之间的一致。

examples.en: As children grow older, their cognitive processes become sharper.
examples.cn: 孩子们越长越大，他们的认知过程变得更为敏锐。

examples.en: The state is not a unified and internally coherent entity.
examples.cn: 该国不是一个统一的、内部团结的实体。

examples.en: Little attempt was made to integrate the parts into a coherent whole.
examples.cn: 在把各部分结合成一个连贯的整体方面几乎未作任何尝试。

coherent.paraphrase: adj.一致的，连贯的，条理分明的，清楚明白的

examples.en: The author skillfully fuses these fragments into a cohesive whole.
examples.cn: 作者将这些片断巧妙地结合成一个连贯的整体.

examples.en: the cohesive power of shared suffering
examples.cn: 共患难的内聚力

cohesive.paraphrase: adj.有黏着力的，紧密结合的

examples.en: The heated gas is piped through a coil surrounded by water.
examples.cn: 受热气体通过水中的盘管输送。

examples.en: Coil the fibre into a helix.
examples.cn: 将纤维卷绕成螺旋形。

coil.paraphrase: n.（一）卷，（一）盘，盘卷之物，线圈，纷乱，纠缠不清；vt.盘绕，卷成一圈；vi.绕成盘状，卷绕成圈

examples.en: I pulled a coin from my pocket and flipped it.
examples.cn: 我从口袋里掏出一个硬币，把它弹向空中。

examples.en: Thirteen per cent of Christie's coin and banknote auction went unsold.
examples.cn: 佳士得13%的硬币和纸币拍卖流拍。

coin.paraphrase: n.硬币，金属钱币，[建筑]拐角，墙角石；vt.制造硬币，杜撰，创造

examples.en: A referendum next year would coincide explosively with the election campaign.
examples.cn: 明年的全民公决将和竞选活动同时进行，届时局势会十分紧张。

examples.en: It's a pity our trips to New York don't coincide.
examples.cn: 真遗憾我们不能同一时间去纽约旅行。

coincide.paraphrase: vi.与…一致，想法、意见等相同，相符，极为类似

examples.en: What an odd coincidence that he should have known your family.
examples.cn: 他居然认识你的家人，真是太巧了。

examples.en: It was simply one of those things, pure coincidence.
examples.cn: 这是没办法的事，纯属巧合。

coincidence.paraphrase: n.巧合，一致，同时存在，并存

examples.en: The children kept dripping Coke on the carpets.
examples.cn: 孩子们老往地毯上滴可乐。

examples.en: "Steve, what do you want?" — "Coke, Pepsi, it doesn't matter."
examples.cn: “史蒂夫，你要喝点什么？”——“可口可乐，百事，随便啦。”

coke.paraphrase: n.焦炭，焦煤；vt.& vi.转化或者被转化为焦炭

examples.en: Basal metabolism is much lower for creatures in cold water.
examples.cn: 冷水中生物的基础代谢速度要低很多。

examples.en: Victorian houses can seem cold with their lofty ceilings and rambling rooms.
examples.cn: 维多利亚式房屋屋顶高耸，房间布局凌乱，因此可能会显得较为阴冷。

cold.paraphrase: adj.寒冷的，冷淡的，无情的，失去知觉的，[艺]有冷感的，冷色的；n.寒冷，感冒，伤风；adv.完全地

examples.en: The government is urging Japan's firms to collaborate with foreigners.
examples.cn: 政府正在督促日本的公司进行更多的海外合作。

examples.en: The work gets done more quickly when we collaborate.
examples.cn: 我们一旦合作,工作做起来就更快了.

collaborate.paraphrase: vi.合作，协作，（国家间的）协调，提携，勾结，通敌

examples.en: "The First Day" is their first collaborative album.
examples.cn: 《第一天》是他们的首张合作专辑。

examples.en: Most wikis are collaborative websites.
examples.cn: 大多数维基网站属于协同工作网站。

examples.en: Do they realize we are racing towards complete economic collapse?
examples.cn: 他们意识到我们的经济马上要彻底崩溃了吗？

examples.en: He was short of cash after the collapse of his business.
examples.cn: 在公司倒闭后，他手头缺少现金。

collapse.paraphrase: vi.折叠，倒塌，崩溃，（尤指工作劳累后）坐下；vt.使倒塌，使坍塌，使瓦解；n.垮台，（身体的）衰弱

examples.en: I hesitated, not wanting to tell tales about my colleague.
examples.cn: 我犹豫了，不想说同事的坏话。

examples.en: He was fired from his job after roughing up a colleague.
examples.cn: 他因为对一位同事动粗而被开除了。

examples.en: Like a telescope it has a curved mirror to collect the sunlight.
examples.cn: 和望远镜一样，它有一个曲面镜可以积聚阳光。

examples.en: Methane gas does collect in the mines around here.
examples.cn: 周围的矿井里的确有沼气聚积。

collect.paraphrase: vt.收集，收藏，接走，聚积；vi.募捐，募集；adj.由受话人付费的

examples.en: Chris likes music and has a large collection of albums and cassettes.
examples.cn: 克里斯喜欢音乐，收集了大量的唱片和磁带。

examples.en: Hotels operate a collection service for their guests from the airports.
examples.cn: 宾馆为客人提供机场接机服务。

collection.paraphrase: n.收集，采集，征收，收藏品，募捐

examples.en: They have been galvanised into collective action — militarily, politically and economically.
examples.cn: 他们在形势驱使下已经在政治、经济和军事上采取了联合行动。

examples.en: The country's politicians are already heaving a collective sigh of relief.
examples.cn: 该国的政界人士均已松了口气。

collective.paraphrase: adj.集体的，共同的，集合的，集体主义的；n.[统]集体，[语]集合名词，集团

examples.en: I've had the hots for him ever since he came to college.
examples.cn: 自从他来上大学后，我就对他春心萌动。

examples.en: We were in the same college, which was male-only at that time.
examples.cn: 我们那时在同一所学院，当时只招男生。

college.paraphrase: n.大学，（英国）学院，学会，（尤指必须交费的）中学

examples.en: What happens when the two interests collide will make a fascinating spectacle.
examples.cn: 两种利益发生冲突时将会上演一场好戏。

examples.en: The interests of the two countries collide.
examples.cn: 两国的利益发生冲突.

examples.en: He heard tires squeal as the car braked to avoid a collision.
examples.cn: 为避免相撞而刹车时，他听到了轮胎与地面刺耳的摩擦声。

examples.en: The two communities are now on a collision course.
examples.cn: 这两个社区之间现在有可能会发生冲突。

collision.paraphrase: n.碰撞，冲突，（意见，看法）的抵触，（政党等的）倾轧

examples.en: The colonel was rewarded with a resounding cheer from the men.
examples.cn: 士兵对上校报以震天的欢呼声。

examples.en: While he was gone she had tea with the Colonel.
examples.cn: 他不在时她跟上校一起喝了茶。

examples.en: Many Filipinos see the bases as an extension of American colonial rule.
examples.cn: 很多菲律宾人视这些基地为美国殖民统治的延续。

examples.en: Her eventful life included holding senior positions in the Colonial Service.
examples.cn: 她一生经历丰富，曾在殖民服务局担任高级职位。

colonial.paraphrase: adj.殖民地的，殖民地化的，[生]群体的，集群的，英领殖民地时期的；n.殖民地居民，殖民时代建筑

examples.en: Different animals in the colony had different manifestations of the disease.
examples.cn: 在这一群体里，这种疾病在不同的动物身上有着不同的表现。

examples.en: the American colony in Paris
examples.cn: 聚居巴黎的美国侨民

colony.paraphrase: n.殖民地，聚居地，群体，聚居人群

examples.en: He said he wanted a color-blind government where everybody's treated the same.
examples.cn: 他说想要一个对所有人一视同仁、没有种族偏见的政府。

examples.en: He denies making off-color remarks about women.
examples.cn: 他否认曾口出对女性不敬的污言秽语。

color.paraphrase: n.<美>颜色，色彩，肤色，脸色，血色，颜料，染料，本质；v.<美>给…涂颜色，改变…的颜色，粉饰，渲染，使带上色彩，脸红

examples.en: Some of the tall buildings in that city are colossal.
examples.cn: 那座城市里的高层建筑很庞大.

examples.en: Even by modern standards, the 46, 000 ton Titanic was a colossal ship.
examples.cn: 即使按照现代的标准看, 那46, 000吨的泰坦斯尼克号也是一艘巨轮.

examples.en: All colour fades— especially under the impact of direct sunlight.
examples.cn: 所有颜色都会褪色——尤其是在阳光直射下。

examples.en: The only difference between us is the colour of our skins.
examples.cn: 我们之间唯一的差别就是肤色。

colour.paraphrase: n.颜色，肤色，彩色，（用于服装、旗帜等代表团队、学校、政党或国家的）色彩；vt.（用颜料、彩色笔等）为…着色，粉饰，歪曲，使脸红；vi.变色

examples.en: I ghosted his weekly rugby column for the Telegraph.
examples.cn: 我为他代写《电讯报》每周的橄榄球专栏。

examples.en: She also writes a regular column for the Times Educational Supplement.
examples.cn: 她也定期为《泰晤士报高等教育增刊》写专栏文章。

examples.en: We went over that area with a fine-tooth comb.
examples.cn: 我们对那个地区进行了彻底的搜查。

examples.en: She bent to retrieve her comb from the floor.
examples.cn: 她弯腰从地上捡起她的梳子。

comb.paraphrase: n.梳子，梳棉机，鸡冠状的东西，蜂窝状的东西；vt.梳理，彻底搜查；vi.涌起，卷起

examples.en: They demanded a more expansionary economy to combat rising unemployment.
examples.cn: 他们要求发展扩张性的经济以应对升高的失业率。

examples.en: He never expected to return home wearing US combat fatigues.
examples.cn: 他从没想到会穿着美国军服回家。

combat.paraphrase: n.格斗，搏斗，战斗，〈美〉竞赛，比赛，论战；vt.与…战斗，与…斗争，防止，减轻

examples.en: You can cobble it together from any old combination of garments.
examples.cn: 把以前的衣服随便搭配一下就能拼凑出一套。

examples.en: They competed for power through a combination of parliamentary and extra-parliamentary methods.
examples.cn: 他们在议会内外同时下手争夺权力。

combination.paraphrase: n.结合，联合体，密码组合，连裤内衣

examples.en: Combine the flour with 3 tablespoons water to make a paste.
examples.cn: 往面粉里加3大勺水揉成面团。

examples.en: Combine the remaining ingredients and put them into a dish.
examples.cn: 把剩下的配料调和好，放到一个盘子里。

combine.paraphrase: v.使结合，使化合，兼有，用联合收割机收割

examples.en: We'll go to a meeting in Birmingham and come straight back.
examples.cn: 我们将去伯明翰参加会议，然后马上回来。

examples.en: The news will come as a great relief to the French authorities.
examples.cn: 这个消息会让法国当局大大松一口气。

come.paraphrase: vi.来，开始，出现，发生；vt.做，装扮…的样子，将满（…岁）；int.嗨！

examples.en: Sixties singing star Petula Clark is making a comeback.
examples.cn: 60年代的歌星佩杜拉·克拉克复出了。

examples.en: Romance is making a comeback. Reality is out.
examples.cn: 浪漫主义正重新流行起来，而现实主义过时了。

comeback.paraphrase: n.恢复，复原，巧妙的回答或反驳，东山再起，回归

examples.en: Actor Dom Deluise talks about his career in comedy.
examples.cn: 演员多姆·德卢西谈论自己的喜剧生涯。

examples.en: This comedy of contemporary manners is told with compassion and acid humour.
examples.cn: 这部当代风尚喜剧杂糅了悲悯的情怀和尖酸的幽默。

comedy.paraphrase: n.喜剧，喜剧性，喜剧体裁，有趣的事情

examples.en: They observed the comet for 70 days before it faded from sight.
examples.cn: 他们观察了这颗彗星70天，直至其慢慢从视线中消失。

examples.en: We were not altogether sure that the comet would miss the Earth.
examples.cn: 我们不能完全肯定彗星不会与地球相撞。

examples.en: He found comfort in Eva's blind faith in him.
examples.cn: 伊娃对他的盲目信任让他感到宽慰。

examples.en: This new design will offer undreamed-of levels of comfort, safety and speed.
examples.cn: 这种新设计将会给您带来意想不到的舒适、安全和快捷。

comfort.paraphrase: n.安慰，舒适，使人舒服的事物，给予援助或安慰的人或事；vt.安慰，使舒适，使（痛苦等）缓和

examples.en: Now sit down and make yourself comfortable. You must be very tired.
examples.cn: 现在坐下来，让自己舒服些，你一定很累了。

examples.en: In warm weather, you should wear clothing that is cool and comfortable.
examples.cn: 在热天里，应该穿凉快舒适的衣服。

comfortable.paraphrase: adj.舒适的，安逸的，处于轻松的，充裕的

examples.en: A timeless comic actor—his simplicity and his apparent ease are matchless.
examples.cn: 作为喜剧界的常青树——他的简单淳朴与自然大方无人能及。

examples.en: She has carved a niche for herself as a comic actor.
examples.cn: 她作为喜剧演员已经闯出了一片天地。

comic.paraphrase: adj.喜剧的，滑稽的，好笑的，连环画的；n.连环漫画，喜剧演员，滑稽人物，滑稽新闻

examples.en: I left a sergeant in command and rode forward to reconnoitre.
examples.cn: 我留下一名中士指挥，自己策马前去侦察敌情。

examples.en: He had authorisation from the military command to retaliate.
examples.cn: 他得到军事指挥部授权，准备反击。

command.paraphrase: n.命令，指挥，司令部，指挥部，[计算机]指令，控制力；vt.指挥，控制，命令，命令，应得，值得；vi.给出命令，命令，指令；adj.指挥的，根据命令（或要求）而作的

examples.en: A special version of "Casablanca" is being released on video to commemorate the film's 50th birthday.
examples.cn: 为纪念该片上映50周年，准备发行《北非谍影》的特别版录像带。

examples.en: A series of movies will be shown to commemorate the 30th anniversary of his death.
examples.cn: 为纪念他逝世30周年，有一系列的电影要上映。

commemorate.paraphrase: vt.纪念， 庆祝，成为…的纪念

examples.en: We commence building on March 18 th.
examples.cn: 我们于三月十八日开工.

examples.en: The meeting is scheduled to commence at noon.
examples.cn: 会议定于午间召开。

commence.paraphrase: vt.& vi.开始，着手，获得学位

examples.en: The Prime Minister's initiative has much to commend it.
examples.cn: 首相的新方案有不少令人赞许之处。

examples.en: I can commend it to him as a realistic course of action.
examples.cn: 我可以把这作为一个切实可行的处理方法推荐给他。

commend.paraphrase: vt.推荐，表扬，托付，受到赞同

examples.en: It was just a passing comment, he didn't go on about it.
examples.cn: 那只是一笔带过的评论，他没有继续论述。

examples.en: Over coffee, she lit a cigarette, her eyes daring him to comment.
examples.cn: 喝咖啡时，她点燃了一支烟，用挑衅的眼神看着他，谅他也不敢吭声。

comment.paraphrase: n.评论，注释，意见，说明；vt.& vi.评论，谈论；vt.表达意见，解释，注释；vi.作注释，作注解，作解释，作评语

examples.en: During the war, they laid an embargo on commerce with enemy countries.
examples.cn: 在战争期间, 他们禁止与敌国通商.

examples.en: leaders of industry and commerce
examples.cn: 工商界领导人

examples.en: Attacks were reported on police, vehicles and commercial premises.
examples.cn: 据报道，警察、车辆和商业经营场所均遭到袭击。

examples.en: There has always been a difference between community radio and commercial radio.
examples.cn: 社区广播电台和商业广播电台一直是有区别的。

commercial.paraphrase: adj.商业的，贸易的，营利的，靠广告收入的；n.（电台或电视播放的）广告

examples.en: This commission would keep environmental scorecards on UN member nations.
examples.cn: 该委员会将对联合国的成员国采用环境记录卡制。

examples.en: Just a few days ago, I finished a commission.
examples.cn: 就在几天前，我完成了一项委托创作任务。

commission.paraphrase: n.委员会，委员，[商]佣金，手续费，任命，委任，委任状；vt.委任，授予，使服役，使（船）服役

examples.en: It makes me sick that people commit offences and never get punished.
examples.cn: 一些人屡屡犯罪却从未受到惩戒，这真让我气愤。

examples.en: She didn't want to commit herself one way or the other.
examples.cn: 不管怎样，她都不想明确表态。

commit.paraphrase: vt.犯罪，做错事，把…托付给，保证（做某事、遵守协议或遵从安排等），承诺，使…承担义务

examples.en: He waxed lyrical about the skills and commitment of his employees.
examples.cn: 他津津乐道于员工的技能和敬业精神。

examples.en: The targets would not be achieved unless other departments showed equal commitment.
examples.cn: 除非其他部门同样努力，否则这些目标无法达成。

commitment.paraphrase: n.承诺，许诺，委任，委托，致力，献身，承担义务

examples.en: He had been on the Nobel Prize committee's list of possibles.
examples.cn: 他在诺贝尔委员会列出的获奖候选者名单之列.

examples.en: Today its executive committee voted unanimously to reject the proposals.
examples.cn: 今天执行委员会投票一致否决了这些提案。

examples.en: Money was a commodity she never thought about except in the abstract.
examples.cn: 钱对她来说就是个抽象的东西，她从不去想钱。

examples.en: The authorities took measures to roll commodity price back.
examples.cn: 当局采取措施使物价全面回降.

commodity.paraphrase: n.商品，日用品，有价值的物品，有利，有益

examples.en: Eczema is a common skin complaint which often runs in families.
examples.cn: 湿疹是一种常见的皮肤病，通常具遗传性。

examples.en: Canadian libel law is based on English common law.
examples.cn: 加拿大的诽谤法是以英国的习惯法为基础的。

common.paraphrase: adj.普通的，通俗的，[数学]公共的，共有的；n.[法律]（对土地、水域的）共有权，公共用地，普通，平民

examples.en: Simpson's much vaunted discoveries are in fact commonplace in modern sociology.
examples.cn: 辛普森的那些被大肆称赞的发现在现代社会学中实际上都不足为奇。

examples.en: It's commonplace to see people collapsing from hunger in the streets.
examples.cn: 在街上看见有人饿晕是很平常的事。

commonplace.paraphrase: adj.平凡的，陈腐的，平庸的，普通的；n.寻常的事物，平常话，口头禅，老生常谈，备忘录

examples.en: The Commonwealth Development Corporation has agreed to reschedule Tanzania's debt.
examples.cn: 英联邦开发公司已经同意推迟坦桑尼亚的债务偿还时间。

examples.en: a member of the Commonwealth
examples.cn: 英联邦成员国

examples.en: He was unprepared to co-operate, or indeed to communicate.
examples.cn: 他不愿意合作，甚至拒绝交流。

examples.en: Group members have to communicate with each other through role-play.
examples.cn: 小组成员必须通过角色扮演互相交流。

communicate.paraphrase: vt.传达，表达，显示：清晰地揭示，表明，传染：扩散；vi.通讯，交际，相连，相通

examples.en: Honeybees use one of the most sophisticated communication systems of any insect.
examples.cn: 蜜蜂之间所用的交流方式是昆虫中最为复杂的方式之一。

examples.en: She'd never received the merest hint of any communication from him.
examples.cn: 她从未得到他准备沟通的一丁点儿暗示。

communication.paraphrase: n.通讯，通信，交流，书信，传达

examples.en: Tito forged a unique model of communism after breaking with Stalin in 1948.
examples.cn: 1948年铁托在和斯大林决裂后创建了一种独特的共产主义模式。

examples.en: Our ultimate aim is to realize communism.
examples.cn: 我们的最终目的是实现共产主义.

communism.paraphrase: n.共产主义，共产主义制度

examples.en: There has always been a difference between community radio and commercial radio.
examples.cn: 社区广播电台和商业广播电台一直是有区别的。

examples.en: News of 160 redundancies had sent tremors through the community.
examples.cn: 将会裁员160人的消息在该团体中掀起了一阵骚动。

community.paraphrase: n.社区，社会团体，共同体，[生态] 群落

commute.paraphrase: vi.通勤，代偿；vt.减刑，交换，用…交换，使…变成；n.通勤来往，通勤来往的路程

examples.en: Compact discs have brought about a vast improvement in recorded sound quality.
examples.cn: 激光唱片极大地提高了录音的音质。

examples.en: He looked physically very powerful, athletic in a compact way.
examples.cn: 他看上去非常强壮，像个敦实的运动员。

compact.paraphrase: vt.& vi.压紧，（使）坚实，把…弄紧密，把…弄结实，使（文体）简洁，简化，变紧密，变结实；adj.紧凑的，简洁的，（文体等）紧凑的，小巧易携带的，（物质）致密的，（体格）结实的

examples.en: He has been her constant companion for the last four months.
examples.cn: 4个月来，他一直陪伴在她身边。

examples.en: He was not a fit companion for their skipper that particular morning.
examples.cn: 那天早晨，他没能和队长配合好。

companion.paraphrase: n.同伴，[天]伴星(=~star)，（用于书名）指南，同甘共苦的伙伴；vt.同行，陪伴

examples.en: The company I work for went through a rough patch.
examples.cn: 我所在的公司经历了一段困难时期。

examples.en: A changing world has put pressures on the corporation.
examples.cn: 日新月异的世界使这家公司感到了压力。

company.paraphrase: n.公司，商号，作伴，伴侣，客人，连队，中队，（社交）集会，聚会

examples.en: Published rates are not always directly comparable.
examples.cn: 公布的比率并不是每次都可以直接进行比较。

examples.en: By contrast, the comparable figure for the Netherlands is 16 per cent.
examples.cn: 相反，荷兰的相对数字为16%。

examples.en: After many hardships, he now lives in comparative ease.
examples.cn: 经过许多困难之后, 他现在的生活相对舒适.

examples.en: The comparative of "pretty" is "prettier".
examples.cn: pretty的比较级形式是prettier。

comparative.paraphrase: adj.比较（上）的，按比较估计的，相当的，还可以的；n.[语]（形容词或副词的）比较级形式，可匹敌者，可比拟物

examples.en: The life of the troops was still comparatively austere.
examples.cn: 军队的生活还是相对清苦的。

examples.en: She has been comparatively successful in maintaining her privacy.
examples.cn: 在保护自己的隐私方面她一直都做得比较成功。

comparatively.paraphrase: adv.对比地，相对地，比较地，有点

examples.en: The more recent conifer plantations cannot yet compare with the old woodlands.
examples.cn: 年代较近的针叶树林场还比不上年代久远的林场。

examples.en: He programmed his computer to compare all the possible combinations.
examples.cn: 他给他的计算机编制了一套程序，以比较所有可能的组合。

compare.paraphrase: vt.& vi.比较，对照；vt.比拟，喻为，[语]构成；vi.相比，匹敌，比较，区别，比拟（常与to连用）；n.比较

examples.en: The rest of the arts scene looks increasingly turgid by comparison.
examples.cn: 比较而言，艺术界的其他领域看起来越发索然无味。

examples.en: The comparison of her life to a sea voyage simplifies her experience.
examples.cn: 把她的人生比作一次海上航行不足以说明她丰富的经历。

comparison.paraphrase: n.比较，对照，[语]比喻，比较级

examples.en: Water in the engine compartment is sucked away by a hose.
examples.cn: 发动机舱里的水由一条软管抽走。

examples.en: The compartment is plenty big enough.
examples.cn: 这个隔间足够大了。

compartment.paraphrase: n.隔间（尤指火车车厢中的），区划；vt.分隔，划分

examples.en: We didn't have satnav, so the traditional map and compass took over.
examples.cn: 我们没有卫星导航系统，因此使用了传统的地图加指南针。

examples.en: Sightseers arrived from all points of the compass.
examples.cn: 观光者来自四面八方。

examples.en: This comedy of contemporary manners is told with compassion and acid humour.
examples.cn: 这部当代风尚喜剧杂糅了悲悯的情怀和尖酸的幽默。

examples.en: I feel more compassion and less anger than I used to.
examples.cn: 我觉得自己比过去多了些同情，少了些怒气。

examples.en: The new system will be compatible with existing equipment.
examples.cn: 新的系统将与现有的设备相互兼容。

examples.en: Free enterprise, he argued, was compatible with Russian values and traditions.
examples.cn: 他认为自由企业制并不违背俄罗斯的价值观和传统。

compatible.paraphrase: adj.兼容的，相容的，和谐的，协调的，[生物学]亲和的，可以并存的，能共处的

examples.en: Do you think you can compel obedience from me?
examples.cn: 你以为你能逼我服从 吗 ?

examples.en: The arguments are founded on facts and compel conviction.
examples.cn: 这些论点以事实为根据,令人不得不信服.

compel.paraphrase: vt.强迫，迫使，强制发生，使不得不

examples.en: Nothing can compensate for the loss of a loved one.
examples.cn: 失去心爱的人是无法补偿的。

examples.en: He did not have the means to compensate her.
examples.cn: 他没有钱来补偿她。

compensate.paraphrase: vt.补偿，赔偿，报酬，抵消；vi.补偿，弥补

examples.en: Haemophiliacs are seeking compensation for being given contaminated blood.
examples.cn: 血友病患者们因为被输入了受到污染的血液而正在寻求赔偿。

examples.en: The company announced a double-barreled investment and management-compensation plan.
examples.cn: 公司宣布了一份投资和管理补偿的双重计划。

compensation.paraphrase: n.补偿，赔偿，修正，补救办法

examples.en: Money should be spent on compensatory programmes for deprived pre-school and infant-school children.
examples.cn: 钱应该花在为不能享有学前班和幼儿学校教育的儿童设置的补偿教育项目上。

examples.en: The jury awarded $11.2 million in compensatory damages.
examples.cn: 陪审团裁定需要支付1，120万美元以赔偿损失。

examples.en: Schools should not compete with each other or attempt to poach pupils.
examples.cn: 学校之间不应该相互竞争，也不应该企图挖走彼此的学生。

examples.en: They are now trying to compete on an equal footing.
examples.cn: 他们现在想要公平竞争。

compete.paraphrase: vi.竞赛，竞争，比得上，参加比赛（或竞赛）

examples.en: to gain a high level of competence in English
examples.cn: 获得高水平的英语能力

examples.en: This mess is a poor reflection on his competence.
examples.cn: 这种混乱情况说明他难当此任.

examples.en: Make sure the firm is competent to carry out the work.
examples.cn: 要确保这家公司有能力完成这项工作。

examples.en: I had always considered myself a strong, competent woman.
examples.cn: 一直以来，我始终认为自己是个女强人。

competent.paraphrase: adj.有能力的，能胜任的，能干的，称职的，足够的，充足的，有决定权的

examples.en: Moreau took gold in the five-kilometre individual pursuit competition.
examples.cn: 莫罗在个人五公里追逐赛中获得金牌。

examples.en: Malvolio becomes, in default of competition, the play's moral centre.
examples.cn: 因为没有与其竞争者，马伏里奥自然成了该剧的道德核心。

competition.paraphrase: n.竞争，比赛，竞争者，[生]生存竞争

examples.en: He is respected as a very aggressive and competitive executive.
examples.cn: 他是一位锐意进取、竞争意识很强的主管，颇受尊敬。

examples.en: The betting is that the experience will make Japan more competitive still.
examples.cn: 这场经历很有可能使日本更具竞争力。

competitive.paraphrase: adj.竞争的，比赛的，（价格等）有竞争力的，（指人）好竞争的，[生化] 抑制酶作用的

examples.en: It takes years of hard work to compile a good dictionary.
examples.cn: 编辑一部好词典需要数年的艰苦工作.

examples.en: We are trying to compile a list of suitable people for the job.
examples.cn: 我们在努力编制一份适合做这项工作的人员名单。

complain.paraphrase: vi.抱怨，诉苦，申诉，控诉，抗议；vt.诉说，申诉，控告[后面常跟从句]

examples.en: A united effort is always more effective than an isolated complaint.
examples.cn: 联合行动总是比单个人抱怨更有效。

examples.en: Eczema is a common skin complaint which often runs in families.
examples.cn: 湿疹是一种常见的皮肤病，通常具遗传性。

complaint.paraphrase: n.抱怨，控诉，委屈，怨言，平平的来由，痛苦根源

examples.en: The rational and the irrational complement each other. Individually, they are far less powerful.
examples.cn: 理性和非理性是互补的。两者分开的话，力量就会小很多。

examples.en: Nutmeg, parsley and cider all complement the flavour of these beans well.
examples.cn: 肉豆蔻、西芹和苹果酒都能很好地突出这些豆子的味道。

complement.paraphrase: n.补充，补足语，补充物，补集（数）；vt.补足，补充，补助

examples.en: Two complementary exhibitions are on show at the Africa Centre.
examples.cn: 两场互为补充的展览正在非洲中心展出。

examples.en: The designer has chosen the complementary colours blue and orange.
examples.cn: 设计师选取了蓝和橙黄两种对比色。

examples.en: It'll be two years before the process is complete.
examples.cn: 这个过程需要两年才能完成。

examples.en: Telling a complete stranger about your life is difficult.
examples.cn: 要对一个素昧平生的人谈自己的生活经历是比较困难。

complete.paraphrase: adj.（用以强调）完全的，完成的，达到结尾的，完整的；vt.完成，使完满，完成或结束，填写（表格）

examples.en: He succeeded with the aid of a completely new method he discovered.
examples.cn: 借助于自己发现的一种全新的方法，他获得了成功。

examples.en: "His memory must be completely back, then?" — "Just about."
examples.cn: “这么说，他的记忆一定是完全恢复了？”——“差不多。”

completely.paraphrase: adv.完全地，完整地，完全，彻底，全部，一干二净，很，非常，充分，十分，万分

examples.en: I had a persecution complex and thought people were conspiring against me.
examples.cn: 我有过被害情结，认为大家都在密谋暗算我。

examples.en: Today's complex buildings require close teamwork between the architect and the builders.
examples.cn: 如今的建筑结构复杂，需要建筑师和施工人员密切协作。

complex.paraphrase: adj.复杂的，难懂的，复合的；n.建筑群，相关联的一组事物，情结，不正常的忧虑

examples.en: Rain water was once considered to be good for the complexion.
examples.cn: 雨水曾一度被认为可以滋养皮肤。

examples.en: She was rather fat, and her complexion was muddy and spotty.
examples.cn: 她比较胖，脸色暗淡、多斑。

complexion.paraphrase: n.肤色，面色，气色，形式，局面

examples.en: a problem of mind-boggling complexity
examples.cn: 复杂得难以想象的问题

examples.en: an organization of byzantine complexity
examples.cn: 拜占庭式复杂诡秘死板的机构

complexity.paraphrase: n.复杂性，错综复杂的状态，复杂的事物，复合物

examples.en: I do not wish to complicate the task more than is necessary.
examples.cn: 我不想使这项任务不必要地复杂化。

examples.en: To complicate matters further, everybody's vitamin requirements vary.
examples.cn: 更麻烦的是，每个人对维生素的需求量是不同的。

complicate.paraphrase: vt.使复杂化，使错综，使混乱，使卷入，变复杂；adj.复杂的，麻烦的，（昆虫的翅）纵折的

examples.en: Though off-puttingly complicated in detail, local taxes are in essence simple.
examples.cn: 虽然地税在细节上复杂得要命，但在本质上却很简单。

examples.en: His love life was complicated, and involved intense relationships.
examples.cn: 他的爱情生活很复杂，几段感情都是轰轰烈烈。

complicated.paraphrase: adj.结构复杂的，混乱的，麻烦的；v.使复杂化( complicate的过去式)

examples.en: One complication which can arise is a prolapse.
examples.cn: 可能出现的一种并发症是脱垂。

examples.en: The age difference was a complication to the rela-tionship.
examples.cn: 年龄差异使得双方交往更加困难。

complication.paraphrase: n.[医]并发症，错杂，纠纷，混乱，精神错乱

examples.en: Saying she's improved comes over as a backhanded compliment.
examples.cn: 说她进步了听起来倒像是一种讽刺。

examples.en: His lips curved up in the obligatory smile, acknowledging the compliment.
examples.cn: 他嘴边礼节性地挤出一个微笑，以示对称赞致谢。

compliment.paraphrase: n.恭维，敬意，道贺，贺词，致意；vt.向…道贺，称赞，向…致意

examples.en: They refused to comply with the UN resolution.
examples.cn: 他们拒绝遵守联合国的决议。

examples.en: The commander said that the army would comply with the ceasefire.
examples.cn: 指挥官说军队会遵守停火协议。

comply.paraphrase: vi.遵从，依从，顺从，应允，同意

examples.en: The menu is all-important. Every component of every meal should create contrasts.
examples.cn: 饭菜的安排至关重要。每一顿饭的每一道菜都应该有所不同。

examples.en: Polish workers will now be making component parts for Boeing 757s.
examples.cn: 现在波音757飞机的组成部件将由波兰工人制造。

component.paraphrase: n.成分，零件，[数]要素，组分；adj.组成的，合成的，构成的，成分的

examples.en: Protein molecules compose all the complex working parts of living cells.
examples.cn: 活细胞中所有复杂的运行成分都由蛋白质分子构成。

examples.en: Most software programs allow you to compose emails offline.
examples.cn: 大部分软件程序允许用户在脱机状态下写电子邮件。

compose.paraphrase: vt.组成，构成，调解，[印刷]排（字），使安定；vt.& vi.创作（乐曲、诗歌等），为…谱曲；vi.构图，构成

examples.en: English is a composite of many languages.
examples.cn: 英语是多种语言混合而成的.

examples.en: Spain is a composite of multifarious traditions and people.
examples.cn: 西班牙是多种传统和多个民族的合成体。

composite.paraphrase: adj.混合成的，综合成的，[建]综合式的，[数]可分解的，[植]菊科的；n.合成物，混合物，复合材料，[植]菊科植物

examples.en: the chemical composition of the soil
examples.cn: 土壤的化学成分

examples.en: He played a piece of music of his own composition.
examples.cn: 他演奏了一首自己创作的曲子.

composition.paraphrase: n.作文，作曲，创作，构图，布置，妥协，和解

examples.en: Stopping only briefly to regain her composure, she described her agonising ordeal.
examples.cn: 她只停顿了一小会儿让自己恢复平静，然后讲述了她无比痛苦的经历。

examples.en: For a minute he looked uncertain, and then recovered his composure.
examples.cn: 有一小会儿他看上去有些迟疑不定，之后又恢复了镇定。

composure.paraphrase: n.镇静，沉着，头脑镇定或沉着的状态

examples.en: This sticky compound adheres well on this surface.
examples.cn: 这种黏性的化合物能牢牢地粘在这个表面上。

examples.en: The less stable compounds were converted into a compound called Delta-A THC.
examples.cn: 不太稳定的化合物被转换成了一种叫做Delta-ATHC的化合物。

compound.paraphrase: n.场地，复合物，（筑有围墙的）院子，复合词

examples.en: Whenever she failed to comprehend she invariably laughed.
examples.cn: 每当她听不懂的时候，她总是会笑。

examples.en: They can neither read nor write, nor can they comprehend such concepts.
examples.cn: 他们不会读，不会写，也理解不了这样的概念。

examples.en: It's a devastating and barbaric act that defies all comprehension.
examples.cn: 这种行为野蛮凶残、令人震惊，简直是不可理喻。

examples.en: What Jock had done was beyond my comprehension.
examples.cn: 我无法理解乔克的所作所为。

comprehension.paraphrase: n.理解，理解力，包含的能力，[逻辑学]内涵

examples.en: There are much brighter prospects for a comprehensive settlement than before.
examples.cn: 综合性的社区具有比以前更加光明的前景。

examples.en: The Rough Guide to Nepal is a comprehensive guide to the region.
examples.cn: 《尼泊尔概况》是一本全面介绍该地区的旅游指南。

comprehensive.paraphrase: adj.广泛的，综合的，有理解力的，悟性好的，[保险业]总体担保的；n.[常用复数]专业综合考试，综合学校，综合性中学

examples.en: He never understood how to organize or compress large masses of material.
examples.cn: 他从来就不懂如何对大篇的材料进行整理或精简。

examples.en: Wood blocks may compress a great deal under pressure.
examples.cn: 木块受压时可缩小很多.

compress.paraphrase: vt.压紧，压缩，精简；n.止血敷布，打包机

examples.en: The notion that blacks comprise a problem is at the core of racist reasoning.
examples.cn: 黑人总爱惹事这一观念是种族主义论断的核心。

examples.en: Twelve departments comprise this university.
examples.cn: 12个系组成了这所大学.

comprise.paraphrase: vt.包含，包括，由…组成，由…构成

examples.en: Their problem can only be solved in a spirit of compromise.
examples.cn: 他们的问题只能通过妥协来解决。

examples.en: He would rather shoot himself than compromise his principles.
examples.cn: 他宁愿一枪打死自己也不愿违背自己的原则。

compromise.paraphrase: n.妥协，（名誉等的）损害，妥协（或折中）方案，折中物；vi.折中解决，妥协，退让；vt.违背（原则），连累，（尤指因行为不很明智）使陷入危险

examples.en: You are under no compulsion to pay immediately.
examples.cn: 没有人强迫你立刻付款。

examples.en: He felt a sudden compulsion to drop the bucket and run.
examples.cn: 他突然有一种想扔掉水桶撒腿就跑的冲动。

compulsion.paraphrase: n.强迫，强制，冲动，打动人的力量

examples.en: It is absurd to be discussing compulsory redundancy policies for teachers.
examples.cn: 讨论针对教师的强制裁员政策真是滑稽可笑。

examples.en: Unions pledged to fight any compulsory redundancies "tooth and nail".
examples.cn: 工会许诺会“竭尽所能地”阻止任何强制裁员。

compulsory.paraphrase: adj.必须做的，强制性的，义务的，必修的

examples.en: I compute my losses at 500 dollars.
examples.cn: 我估计我的损失有五百元.

examples.en: The measures we compute for a sample are called statistics.
examples.cn: 根据样本计算的量叫做统计量.

compute.paraphrase: v.计算，估算，推断，用计算机计算；n.计算

examples.en: Who wants to buy a computer from a failing company?
examples.cn: 谁愿意从一家要倒闭的公司买计算机呢？

examples.en: He programmed his computer to compare all the possible combinations.
examples.cn: 他给他的计算机编制了一套程序，以比较所有可能的组合。

examples.en: Mr Meridor's father was a comrade-in-arms of the party's founder.
examples.cn: 梅里多先生的父亲是该党创始人的战友。

examples.en: Whenever a comrade needs help, he is ready to give it.
examples.cn: 但凡同志们有困难, 他没有不热情帮助的.

examples.en: He made no attempt to conceal his dislike of me.
examples.cn: 他毫不掩饰对我的厌恶。

examples.en: Frances decided to conceal the machine behind a hinged panel.
examples.cn: 弗朗西斯决定把机器藏在带铰链的嵌板的后面。

examples.en: The organisers of the demonstration concede that they hadn't sought permission for it.
examples.cn: 游行示威的组织者承认他们并未申请批准这次活动。

examples.en: He will not concede what anything ails his business.
examples.cn: 他不允许任何事情来干扰他的工作.

examples.en: The mission could conceivably be accomplished within a week.
examples.cn: 相信这个任务能在一个星期内完成。

examples.en: So conceivably, this thing could be used to create a pandemic.
examples.cn: 因此可以想象, 这个仪器可以用来造成大瘟疫.

examples.en: Women, he says, should give up alcohol before they plan to conceive.
examples.cn: 他说女性在计划怀孕之前应该戒酒。

examples.en: You may conceive a new world in the atomic age.
examples.cn: 你可以设想出原子时代的新世界.

conceive.paraphrase: vt.& vi.怀孕，构思，想像，设想，持有；vi.怀孕，设想，考虑

examples.en: We must concentrate our energies on treating addiction first.
examples.cn: 我们必须首先集中精力治疗毒瘾。

examples.en: They will concentrate on teaching the basics of reading, writing and arithmetic.
examples.cn: 他们将集中教授阅读、写作和算术基础知识。

concentrate.paraphrase: vt.& vi.专心于，注意，集中，聚集；vt.浓缩，（使）浓缩，[采矿]汰选，选矿，精选，富集；vi.凝缩，浓缩，提纯；n.浓缩物；adj.集中起来的，经过浓缩的

examples.en: The snowcoach concept in Yellowstone provides low-impact, low-pollution access.
examples.cn: 在黄石公园里使用雪车这一想法，为人们提供了一种对环境低影响、低污染的游览方式。

examples.en: The concept of the Rose continued to inform the poet's work.
examples.cn: 玫瑰的概念持续贯穿于诗人的作品中。

concept.paraphrase: n.观念，概念，观点，思想，设想，想法，总的印象

examples.en: The other fundamental consideration in the conception of a plan is function.
examples.cn: 在构思设计图时要考虑的另一个基本因素是功能。

examples.en: The plan was brilliant in its conception but failed because of lack of money.
examples.cn: 尽管这计划构想绝妙，但终因资金不足而告流产。

conception.paraphrase: n.受精，怀孕，胚胎，概念，设想，构想

examples.en: Issues such as these were not really his concern.
examples.cn: 他其实并不关心诸如此类的问题。

examples.en: A good relationship involves concern and sensitivity for each other's feelings.
examples.cn: 一段美满的恋情需要彼此关心并体恤对方的情感。

concern.paraphrase: vt.涉及，关系到，使关心，使担忧，参与；n.关心，关系，有关，顾虑，公司或企业

examples.en: For more information concerning the club contact I. Coldwell.
examples.cn: 咨询俱乐部详情，请与I.科德维尔联系。

examples.en: The engineer and his son held frequent consultations concerning technical problems.
examples.cn: 工程师和他的儿子经常就技术问题互相征求意见。

concerning.paraphrase: prep.（表示论及）关于，就…而论；v.“concern”的现在分词，涉及，关心，顾虑，忧虑

examples.en: He wants to act in concert with other nations.
examples.cn: 他想和其他国家采取一致行动。

examples.en: In the end, we all decided to organize a concert for Easter.
examples.cn: 最终，我们一致决定组织一场复活节音乐会。

concert.paraphrase: n.音乐会，一致，和谐；vt.通过双方协议来计划或安排，调整，解决；vi.协调一致行动

examples.en: That is a great concession.
examples.cn: 这是很大的让步.

examples.en: We can not make heavy concession to the matter.
examples.cn: 我们在这个问题上不能过于让步.

concession.paraphrase: n.让步，迁就，（尤指由政府或雇主给予的）特许权，租借地，承认或允许

examples.en: Burton's text is concise and informative.
examples.cn: 伯顿的文章语言简洁，信息丰富。

examples.en: Be sure to make it clear and concise and avoid long - windedness.
examples.cn: 注意简明扼要,反对长篇大论.

concise.paraphrase: adj.简明的，简洁的，，简约，精炼

examples.en: This has made many Americans conclude that business ethics is an oxymoron.
examples.cn: 这使得很多美国人断定商业道德是个自相矛盾的说法。

examples.en: If the clubs cannot conclude a deal, an independent tribunal will decide.
examples.cn: 如果俱乐部之间无法达成协议，将由一个独立的仲裁委员会来裁定。

conclude.paraphrase: vt.& vi.结束，终止，推断，议定；vt.得出结论，缔结，推断出，决定；vi.终了，作出决定或达成协议

examples.en: Most voters believe the result is a foregone conclusion.
examples.cn: 多数投票者认为这个结果是意料之中的。

examples.en: It's almost a foregone conclusion that you'll get what you want.
examples.cn: 你将得到你想要的，这几乎是确定无疑的。

conclusion.paraphrase: n.结论，结局，断定，决定，推论

examples.en: Your decision must be translated into specific, concrete actions.
examples.cn: 你的决定必须转化为具体明确的行动。

examples.en: The builders have perched a light concrete dome on eight slender columns.
examples.cn: 建筑工人在8根细柱上架起轻巧的混凝土穹顶。

concrete.paraphrase: adj.具体的，有形的，实在的，实际的，固结成的，混凝土制的，图案诗歌的；n.混凝土，具体物，（图案式）有形诗，〔建〕钢筋混凝土；vt.使凝固，用混凝土修筑，萃取；vi.凝固，固结，变坚固，使用混凝土

examples.en: Some praise him, whereas others condemn him.
examples.cn: 有些人赞扬他, 而有些人谴责他.

examples.en: Like everyone else, I deplore and condemn this killing.
examples.cn: 我同所有人一样强烈谴责这桩凶杀案。

condemn.paraphrase: vt.（通常因道义上的原因而）谴责，宣判，宣布…不能使用，迫使…陷于不幸的境地

examples.en: Condense the mixture by boiling off some of the liquid.
examples.cn: 通过煮沸,蒸发掉一些液体,使混合液浓缩.

examples.en: We have learnt how to condense serious messages into short, self-contained sentences.
examples.cn: 我们已经学会了如何把重要的信息压缩成简短独立的句子。

condense.paraphrase: v.（使）冷凝，（使）凝结，精简，压缩

examples.en: Rust and flaking paint mean the metalwork is in poor condition.
examples.cn: 生锈和掉漆说明金属配件损毁严重。

examples.en: He was concerned with the enhancement of the human condition.
examples.cn: 他关心人类生存环境的改善。

condition.paraphrase: n.状态，环境，健康状况，条款；vt.制约，限制，使习惯于，使适应；vt.& vi.对…具有重要影响，影响（某事发生的方式），保持（头发或皮肤等的）健康，养护

examples.en: The evaluation of conduct involves some amount of generalization.
examples.cn: 对操行的评价会含有一些泛泛之论。

examples.en: In most of the residence halls we visited, rules prohibit disorderly conduct.
examples.cn: 在我们走访的学生宿舍里，大多明令禁止胡作非为。

conduct.paraphrase: vt.& vi.引导，带领，控制，传导；vt.组织，安排，实施，执行；adj.指挥，带领，护送；vi.（在乐队里）当指挥，（在公共电汽车或火车上）当售票员，指路

examples.en: The conductor brought home the full thrust of the work's emotional resolution.
examples.cn: 指挥将该作品情感上的毅然决然这一主旨充分表现了出来。

examples.en: The conductor's eyes darted to Wilfred, then fixed on Michael again.
examples.cn: 乐队指挥飞快地扫了威尔弗雷德一眼，然后视线又落回到迈克尔身上。

conductor.paraphrase: n.<电>导体，售票员，（乐队）指挥，导管（套管的一种）

examples.en: She withdrew to confer with her advisers before announcing a decision.
examples.cn: 她先去请教顾问然后再宣布决定.

examples.en: He withdrew to confer with his teacher before announcing a decision.
examples.cn: 他先去请教他的老师然后再宣布决定.

confer.paraphrase: vt.授予，颁与，比较，对照；vi.商议，磋商

examples.en: He went even further in his speech to the conference.
examples.cn: 他在大会发言中作了更进一步的阐述。

examples.en: But at the annual party conference he always made the right noises.
examples.cn: 但在每年政党会议上，他总是随声附和。

conference.paraphrase: n.会议，讨论，（正式）讨论会，[工会、工党用语]（每年的）大会；vi.举行或参加（系列）会议

examples.en: I must confess I'm not a great enthusiast for long political programmes.
examples.cn: 我必须承认自己对时间很长的政治节目不是很热衷。

examples.en: Let us now confess our sins to Almighty God.
examples.cn: 现在让我们向上帝忏悔我们的罪恶。

examples.en: He walked towards the summerhouse, at first furtively, then with more confidence.
examples.cn: 他朝凉亭走去，开始还偷偷摸摸地，后来就壮大了胆子。

examples.en: He has never exhibited the self-confidence, bordering on arrogance, of his predecessor.
examples.cn: 他从未表现出他前任的那种近乎傲慢的自信。

confidence.paraphrase: n.信心，信任，秘密；adj.骗得信任的，欺诈的

examples.en: If there has to be a replay we are confident of victory.
examples.cn: 如果重新比赛，我们有信心取得胜利。

examples.en: She has now changed into a happy, self-confident woman.
examples.cn: 如今她已经变成一个快乐、自信的女人。

confident.paraphrase: adj.确信的，深信的，有信心的，沉着的，大胆的，过分自信的，厚颜无耻的；n.知己，心腹朋友

examples.en: From time to time he passed on confidential information to him.
examples.cn: 他时不时告诉他一些机密信息。

examples.en: National security is the stock excuse for keeping things confidential.
examples.cn: 国家安全常被用作对一些事情保密的挡箭牌。

confidential.paraphrase: adj.秘密的，机密的，表示信任的，亲密的

examples.en: He thinks it cruel to confine a lark in a cage.
examples.cn: 他认为把云雀关在笼子里太残忍了.

examples.en: Doctors are trying to confine the disease within the city.
examples.cn: 医生正试图将此病控制在城内.

confine.paraphrase: vt.限制，局限于，禁闭，管制；n.界限，范围，国界

examples.en: Earlier reports were unable to confirm that there were any survivors.
examples.cn: 早先的报道无法证实是否有幸存者。

examples.en: His new role could confirm him as one of our leading actors.
examples.cn: 他的新角色会确保他跻身我们的一流演员之列。

confirm.paraphrase: vt.[法]确认，批准，证实，使有效，使巩固

examples.en: They took her resignation from Bendix as confirmation of their suspicions.
examples.cn: 他们认为她从本迪克斯公司辞职证实了他们的怀疑。

examples.en: Here, graphically displayed, was confirmation of the entire story.
examples.cn: 通过这里形象的展示证实了整件事的真实性。

examples.en: The time has come to put an end to the conflict.
examples.cn: 结束冲突的时候到了。

examples.en: The ethnic populations are so intermingled that there's bound to be conflict.
examples.cn: 各民族人口如此杂居，肯定会发生冲突。

conflict.paraphrase: n.冲突，战斗，相互干扰，矛盾；vi.抵触，争斗，战斗，冲突

examples.en: Many children who can't or don't conform are often bullied.
examples.cn: 很多不能或不按规矩行事的小孩常常被人欺负。

examples.en: Taxis must conform to the rigorous standards laid down by the police.
examples.cn: 出租车必须遵守警方的严格规定。

conform.paraphrase: vi.符合，遵照，适应环境；vt.使遵守，使一致，使顺从；adj.一致的，顺从的

examples.en: The choice of Governor may confound us all.
examples.cn: 州长的选择可能会让我们所有人感到困惑。

examples.en: Don't confound the means with the ends.
examples.cn: 不要使手段与目的混淆不清.

confound.paraphrase: vt.使混淆，使混乱，挫败，诅咒

examples.en: NATO countries have been forced to confront fundamental moral questions.
examples.cn: 北约国家被迫正视基本的道德问题。

examples.en: We are learning how to confront death instead of avoiding its reality.
examples.cn: 我们在学习如何直面死亡，而非回避死亡这一现实。

confront.paraphrase: vt.面对，使面对面，使对质，碰到，遇到，比较

examples.en: This could pitch the government into confrontation with the work-force.
examples.cn: 这有可能把政府推向与工人正面交锋的境地。

examples.en: He had ducked the confrontation with United Nations inspectors last summer.
examples.cn: 去年夏天他避开了与联合国核查人员的对峙。

examples.en: I think it's a serious mistake to confuse books with life.
examples.cn: 我认为把书本同生活混为一谈是大错特错。

examples.en: This is an attempt to confuse form and [ with ] substance.
examples.cn: 这是企图把形式同实质混 淆.

confuse.paraphrase: vt.使困窘，使混乱，使困惑，使更难于理解；vi.使糊涂

examples.en: His mind was a haze of fear and confusion.
examples.cn: 由于害怕和困惑，他当时处于一种混沌状态。

examples.en: His people had fallen further and further into a quagmire of confusion.
examples.cn: 他的人民在混乱不安的泥潭里越陷越深。

examples.en: The congestion in the city gets even worse during the summer.
examples.cn: 夏天城市交通阻塞尤为严重.

examples.en: Energy consumption, congestion and pollution have increased.
examples.cn: 能源消耗、交通堵塞以及污染状况愈加严重。

congestion.paraphrase: n.拥挤，堵车，阻塞，充血，（人口）过剩，稠密

examples.en: He was generous enough to congratulate his successor on his decision.
examples.cn: 他十分大度地祝贺他的继任者做出了决定。

examples.en: Waterstone has every reason to congratulate himself.
examples.cn: 沃特斯通完全有理由为自己感到高兴。

congratulate.paraphrase: vt.向（某人）道贺，祝贺，（为成就或成功）感到高兴

examples.en: We have received many letters of congratulation.
examples.cn: 我们收到了很多贺信。

examples.en: The letter arrived in congratulation of my graduation from the university.
examples.cn: 我收到了大学毕业的贺信.

examples.en: The African National Congress threatened to withdraw from the talks.
examples.cn: 非洲国民大会威胁要退出会谈。

examples.en: Eisenhower used his muscle to persuade Congress to change the law.
examples.cn: 艾森豪威尔用他的影响力说服国会修改了该项法律。

congress.paraphrase: n.国会，代表大会，（用于某些国家的政党名称）国民大会，社交；vi.开会，集合

examples.en: Two or more sentences may be joined together by a conjunction.
examples.cn: 两个或两个以上的句子可以用连词连接.

examples.en: The conjunction of low inflation and low unemployment came as a very pleasant surprise.
examples.cn: 低通货膨胀与低失业的同时出现是一大惊喜。

conjunction.paraphrase: n.连词，连接，联合，结合物，（恒星、行星等的）合

examples.en: Two cables connect to each corner of the plate.
examples.cn: 两条电缆连到金属板的每个角上。

examples.en: You can connect the machine to your hi-fi.
examples.cn: 你可以把机器连在高保真音响上。

connect.paraphrase: vt.连接，联结，使…有联系，为…接通电话，插入插座；vi.连接，建立关系，[体]成功击中

examples.en: 13 men have been questioned in connection with the murder.
examples.cn: 有13名男子因谋杀案受到盘问。

examples.en: The minister denied there was a direct connection between the two issues.
examples.cn: 部长否认两者之间有直接的联系。

connection.paraphrase: n.连接，联系，关系，连接点，亲戚

examples.en: Syntactics is a subject to study abstract formal connexion among the signs.
examples.cn: 符号学是研究符号之间的抽象形式联系的学科.

examples.en: The casual reader, in Britain or America, thinks of Poe in connexion with certain gripping stories.
examples.cn: 英国和美国的普通读者一想到波就联想到一些扣人心弦的故事.

examples.en: "Urchin", with its connotation of mischievousness, may not be a particularly apt word.
examples.cn: urchin有淘气的含义，可能不是一个特别恰当的词。

examples.en: A possible connotation of " home " is a place of warmth, comfort and affection ".
examples.cn: “ 家 ” 的可能涵义是“一个温暖 、 舒适和爱的地方 ”.

connotation.paraphrase: n.内涵，含义，言外之意，[逻辑学]内涵

examples.en: I was certain that love was quite enough to conquer our differences.
examples.cn: 我相信爱足以克服我们的种种差异。

examples.en: They feared that totalitarians might yet conquer the entire world.
examples.cn: 他们担心极权主义者会征服整个世界。

conquer.paraphrase: vt.征服，攻克，打败（敌人），克服；vi.得胜，胜利

examples.en: The chase is always much more exciting than the conquest anyway.
examples.cn: 不管怎么说，追求的过程总比得手更为刺激。

examples.en: He was telling his tales of conquest in clubland.
examples.cn: 当时他正在大讲特讲自己在夜总会的征服史。

conquest.paraphrase: n.征服，击败，战利品，（尤指）爱情的俘虏，赢得（物）

examples.en: The Daily Mail has the headline "The Voice of Conscience"
examples.cn: 《每日邮报》的头版标题为“良知的声音”。

examples.en: I'm so glad he had a pang of conscience.
examples.cn: 我很高兴他会有负疚感。

examples.en: The conscientious researcher is careful to avoid up the pole and omission.
examples.cn: 那位一丝不苟的研究人员总是小心谨慎地避免错误或疏漏.

examples.en: He was quiet, conscientious, a bit of a plodder.
examples.cn: 他做事闷声不响，小心谨慎，有点死气沉沉的。

conscientious.paraphrase: adj.认真负责的，本着良心的，谨慎的，正大光明

examples.en: Connors reigned as the world No. 1 for 159 consecutive weeks.
examples.cn: 康纳斯连续159周排名世界第一。

examples.en: She was within sight of Navratilova'srecord of seventy-four consecutive wins.
examples.cn: 她已经逼近了纳夫拉蒂洛娃74连胜的纪录。

consecutive.paraphrase: adj.连续的，连贯的，[语]表示结果的

examples.en: Consensus need not be weak, nor need it result in middle-of-the-road policies.
examples.cn: 一致的意见不一定就没有影响力，也不一定就会导致走中间路线的政策。

examples.en: I realize there's no consensus on what are male or female values.
examples.cn: 我意识到人们对什么是男性价值观和什么是女性价值观并无共识。

consensus.paraphrase: n.一致，舆论，一致同意，合意

examples.en: At approxi-mately 11:30 p.m., Pollard finally gave his consent to the search.
examples.cn: 大概晚上11点半的时候，波拉德最终同意进行搜查。

examples.en: He left the company by mutual consent last September.
examples.cn: 去年9月，经双方同意，他离开了公司。

consent.paraphrase: n.准许，赞同，同意，（意见等的）一致；vi.同意，赞成，赞同，允许

consequence.paraphrase: n.结果，成果，[逻]结论，重要性，推论

examples.en: The changes in social work consequent upon reorganization have been considerable.
examples.cn: 重组引起社会福利工作发生了重大变化。

examples.en: Overproduction and consequent low market prices for wine caused economic tremors.
examples.cn: 葡萄酒生产过剩及由此造成的市价低迷引起了经济波动。

consequent.paraphrase: adj.随之发生的，必然的，合乎逻辑的，继起的，[地]顺向的；n.结果，[逻]后件，结论，[数]后项，[语]（条件结构中的）结果子句

examples.en: They had children and were consequently tied to the school holidays.
examples.cn: 他们有孩子，当然就受学校假期的束缚。

examples.en: She was a bright and eager student and, consequently, did well in school.
examples.cn: 她是个聪明好学的学生, 因此学习成绩很好.

consequently.paraphrase: adv.所以，因此，因此，因而，终于，这样，合乎逻辑的推论是

examples.en: In time these new excavations will require conservation.
examples.cn: 这些刚发掘出来的物品需要及时保护。

examples.en: He is founding director of The Conservation Foundation.
examples.cn: 他是自然资源保护基金会的创办负责人。

conservation.paraphrase: n.保存，保护，避免浪费，对自然环境的保护

examples.en: In recent months many conservative politicians have jumped on the anti-immigrant bandwagon.
examples.cn: 最近几个月，很多保守政客都搭上了“反移民”这班车。

examples.en: The opposition Conservative Party put a different interpretation on the figures.
examples.cn: 反对党保守党对这些数字提出一番不同的解释。

conservative.paraphrase: n.保守的人，（英国）保守党党员，保守党支持者；adj.保守的，（英国）保守党的，（式样等）不时新的

examples.en: They had to conserve the candles now with winter upon them.
examples.cn: 冬天眼看就要到了，他们不得不把蜡烛省着用。

examples.en: Help to conserve energy by insulating your home.
examples.cn: 对房屋做隔热处理来帮助节约能源。

conserve.paraphrase: vt.保护，保藏，保存，[化，物]使守恒，将…做成蜜饯；n.果酱，蜜饯

examples.en: The jury will retire to consider its verdict today.
examples.cn: 陪审团今天将退庭商议裁决结果。

examples.en: After a year we will sympathetically consider an application for reinstatement.
examples.cn: 一年后我们会对复职申请予以考虑和批准。

consider.paraphrase: vt.& vi.考虑，把（某人，某事）看作…，认为（某人，某事）如何，考虑，细想；vt.考虑，认为，看重，以为；vi.仔细考虑，深思

examples.en: He brought to the job not just considerable experience but passionate enthusiasm.
examples.cn: 他不仅给这一工作带来了不少经验，而且倾注了极大的热情。

examples.en: Shares and bonds can bring one quite a considerable additional income.
examples.cn: 股票和债券能给人带来不菲的额外收入。

considerable.paraphrase: adj.相当大（或多）的，该注意的，应考虑的

examples.en: We have all wished for men who are more considerate.
examples.cn: 我们都曾祈求能找到更加体贴的男人。

examples.en: The patient has the right to considerate and respectful care.
examples.cn: 病人有权得到周到而礼貌的照顾。

considerate.paraphrase: adj.体贴的，体谅的，深思熟虑，到，慎重

examples.en: The Board is scrupulous in its consideration of all applications for licences.
examples.cn: 委员会对所有申请许可证的人予以审慎考虑。

examples.en: The other fundamental consideration in the conception of a plan is function.
examples.cn: 在构思设计图时要考虑的另一个基本因素是功能。

consideration.paraphrase: n.考虑，考察，照顾，关心，报酬，尊敬

examples.en: The division will consist of two tank companies and one infantry company.
examples.cn: 这个师的组成部队将包括两个坦克连和一个步兵连。

examples.en: The development will consist of 66 dwellings and a number of offices.
examples.cn: 新建楼区将由66栋住房和一些办公用房组成。

consistent.paraphrase: adj.一致的，连续的，不矛盾的，坚持的

examples.en: I can console myself with the fact that I'm not alone.
examples.cn: 不是只有我一个人才这样，我可以用这一事实来安慰自己。

examples.en: Nothing could console him when his wife died.
examples.cn: 他妻子去世后，什么事情也不能使他感到宽慰。

console.paraphrase: vt.安慰，慰问；n.控制台，操纵台，演奏台，悬臂，肘托

examples.en: We've made a good start, now it's time to consolidate.
examples.cn: 我们有了一个良好的开端, 现在应该加以巩固.

examples.en: Judge Charles Schwartz is giving the state 60 days to disband and consolidate Louisiana's four higher education boards.
examples.cn: 查尔斯·施瓦茨法官将给路易斯安那州60天时间来解散然后合并该州的4个高等教育委员会。

consolidate.paraphrase: vt.把…合成一体，合并，巩固，加强，统一，合计金额；vi.统一，合并，联合

examples.en: You may feel tearful in situations where you feel conspicuous.
examples.cn: 觉得自己身处众目睽睽之下时，你可能会有想哭的感觉。

examples.en: Mary's red hair always made her conspicuous at school.
examples.cn: 玛丽的红头发在学校里总是很惹眼。

conspicuous.paraphrase: adj.明显的，显而易见的，惹人注意的，显目

examples.en: Did you ever swallow the conspiracy theory about Kennedy?
examples.cn: 你有没有轻信过有关肯尼迪总统遇刺的阴谋论？

examples.en: At first, he was blissfully unaware of the conspiracy against him.
examples.cn: 起初，他幸好不知道那些针对他的阴谋。

examples.en: It's a constant struggle to try to keep them up to par.
examples.cn: 要让他们达标，需要不断努力。

examples.en: Constant wheelchair use will scuff almost any floor surface.
examples.cn: 任何地板上经常有轮椅走动几乎都会有所磨损。

constant.paraphrase: adj.不断的，持续的，永恒的，始终如一的，坚定，忠实的；n.[数]常数，常量，不变的事物，永恒值

examples.en: We are constantly being reminded to cut down our fat intake.
examples.cn: 不断有人提醒我们要减少脂肪的摄入量。

examples.en: He developed a nervous twitch and began to blink constantly.
examples.cn: 他身体出现了神经性抽搐，开始不停地眨眼睛。

constantly.paraphrase: adv.不断地，时常地，时刻，常川，历来

examples.en: Over time, the protein in the eggshell breaks down into its constituent amino acids.
examples.cn: 时间久了，蛋壳中的蛋白质就会分解为其构成成分氨基酸。

examples.en: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
examples.cn: 宪法还赋予巴西的25个成员州很大的权力。

constituent.paraphrase: n.选民，成分，构成部分，委托人；adj.构成的，组成的，选举的，有选举权的

examples.en: Testing patients without their consent would constitute a professional and legal offence.
examples.cn: 未经患者同意而对其进行检查被视为违反职业操守并触犯法律。

examples.en: Motherhood did not constitute much of an interruption to her career.
examples.cn: 做母亲并没有在很大程度上中断她的事业。

constitute.paraphrase: vt.构成，组成，制定，设立，等同于，指派

constitution.paraphrase: n.建立，组成，体格，构成方式，宪法

examples.en: Ministers took the floor to denounce the decision to suspend constitutional rule.
examples.cn: 几位部长发言谴责暂停宪制的决定。

examples.en: It is only an Elastoplast solution to a far greater constitutional pro-blem.
examples.cn: 对于一个非常严重的宪法问题来说，这只是个暂时的解决方案。

constitutional.paraphrase: adj.宪法的，符合宪法的，本质的，体质上的，保健的；n.保健运动，保健散步

examples.en: It's the capacity of those roads which is going to constrain the amount of travel by car that can take place.
examples.cn: 制约驾车出行量的将会是那些道路的通行能力。

examples.en: If they can, constrain him to belong to their desperate odd - fellow society.
examples.cn: 要是可能, 还要强迫他参加他们无可救药的畸形社会.

examples.en: Any attempt to construct an ideal society is foredoomed to failure.
examples.cn: 任何构建理想社会的努力都注定要失败。

examples.en: How many man - days will be needed to construct this irrigation canal?
examples.cn: 修这条渠道要多少人工?

construct.paraphrase: vt.修建，建造，构成，创立，[数]作图；n.结构（物），构想，概念

examples.en: Check the actual construction of the chair by looking underneath.
examples.cn: 看看椅子的下面，检查一下它的实际构造。

examples.en: The construction industry is no longer as depressed as it was.
examples.cn: 建筑业不再像以往那样萧条了。

construction.paraphrase: n.建筑物，建造，解释，建造物

examples.en: A consul's duty is to help his own nationals.
examples.cn: 领事的职责是帮助自己的同胞.

examples.en: the British consul in Miami
examples.cn: 英国驻迈阿密领事

consul.paraphrase: n.领事，（古罗马共和国时期）执政官

examples.en: She began to consult doctors, and each had a different diagnosis.
examples.cn: 她开始四处寻医，但每个医生的诊断都不相同。

examples.en: It is recommended that you should consult your doctor.
examples.cn: 建议你去咨询医生。

consult.paraphrase: vi.商议，商量，[医]会诊，咨询，充当顾问；vt.请教，翻阅，求教于，顾及

examples.en: Shirley's brother is now a consultant heart surgeon in Sweden.
examples.cn: 雪利的兄弟现在在瑞典做心脏外科高级顾问医师。

examples.en: He was consultant rheumatologist at the Royal Hampshire Hospital.
examples.cn: 他是皇家汉普郡医院的风湿病学顾问。

consultant.paraphrase: n.（受人咨询的）顾问，会诊医生，（顾问）医生，求教者，（与人）商议者，征求意见者，查阅者，咨询者

examples.en: Earthworms consume large amounts of soil, and produce a rich humus, perfect in texture.
examples.cn: 蚯蚓吃下大量土壤，排出肥力丰富、物理结构理想的腐殖质。

examples.en: Classically, overweight people underestimate the volume of food that they consume.
examples.cn: 一般来说，超重的人往往低估自己摄入食物的量。

consume.paraphrase: vt.消耗，消费，耗尽，毁灭，吃光，喝光，烧毁

examples.en: The Treasury has long been predicting an upturn in consumer spending.
examples.cn: 财政部早就预测消费者支出会出现上扬。

examples.en: Once wholesale prices are deregulated, consumer prices will also rise.
examples.cn: 一旦批发价格放开，零售价格也会随之上涨。

consumer.paraphrase: n.消费者，顾客，[生态]取食者，食物链中以其他生物为食物的生物

examples.en: Most of the wine was unfit for human consumption.
examples.cn: 这些酒中大部分都不适于人类饮用。

examples.en: Ethiopia has almost the lowest oil consumption per capita in the world.
examples.cn: 埃塞俄比亚的人均石油耗费量几乎是全世界最低的。

consumption.paraphrase: n.消费，肺病，耗尽，[医学]消耗性疾病

examples.en: He made contact with someone with an idea for reconditioning laser copiers.
examples.cn: 他联系了一个会修理激光复印机的人。

examples.en: The college has brought me into contact with western ideas.
examples.cn: 上大学使我接触了西方的思想。

contact.paraphrase: n.接触，触点，[医]（传染病）接触人，门路；vt.使接触，与…联系，与…通讯（或通话）；vi.联系，接触

examples.en: Scarlet fever is highly contagious.
examples.cn: 猩红热的接触传染性很强。

examples.en: It's a highly contagious infection.
examples.cn: 这种病极易传染.

contagious.paraphrase: adj.有传染性的，传染病的，有感染力的，会蔓延的

examples.en: Our range of herbal teas contain no preservatives, colourings or artificial flavourings.
examples.cn: 我们这一系列的药草茶不含防腐剂、色素以及人工调味品。

examples.en: She bought a travel-bag large enough to contain the film canisters.
examples.cn: 她买了一只能装得下那些胶卷筒的旅行包。

contain.paraphrase: vt.包含，容纳，克制，遏制，牵制，包括或由…构成

examples.en: Place them in a jam jar, porcelain bowl, or other similar container.
examples.cn: 将它们装入果酱罐、瓷碗或其他类似容器中。

examples.en: The container is invisible until you shine an ultraviolet light on it.
examples.cn: 那个柜子只有用紫外线照射才可以看见。

examples.en: The sources of organisms that may contaminate the wound are numerous.
examples.cn: 可以沾染伤口的细菌来源是很多的.

examples.en: One secret military unit tried to contaminate the drinking water of the refugees.
examples.cn: 一个秘密军事分队企图污染难民的饮用水。

contaminate.paraphrase: vt.弄脏，污染，损害，毒害；vi.玷污，毒害，腐蚀（人的思想或品德）；adj.〈古〉污染的

examples.en: We don't contemplate his [ him ] opposing our plan.
examples.cn: 我们预料他不会反对我们的计划.

examples.en: The possibility of war is too horrifying to contemplate.
examples.cn: 战争的可能性太可怕了,真不堪细想.

contemplate.paraphrase: vt.注视，凝视，盘算，计议，周密考虑；vi.沉思，深思熟虑

contemporary.paraphrase: adj.当代的，现代的，同时代的，同属一个时期的；n.同代人，同辈人，同龄人，当代人

examples.en: The attacker still stood there, watching her with silent contempt.
examples.cn: 袭击者还站在那里，用一种鄙夷的眼神一言不发地看着她。

examples.en: In showing contempt for the heavyweight championship Douglas offended a stern code.
examples.cn: 道格拉斯藐视重量级拳王称号的行为违背了严格的准则。

contempt.paraphrase: n.轻视，轻蔑，（对规则、危险等的）藐视，不顾

examples.en: It is time, once again, to contend with racism.
examples.cn: 又一次到了与种族主义战斗的时刻了。

examples.en: His firm must contend with the unwieldy Russian bureaucracy.
examples.cn: 他的公司必须与俄罗斯庞大的官僚机构周旋。

contend.paraphrase: vi.争夺，竞争，奋斗，争斗；vt.声称，主张，争论，争辩，斗争，战斗

examples.en: There are reports of widespread dis-content in the capital.
examples.cn: 有报道称首都弥漫着不满的情绪。

examples.en: Not content with rescuing one theatre, Sally Green has taken on another.
examples.cn: 萨莉·格林不满足于挽救一家剧院，她又接手了另外一家。

content.paraphrase: n.内容，（书等的）目录，满足，容量

examples.en: He was in contention for a place in the European championship squad.
examples.cn: 他有望在欧洲锦标赛代表队中获得一席之地。

examples.en: A particular source of contention is plans to privatise state-run companies.
examples.cn: 发生争执的一个根源就是国营公司的私有化方案。

examples.en: This has stripped the contest down to its essentials.
examples.cn: 这就使比赛精简到最基本的环节。

examples.en: The latest opinion polls are predicting a very close contest.
examples.cn: 最近的民意测验预测竞争将会非常激烈。
