contest.paraphrase: vt.竞争，为…而奋争，辩驳；vi.争斗，竞争，争夺

examples.en: It is important that we put Jesus into the context of history.
examples.cn: 我们将耶稣置于历史环境中来看是很重要的。

examples.en: Taxation is not popular in principle, merely acceptable in context.
examples.cn: 征税基本上是不受欢迎的，在一定情境中才勉强为人接受。

examples.en: The title track is a pointed meditation on a continent gone wrong.
examples.cn: 主打歌是对一个误入歧途的大陆的深刻沉思。

examples.en: The American continent's geography severely limited the lines of attack.
examples.cn: 美洲大陆的地形严重限制了进攻路线。

continent.paraphrase: n.大陆，陆地，欧洲大陆，<美>北美洲大陆；adj.自制的，克制的，节欲的，贞洁的，禁欲的

examples.en: The school has been in continual use since 1883.
examples.cn: 自1883年以来，该校从未停办过。

examples.en: She finds the continual confrontation very wearing.
examples.cn: 她发现持续的对峙让人精疲力竭。

continual.paraphrase: adj.不间断的，不停的，多次重复的，频繁的

examples.en: Japanese camera makers continually introduce whizzy new electronic models.
examples.cn: 日本的相机制造商不断推出最新的电子模型。

examples.en: Sarah had been plagued continually by a series of minor illnesses.
examples.cn: 萨拉一直小病缠身。

continually.paraphrase: adv.不停地，持续地，屡屡地，一再地

examples.en: The President could continue to bash Democrats as being soft on crime.
examples.cn: 总统可能会继续抨击民主党人对待犯罪活动心慈手软。

examples.en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.--Winston Churchill
examples.cn: 成功不是终点，失败也并非末日，最重要的是继续前进的勇气。

continue.paraphrase: vi.持续，逗留，维持原状；vt.延期，使延伸，使持续，继续说

examples.en: At the horizon the land mass becomes a continuous pale neutral grey.
examples.cn: 陆地在地平线处变成了一片浅灰。

examples.en: Under TQM principles the search for quality is continuous.
examples.cn: 在全面质量管理原则下，对质量的追求是持续不断的。

examples.en: That contract proved to be a millstone around his neck.
examples.cn: 那个合同结果成了他的一个负担。

examples.en: A formal contract is signed which is renewable annually.
examples.cn: 正式签订了每年可续签的合同。

examples.en: "Don't contradict your mother," was Charles's sharp reprimand.
examples.cn: “不要和你妈妈顶嘴，”查尔斯严厉地斥责道。

examples.en: She waxes righteously indignant if anyone tries to contradict her.
examples.cn: 如果有人想反驳她,她说起话来就会义愤填膺.

contradict.paraphrase: vt.反驳，驳斥，否认，与…矛盾，与…抵触；vi.反驳，否认，发生矛盾

examples.en: Several of those present, including Weinberger, had contrary information.
examples.cn: 几个在场的人，包括温博格，所掌握的信息截然不同。

examples.en: Contrary to popular belief, moderate exercise actually decreases your appetite.
examples.cn: 与通常的看法相反，适度的运动事实上会降低食欲。

contrary.paraphrase: adj.相反的，违反的，反对的，对立的，顽固的，任性的；n.对立或相反的事物，对立方，[逻]反对命题；adv.相反地，矛盾地

examples.en: Hungary, by contrast, reacted calmly to events in Yugoslavia.
examples.cn: 相比之下,匈牙利对南斯拉夫发生的一系列事件反应平静.

examples.en: The private sector, by contrast, has plenty of money to spend.
examples.cn: 相比之下，私营部门就有很多钱可供开销。

contrast.paraphrase: n.对比，对照，差异，对照物，对立面，[摄]反差

examples.en: Key burbled about the wonderful people who contribute to tourism.
examples.cn: 基喋喋不休地谈论着那些对旅游业作出贡献的了不起的人物。

examples.en: The lower strings contribute a splendid richness of sonority.
examples.cn: 下弦能够产生雄壮浑厚的音响效果。

contribute.paraphrase: vt.& vi.贡献出，捐赠（款项），投稿（给杂志等），出力

examples.en: His contribution is immeasurable.
examples.cn: 他居功至伟。

examples.en: to make a contribution to charity
examples.cn: 给慈善事业捐款

contribution.paraphrase: n.贡献，捐赠，捐助，捐赠，捐助物，投稿，来稿，[军]（向占领地人民征收的）军税

examples.en: How could you contrive to make such a mess of things?
examples.cn: 你怎么把事情弄得一团糟 呢 ?

examples.en: She found it difficult to contrive when prices of everything went up.
examples.cn: 百物涨价时,她觉得料理家务很难.

contrive.paraphrase: vt.设计，发明，创造，策划，设法做到；vi.计划或谋划

examples.en: The volume of scheduled flights is straining the air traffic control system.
examples.cn: 定期航班的数量正让空中交通指挥系统不堪重负。

examples.en: The passengers went through immigration control and collected their baggage.
examples.cn: 旅客通过入境检查后领取了自己的行李。

control.paraphrase: vt.控制，管理，限制，支配；n.支配权，操纵者，（对国家、地区、机构等的）管理权，（键盘上的）控制键

examples.en: She's not feminist with a capital F but she's fairly controversial.
examples.cn: 她不是个真正意义上的女权主义者，但却是个颇具争议的人物。

examples.en: It is a controversial policy which has attracted international censure.
examples.cn: 这是一项颇有争议的政策，引起了国际社会的批评。

controversial.paraphrase: adj.有争议的，引起争议的，被争论的，好争论的

examples.en: Legislation to that effect created fierce controversy both in Parliament and outside.
examples.cn: 那类立法在议会内外都引起了激烈的争论。

examples.en: Cabinet ministers signalled their determination to tough out the controversy.
examples.cn: 内阁大臣们表明他们将不顾争议坚持下去。

examples.en: Like working women anywhere, Asian women are buying convenience foods.
examples.cn: 像其他地方的职业女性一样，亚洲女性也购买方便食品。

examples.en: Frozen fish is a very healthy convenience food.
examples.cn: 冻鱼是非常健康的方便食品。

convenience.paraphrase: n.方便，便利，便利设施，个人的舒适或利益，（公共）厕所

examples.en: There wasn't even a convenient place for students to assemble between classes.
examples.cn: 在课间，学生们连一个方便凑在一起的地方都没有。

examples.en: We cannot make this minority a convenient excuse to turn our backs.
examples.cn: 我们不能拿少数这几个人作为一种方便的借口而对此置之不理。

convenient.paraphrase: adj.方便的，[废语]适当的，[口语]近便的，实用的

examples.en: The action is an open violation of the Vienna Convention.
examples.cn: 该行为公然违背了《维也纳公约》。

examples.en: All new fashion starts out as a reaction against existing convention.
examples.cn: 所有新时尚都是从打破现有常规开始的。

convention.paraphrase: n.会议，全体与会者，国际公约，惯例，习俗，规矩

examples.en: I want to reiterate that our conventional weapons are superior.
examples.cn: 我要再次重申，我们的常规武器是一流的。

examples.en: Alternative treatments can provide a useful back-up to conventional treatment.
examples.cn: 替代疗法能为传统的治疗提供有效的辅助。

conventional.paraphrase: adj.传统的，习用的，平常的，依照惯例的，约定的

examples.en: As they flow south, the five rivers converge.
examples.cn: 5条大河在南边交汇。

examples.en: Our previously opposed views are beginning to converge.
examples.cn: 我们原来相互对立的观点开始趋于一致.

converge.paraphrase: vi.（线条、运动的物体等）会于一点，聚集，人或车辆汇集；vt.使聚集

examples.en: He finished his conversation and stood up, looking straight at me.
examples.cn: 他说完话站起来，直视着我。

examples.en: I didn't let on to the staff what my conversation was.
examples.cn: 我没有将谈话内容向员工们透露。

conversation.paraphrase: n.交谈，会话，交往，交际，会谈，（人与计算机的）人机对话

examples.en: You can add the fluid to the powder, or, conversely, the powder to the fluid.
examples.cn: 可把液体加入粉末，或者相反，把粉末加入液体。

examples.en: He placed the box conversely.
examples.cn: 他把箱子放倒了.

conversely.paraphrase: adv.相反地，颠倒地，倒地，反之，反过来

examples.en: It is always worth having a loft conversion costed out.
examples.cn: 估算一下改建阁楼的费用总是很有必要的。

examples.en: Currency-conversion costs remain one of the biggest obstacles to cross-border trade.
examples.cn: 货币兑换成本仍是跨境贸易的最大障碍之一。

conversion.paraphrase: n.变换，转变，改装物，财产转换，兑换，[逻] 换位（法）

examples.en: He was a recent Catholic convert, and very zealous.
examples.cn: 他最近才皈依天主教，是一名狂热的信徒。

examples.en: Christians were arrested for trying to convert people, to proselytise them.
examples.cn: 基督徒因为试图改变他人信仰而被捕。

convert.paraphrase: vt.（使）转变，使皈依，兑换，换算，侵占；vi.经过转变，被改变，[橄榄球] 触地得分后得附加分；n.皈依者，改变宗教信仰者

examples.en: The speed at which we talk can also convey a great deal.
examples.cn: 我们的语速同样能传达许多信息。

examples.en: Euclid was trying to convey his idea of a geometrical point.
examples.cn: 欧几里得试图表达他的一个几何学观点。

convey.paraphrase: vt.传达，传递，运送，输送，[法]让与，转让（财产等），表达

examples.en: It was difficult to convict him of the falsity of his beliefs.
examples.cn: 难以使他认识到他信仰的虚假性.

examples.en: I have all the evidence necessary to convict this young criminal now.
examples.cn: 我掌握一切必要的证据来给这个年轻犯人定罪.

convict.paraphrase: vt.宣判有罪，证明…有罪，使知罪，定…的罪；n.罪犯

examples.en: He overturned the conviction, saying the defendant was entrapped.
examples.cn: 他声称被告是被诱骗的，从而推翻了有罪的判决。

examples.en: There was not sufficient evidence to secure a conviction.
examples.cn: 没有足够的证据来定罪。

examples.en: I'm not going to believe it myself, never mind convince anyone else.
examples.cn: 我自己都不会相信，更别提说服别人了。

examples.en: It became clear that I hadn't been able to convince Mike.
examples.cn: 我显然没有能够说服迈克。

convince.paraphrase: vt.使相信，说服，使承认，使明白，使确信，使悔悟，使认错[罪]

examples.en: Put the onions in the pan and cook until lightly browned.
examples.cn: 将洋葱放入平底锅内，炒至略呈棕色。

examples.en: He said that what they were up to would cook Krasky's goose.
examples.cn: 他说他们暗中进行的阴谋可能会使克拉斯基的计划流产。

cook.paraphrase: vt.& vi.烹调，编造，篡改，密谋；vt.烹调，煮；vi.烹调，做菜；n.厨师，厨子

examples.en: She made a fanning motion, pretending to cool herself off.
examples.cn: 她做了个扇风的动作，假装想让自己凉快一点。

examples.en: In warm weather, you should wear clothing that is cool and comfortable.
examples.cn: 在热天里，应该穿凉快舒适的衣服。

cool.paraphrase: adj. 凉爽的，冷静的，酷的；v. 冷却，变凉

examples.en: The two groups agreed to cooperate with each other.
examples.cn: 这两个组同意相互协作。

examples.en: The two airlines will cooperate on ticketing and schedules.
examples.cn: 两家航空公司将在票务和航班安排上展开合作。

cooperate.paraphrase: vi.合作，配合，协助；v.合群，互助，结合

examples.en: The workmen are very cooperative, so the work goes on smoothly.
examples.cn: 工人们十分合作, 所以工作进展顺利.

examples.en: Cooperative activity is essential to effective community work.
examples.cn: 要把社区工作做好，协作活动是必不可少的。

cooperative.paraphrase: adj.合作的，协助的，共同的，〈美〉（大学文科）有关[包含]各种实习活动的；n.合作社，联合体

examples.en: You must coordinate what you said with what you did.
examples.cn: 你必须使你的言行一致.

examples.en: They appointed a new manager to coordinate the work of the team.
examples.cn: 为协调这个队的工作，他们任用了一位新经理。

coordinate.paraphrase: vt.使协调，使调和，整合，使（身体各部份）动作协调，（衣服、布料等）搭配；vi.协调，协同，成为同等，被归入同一类别

examples.en: This exercise improves your coordination, balance, timing and footwork.
examples.cn: 这项锻炼可以提高协调能力、平衡力、把握时机的能力和脚法。

examples.en: Interior decoration by careful coordination seems to have had its day.
examples.cn: 精心搭配的室内装饰似乎已不再受欢迎了。

examples.en: Malone, a cop, felt as much an outsider as any of them.
examples.cn: 马隆是个警察，他跟他们一样都觉得自己像个外人。

examples.en: The film's ending is an unsatisfactory cop-out.
examples.cn: 电影回避式的结局让人不满。

cop.paraphrase: n.〈俚〉警察，管纱，〈英方〉（山）顶；vt.偷盗，抓住，获得，取走

examples.en: Depression lowers the human ability to cope with disease.
examples.cn: 抑郁症会降低人体对疾病的抵抗力。

examples.en: Somehow Karin managed to cope with the demands of her career.
examples.cn: 卡琳设法达到了其职业的要求。

cope.paraphrase: vi.成功地应付，对付，对抗；n.长袍，斗篷状覆盖物，墙帽；vt.笼罩，给…盖墙压顶

examples.en: Copper, brass and aluminium are separated and remelted for reuse.
examples.cn: 铜、黄铜和铝被分门别类重新熔化以进行再利用。

examples.en: Miners in Zambia's northern copper belt have gone on strike.
examples.cn: 赞比亚北部铜矿带的矿工已经罢工了。

copper.paraphrase: n.铜，铜币，紫铜色，警察；adj.铜制的；vt.镀铜

examples.en: The second-hand version is a poor copy of the original.
examples.cn: 盗版版本是对原版的低劣复制。

examples.en: The new copiers only copy onto one side of the paper.
examples.cn: 新复印机只能单面复印。

copy.paraphrase: n.复制品，一份，（报刊等的）稿件，准备排印的书面材料；vt.& vi.复制，抄写，容许复制的；vt.模仿，仿造…的样式或图案，抄写，复制

examples.en: He warned that lifting copyright restrictions could beggar the industry.
examples.cn: 他警告说解除版权限制会使这个行业一贫如洗。

examples.en: She threatened legal action against the Sun for breach of copyright.
examples.cn: 她威胁说要对《太阳报》侵犯其著作权的行为采取法律措施。

copyright.paraphrase: n.版权，著作权；adj.受版权保护的，版权的；vt.获得…的版权

examples.en: A coral reef is built by the accretion of tiny, identical organisms.
examples.cn: 珊瑚礁是由许多相同的微生物不断堆积而成。

examples.en: These snails do not occur on low-lying coral islands or atolls.
examples.cn: 在地势低平的珊瑚岛或环礁上没有这种螺。

coral.paraphrase: n.珊瑚，珊瑚虫，珊瑚色，龙虾卵；adj.珊瑚的，珊瑚色的

examples.en: Inflate your life jacket by pulling sharply on the cord.
examples.cn: 猛拽绳扣使你的救生衣充气。

examples.en: A quick-thinking ticket inspector yanked an emergency cord.
examples.cn: 一个反应迅速的查票员猛地拉下了紧急刹车索。

cord.paraphrase: n.（细）绳，灯心绒裤；vt.用绳子捆绑，堆积（柴薪）

examples.en: The conversation was carried on in a cordial and friendly atmosphere.
examples.cn: 会谈是在亲切友好的气氛中进行的.

examples.en: We maintain cordial relations with our neighbors.
examples.cn: 我们与邻里保持亲切友好的关系.

cordial.paraphrase: adj.热诚的，诚恳的，兴奋的；n.补品，兴奋剂，甘露酒

examples.en: The turning point in the process of growing up is when you discover the core of strength within you that survives all hurt.--Max Lerner
examples.cn: 当你从内心深处找到一种可以忍受一切痛苦的坚强力量时，你的成长历程就会出现飞跃。

examples.en: A hard-core group of right-wing senators had hoped to sway their colleagues.
examples.cn: 一群骨干右翼参议员曾企图左右自己的同僚。

core.paraphrase: n.中心，核心，精髓，果心，果核，[地质学]地核，[计] 磁心；vt.去（果）核，挖去…的果心，提取岩芯（样品）

examples.en: They are offering farmers $2.15 a bushel for corn.
examples.cn: 他们向农民出价每蒲式耳2.15美元收购玉米。

examples.en: The scheme offers seed corn finance with loans at only 4% interest.
examples.cn: 该方案提供种子基金融资，其贷款只收取4%的利息。

examples.en: Claire stared after him until he disappeared around a corner.
examples.cn: 克莱尔一直注视着他，直到他消失在拐角。

examples.en: The man with the umbrella turned the corner again.
examples.cn: 拿伞的人又拐进了拐角处。

corner.paraphrase: n.角落，角，拐角，困境，[商]囤积；vi.驾车转弯，聚于角落；vt.垄断，逼入困境；adj.位于角落的

examples.en: Her second husband was a steady, unimaginative, corporate lawyer.
examples.cn: 她的第二任丈夫是一位稳重、刻板的公司法律师。

examples.en: Coincident interests with the corporate rich and political directorate are pointed out.
examples.cn: 有人指出这合乎的是公司富豪和政治官员的利益。

corporate.paraphrase: adj.法人的，团体的，社团的，公司的，总体国家的，〈古〉团结的，共同的，全体的

examples.en: The corporation is fighting to survive its second brush with bankruptcy.
examples.cn: 公司正在努力摆脱自身遭遇的第二次破产危机。

examples.en: The Commonwealth Development Corporation has agreed to reschedule Tanzania's debt.
examples.cn: 英联邦开发公司已经同意推迟坦桑尼亚的债务偿还时间。

corporation.paraphrase: n.公司，法人，社团，团体，〈口〉（凸出的）大肚子

examples.en: What she saw was just an unfeeling corpse.
examples.cn: 她见到的只是一具全无感觉的尸体.

examples.en: We passed the desiccated corpse of a brigand hanging on a gibbet.
examples.cn: 我们路过一具悬在绞刑架上的土匪干尸.

examples.en: The club specialises in videoing its student golfers to correct their faults.
examples.cn: 俱乐部专门为高尔夫学员制作录像，以纠正他们的错误。

examples.en: The correct answers can be found at the bottom of page 8.
examples.cn: 正确答案在第8页末尾。

correct.paraphrase: adj.正确的，合适的，符合公认准则的，得体的；v.改正，批改，指出错误

examples.en: My own mother was brought up very strictly and correctly.
examples.cn: 我母亲从小接受严格而规范的教育。

examples.en: It is important to judge the weight of your washing load correctly.
examples.cn: 正确估计待洗衣物的重量很重要。

correctly.paraphrase: adv.正确地，得体地，实事求是

examples.en: The political opinions of spouses correlate more closely than their heights.
examples.cn: 配偶之间政治观点上的相似度要大于他们身高的相似程度。

examples.en: The figures do not seem to correlate.
examples.cn: 这些数字似乎毫不相干。

correlate.paraphrase: v.使互相关联，联系；n.相关物，相关联的人；adj.相关的，相应特点的

examples.en: Her expression is concerned but her body-language does not correspond.
examples.cn: 她满脸关切之情，但她的肢体语言并非如此。

examples.en: Your account of events does not correspond with hers.
examples.cn: 你对事情的陈述与她说的不相符。

examples.en: No correspondence will be entered into.
examples.cn: 将不会和任何人建立通信联系。

examples.en: A selection of correspondence from P G Wodehouse realised £ 1,232. P.G.
examples.cn: 沃德豪斯的书信选集卖了1,232英镑。

correspondence.paraphrase: n.一致，符合，对应，通信，信件，[艺]通感

examples.en: Our economics correspondent, James Morgan, is just back from Germany.
examples.cn: 我们的财经记者詹姆斯·摩根刚刚从德国回来。

examples.en: Frank Deford is a special correspondent for Newsweek magazine.
examples.cn: 弗兰克·德福特是《新闻周刊》杂志的特派记者。

examples.en: A change in the money supply brings a corresponding change in expenditure.
examples.cn: 货币供应量的改变随即引起支出的相应改变。

examples.en: What we required you to do is corresponding to the contract.
examples.cn: 我们要你做的事情符合合同规定.

corresponding.paraphrase: adj.相当的，对应的，通信的，符合的，符合。。，一致的；v.相符合( correspond的现在分词)，类似(correspond的ing形式)，相配

examples.en: I noticed a chink of light at the end of the corridor.
examples.cn: 我注意到走廊尽头的一缕光线。

examples.en: The young man led Mark Ryle along a corridor.
examples.cn: 那个年轻人领着马克·赖尔沿走廊而去。

corridor.paraphrase: n.走廊，通道，走廊（一国领土通过他国境内的狭长地带），[建]覆道

examples.en: Acid causes metal to corrode.
examples.cn: 酸使金属腐蚀.

examples.en: The tools will corrode with rust if never used.
examples.cn: 这些工具如长期不用会长铁锈而损坏.

examples.en: He had accused three opposition members of corrupt practices.
examples.cn: 他指控3名反对派成员营私舞弊。

examples.en: The mess was directly attributable to a corrupt and incompetent official.
examples.cn: 某个腐败无能的官员是导致这一烂摊子的罪魁祸首。

corrupt.paraphrase: adj.堕落的，道德败坏的，贪污的，腐败的，腐烂的，（文献等）错误百出的；vt.使腐败，使堕落，使腐烂；vi.堕落，腐化，腐烂

examples.en: His "cosmic vision" is to blend Christianity with "the wisdom of all world religions".
examples.cn: 他的“远大设想”就是将基督教和“全世界所有宗教的智慧”融为一体。

examples.en: NASA plans to launch a satellite to study cosmic rays.
examples.cn: 美国国家航空航天局计划发射一颗卫星上天，对宇宙射线进行研究。

examples.en: The new shopping centre was constructed at a cost of 1.1 million.
examples.cn: 新的购物中心耗资110万建成。

examples.en: The company has made heroic efforts at cost reduction.
examples.cn: 公司在降低成本方面付出了艰苦卓绝的努力。

cost.paraphrase: n.价钱，代价，花费，费用，牺牲，[用复数][法律]诉讼费；vi.价钱为，花费，估计成本；vt.付出代价，估价，使丧失，使付出努力

examples.en: The proposed regulations are ill-defined and cumbersome and could be unnecessarily costly.
examples.cn: 提议的规章制度阐述不清、复杂低效，而且可能会带来不必要的过高花费。

examples.en: At the required level of visual verisimilitude, computer animation is costly.
examples.cn: 要使电脑动画的视觉效果达到要求的逼真程度，花费会十分昂贵。

examples.en: Even from a distance the effect of his fox costume was stunning.
examples.cn: 即使从远处看，他的狐狸戏服也很抢眼。

examples.en: I felt a bit self-conscious in my swimming costume.
examples.cn: 我穿着游泳衣觉得有点害羞。

costume.paraphrase: n.（戏剧或电影的）戏装，演出服，服装，衣服，泳装，常用于英式英语，（某地或某历史时期的）服装；vt.给…穿上服装，给…提供服装

examples.en: Just think how snug and cosy we could be.
examples.cn: 想象一下，我们可以多么温暖舒适呀。

examples.en: In the cosy consulting room the children are surrounded by familiar objects.
examples.cn: 在温馨的诊疗室里，孩子们周围摆满了亲切熟悉的东西。

cosy.paraphrase: adj.舒适的，惬意的，畅快的，亲切友好的；n.有遮盖的双人座椅，保暖罩

examples.en: The studio is midway between his aunt's old home and his cottage.
examples.cn: 工作室就在从他姑姑的老宅到他的小屋的中途。

examples.en: My sister Yvonne also came to live at Ockenden Cottage with me.
examples.cn: 姐姐伊冯娜也来到奥克肯登小屋和我一起住了。

cottage.paraphrase: n.小屋，村舍，（农舍式的）小别墅，（郊外的）新式住宅，（大院内的）单幢住宅，乡下房子，小房子

examples.en: Because it was warm, David wore only a white cotton shirt.
examples.cn: 因为天气暖和，戴维只穿了一件白色的棉衬衣。

examples.en: Some of the food crops failed. However, the cotton did quite well.
examples.cn: 有些粮食作物歉收。但棉花的收成仍相当不错。

cotton.paraphrase: n.棉，棉线，棉织物，（其他植物所生的绒毛状的）棉状物；vi.喜欢，赞成，一致，交往

examples.en: We were sitting on the couch in the living room watching TV.
examples.cn: 我们就坐在客厅的沙发上看电视。

examples.en: Roy swung his legs carefully off the couch and sat up.
examples.cn: 罗伊小心地把腿挪下沙发，坐了起来。

couch.paraphrase: n.长沙发椅，睡椅，（病人受检查时躺的）长榻，麦芽床，涂底，涂层；vt.表达，使躺卧，播撒谷物使发芽；vi.躺卧，隐蔽，埋伏，使成堆

examples.en: Will this be enough to persuade Congress to cough up?
examples.cn: 这能说服国会掏钱吗？

examples.en: I'll have to cough up $10,000 a year for tuition.
examples.cn: 我每年将不得不付1万美元的学费。

cough.paraphrase: vt.& vi.咳嗽，（引擎等）发噗噗声，咳出；n.咳，咳嗽，咳嗽病，（机关枪等的）连续发射声

examples.en: He could just about see the little man behind the counter.
examples.cn: 他勉强能看到柜台后面的小个子男人。

examples.en: So, if we could just move onto something else?
examples.cn: 那么我们可不可以干脆谈点别的？

could.paraphrase: aux.“can”的过去式，能够，打算，用于假设语气的条件句，用于虚拟语气的结论句

examples.en: The District Council made a weekly collection of refuse.
examples.cn: 区政务委员会每周收取一次垃圾。

examples.en: The council recently drew fire for its intervention in the dispute.
examples.cn: 委员会最近因为介入该起争端而遭到批评。

council.paraphrase: n.委员会，（郡、镇等）政务会，（尤指旧时讨论特定步骤的）协商会议，市政（或地方管理）服务机构

examples.en: It is wise to seek help and counsel as soon as possible.
examples.cn: 尽快寻求帮助和建议乃明智之举。

examples.en: Singleton's counsel said after the trial that he would appeal.
examples.cn: 审判结束后，辛格尔顿的律师表示他将会上诉。

counsel.paraphrase: n.协商，讨论，建议，策略，法律顾问，辩护人；vt.劝告，建议，提供专业咨询

count.paraphrase: n.总数，数数，罪状，论点；v.数数，计算总数，把…算入，重要

examples.en: The army now appears to have launched a counter-offensive.
examples.cn: 军队现在似乎已经发起了反攻。

examples.en: The shop assistant received me indifferently while leaning on a counter.
examples.cn: 商店售货员靠在柜台上漫不经心地招呼我。

counter.paraphrase: n.柜台，对立面，计数器，（某些棋盘游戏的）筹码；adj.相反的；vt.反击，还击，反向移动，对着干，反驳，回答；vi.逆向移动，对着干，反驳；adv.反方向地，背道而驰地

examples.en: It is not a unique instance , but has its counterpart.
examples.cn: 无独有偶.

examples.en: Night is the counterpart of day.
examples.cn: 黑夜与白天相辅相成.

counterpart.paraphrase: n.配对物，副本，相对物，极相似的人或物

examples.en: Motorways actually cover less than 0.1 percent of the countryside.
examples.cn: 高速公路的实际覆盖面积还不到农村地区的0.1%。

examples.en: The Moselle winds through some 160 miles of tranquil countryside.
examples.cn: 摩泽尔河在宁静的乡间蜿蜒穿行约160英里。

countryside.paraphrase: n.乡村，郊野，乡下的全体居民

examples.en: For a local bus timetable, contact Dyfed County Council.
examples.cn: 若要当地公共汽车时刻表，请与达费德郡政务委员会联系。

examples.en: The riots will also mean lost income for Los Angeles County.
examples.cn: 暴乱还意味着洛杉矶县收入的损失。

examples.en: The couple married in the Caribbean to avoid a media circus.
examples.cn: 为了摆脱媒体的关注，这对新人在加勒比喜结连理。

examples.en: Dave, the pianist, played it over a couple of times.
examples.cn: 演奏钢琴的戴夫将这支曲子反复弹了两三遍。

couple.paraphrase: n.对，双，配偶，夫妻，<口>几个，两三个；vt.&vi.连在一起，连接，成双，结婚，性交，交配

examples.en: Bring the coupon below to any Tecno store and pay just £10.99.
examples.cn: 持下面的优惠券到任意一家Tecno专卖店，只需付10.99英镑。

examples.en: To enter, simply complete the coupon on page 150.
examples.cn: 要想参加，只需填写第150页的参赛表格。

coupon.paraphrase: n.优惠券，息票，通票，试样，试件，配给券

examples.en: Every person stood to applaud his unforgettable act of courage.
examples.cn: 所有人起立为他不可磨灭的英勇之举鼓掌。

examples.en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.--Winston Churchill
examples.cn: 成功不是终点，失败也并非末日，最重要的是继续前进的勇气。

examples.en: She'd half expected him to withdraw from the course.
examples.cn: 她多少已经预料到他会中途就退出这门课程。

examples.en: She is currently doing a business studies course at Leeds.
examples.cn: 她目前在利兹大学修读一门商科课程。

course.paraphrase: n.课程，航线，行动方向，一道菜；vt.快速地流动，奔流，跑过，追逐；vi.沿…（方向）前进，指引航线，快跑，迅速移动

court.paraphrase: n.法院，法庭，院子，天井，宫廷，网球场；vt.招致，设法获得，向…献殷勤，追求；vi.求爱，求婚，寻求

examples.en: The President paid a courtesy call on Emperor Akihito.
examples.cn: 总统对明仁天皇进行了礼节性的拜访。

examples.en: The air was fresh, courtesy of three holes in the roof.
examples.cn: 房顶有3个洞，所以空气很清新。

courtesy.paraphrase: n.谦恭有礼，礼貌，请安，有礼貌的举止[言词]，承蒙；adj.殷勤的，出于礼节的

courtship.paraphrase: n.求爱期，追求期，求爱，求婚，[动]求偶（现象）

examples.en: The house itself is three stories high and arranged around a courtyard.
examples.cn: 房子本身有三层高，绕着一个庭院而建。

examples.en: Dena took them into the courtyard to sit in the sun.
examples.cn: 德娜带他们到院子里晒太阳。

examples.en: Her cousin, a hairdresser, was perming her hair as a special treat.
examples.cn: 她表兄是美发师，正在免费给她烫发。

examples.en: George ducked out of his forced marriage to a cousin.
examples.cn: 乔治逃脱了和他表亲的包办婚姻。

cousin.paraphrase: n.堂[表]兄弟姊妹，远亲，同辈

examples.en: Just play it safe, cover your ass, keep your head down.
examples.cn: 要谨慎行事，保护好自己并保持低调。

examples.en: I should point out that these estimates cover just the hospital expenditures.
examples.cn: 我应该指出，这些估算仅包括医院的费用。

cover.paraphrase: v.遮盖，掩蔽，涉及，洒上；n.覆盖物，避难所，掩护，封面

examples.en: Newspapers, television and radio are all providing saturation coverage.
examples.cn: 报纸、电视和电台全都在铺天盖地地报道。

examples.en: Now a special TV network gives live coverage of most races.
examples.cn: 现在有一个专门的电视网络对大部分比赛进行现场直播。

coverage.paraphrase: n.范围，规模，保险项目，（新闻）报导，[植]优势度

examples.en: Any product made from cow's milk made him vomit.
examples.cn: 任何乳制品都会让他呕吐。

examples.en: Switzerland isn't all cow bells and yodelling, you know.
examples.cn: 你知道，瑞士不仅仅只有牛铃声和约德尔调歌声。

cow.paraphrase: n.奶牛，乳牛，母兽，雌（象，鲸等），<侮辱>对女性的蔑称；vt.恐吓，吓唬，威胁

examples.en: He's a coward and a bully who confuses physical strength with manhood.
examples.cn: 他是一个懦夫，一个分不清蛮力和大丈夫气概的恃强凌弱者。

examples.en: She shot to stardom on Broadway in a Noel Coward play.
examples.cn: 她因在百老汇出演了一部诺埃尔·科沃德的戏一炮而红。

coward.paraphrase: n.胆小鬼，懦夫；adj.怯懦的，胆小的

examples.en: We spent a cozy evening chatting by the fire.
examples.cn: 我们在炉火旁聊天度过了一个舒适的晚上。

examples.en: He went in and glanced around. " Quite clean and cozy!
examples.cn: 进了屋,他四下里看了一眼: “ 小屋还怪干净呢!

cozy.paraphrase: adj.舒适的，安逸的，惬意的；n.保温罩

examples.en: The claws of a crab are used for grasping things, especially food.
examples.cn: 螃蟹用钳抓东西, 特别是食物.

examples.en: Although it is tasty, crab is very filling.
examples.cn: 螃蟹虽然好吃，却容易让人感到饱足。

crab.paraphrase: n.蟹，蟹肉，阴虱，脾气乖戾的人，[植]沙果，沙果树；vi.捕蟹，发牢骚，抱怨，偏航；vt.发脾气，破坏，使偏航

examples.en: Drug experts say it could spell the end of the crack epidemic.
examples.cn: 禁毒专家说它可能会结束强效可卡因吸食泛滥的局面。

examples.en: She's calm and strong, and she is just not going to crack.
examples.cn: 她镇定而且坚强，绝不会垮掉。

crack.paraphrase: vt.破裂，打开，（使…）开裂，说（笑话），开瓶；vi.断裂，折断，碎裂声，爆裂声，镜子破裂了，失去控制，衰退；n.裂缝，试图，缝隙，（可听到响声的）重击；adj.训练有素的，技艺高超的，优秀的，一流的

examples.en: I dropped the receiver back in the cradle.
examples.cn: 我把听筒放回听筒架上。

examples.en: Mali is the cradle of some of Africa's richest civilizations.
examples.cn: 马里是非洲一些最悠久的文明的发祥地。

cradle.paraphrase: n.摇篮，发源地，发祥地，吊架，支架，婴儿时期；vt.将…置于摇篮中，轻轻地抱或捧，抚养，把…搁在支架上

examples.en: It provides the thrust that makes the craft move forward.
examples.cn: 它提供了飞机前进所需的推力。

examples.en: The engine of one landing craft was still running.
examples.cn: 一艘登陆艇的发动机还在运转。

craft.paraphrase: n.手艺，诡计，飞行器，船；vt.手工制作，精巧地制作

examples.en: There was such a cram in the church.
examples.cn: 教堂里拥挤得要命.

examples.en: It's difficult to cram everything into a tight schedule.
examples.cn: 日程紧，很难把所有事情都安排进去。

cram.paraphrase: vt.填满，塞满，死记硬背，猛吃；vi.（为考试而）死记硬背，狼吞虎咽地吃东西；adj.填鸭式学的，临时学的；n.死记硬背，极度拥挤，填塞，<俚>压碎

examples.en: We used a crane to lift the piano into the theatre.
examples.cn: 我们使用起重机将钢琴搬进剧场.

examples.en: Must we wait till the crane arrives before we start loading?
examples.cn: 非要等起重机来了才能装运 吗 ?

crane.paraphrase: n.吊车，起重机，鹤；vt.& vi.伸长，探头；vi.迟疑，踌躇

examples.en: Investigators say that a fuel explosion may have caused the crash.
examples.cn: 调查员说燃料爆炸有可能是失事的根源。

examples.en: I just want to crash out on the sofa.
examples.cn: 我只想在沙发上睡会儿。

crash.paraphrase: v.碰撞，使发出巨响，暴跌，睡觉；n.碰撞，碰撞声，暴跌，崩溃；adj.应急的，速成的

examples.en: With a telescope you can see the huge crater of Ve - suvius.
examples.cn: 用望远镜你能看到巨大的维苏威火山口.

examples.en: A huge crater marks the spot where the explosion happened.
examples.cn: 巨大的弹坑标明了爆炸发生的地点。

crater.paraphrase: n.火山口，喷火口，弹坑，[天文学]巨爵座，（月球上的）环形山；vt.在…上形成坑，取消，毁坏；vi.形成坑，毁坏，消亡

examples.en: I was heading on a secret mission that made my flesh crawl.
examples.cn: 我正要执行一项让我心惊肉跳的秘密任务。

examples.en: The traffic on the approach road slowed to a crawl.
examples.cn: 引路上车辆行驶缓慢。

crawl.paraphrase: vi.爬行，缓慢行进，巴结；n.缓慢的爬行，〈美俚〉跳舞，自由式游泳，养鱼（龟）池

examples.en: Some people can diet like crazy and not lose weight.
examples.cn: 有些人拼命节食也不能减肥。

examples.en: "That's crazy," I said. "Isn't it just?" he said.
examples.cn: “那简直是疯了，”我说。“谁说不是呢？”他说。

crazy.paraphrase: adj.疯狂的，不理智的，离奇的，生气的；n.[俚语]疯子，怪人，政治狂人（尤指政治上持激进或极端主义态度、行为异常、不可思议的人）

cream.paraphrase: n.乳霜，精英，奶油色，乳脂，奶油；vt.把…搅成糊状（或奶油状）混合物，彻底打败，狠揍

examples.en: The superglue may not create a bond with some plastics.
examples.cn: 强力胶水可能无法粘住某些塑料。

examples.en: She asked her son, a graphic designer, to create letterheads and stationery.
examples.cn: 她请做平面设计师的儿子设计了信头和信笺。

create.paraphrase: vt.创造，创作，产生，封爵，把…封为（贵族）；vi.[英][俚]大发脾气，大发牢骚

examples.en: He reiterated his opposition to the creation of a central bank.
examples.cn: 他重申了自己反对成立央行的立场。

examples.en: The manifesto gives pride of place to job creation.
examples.cn: 这项宣言将创造工作机会放在首位。

creation.paraphrase: n.制造，创造，创造物，产物，（尤指<圣经>所述由上帝）创造天地，宇宙，（爵位等的）封授

examples.en: For him, the rest of the decade was a creative write-off.
examples.cn: 对他来说，这个十年所余下的时间是一段创作空白。

examples.en: Some thought must be given to the method of validation.
examples.cn: 一些想法必须通过验证法加以证实。

creative.paraphrase: adj.创造性的，有创造力的，有创意的，创新的，创造的；n.（非正式）创意人士

examples.en: What distinguishes homo sapiens from every other living creature is the mind.
examples.cn: 智人和其他生物的区别在于大脑。

examples.en: Alaskan Eskimos believe that every living creature possesses a spirit.
examples.cn: 阿拉斯加的爱斯基摩人认为每一个活着的生物都有灵魂。

creature.paraphrase: n.生物，动物，人，创造物，（他人的）工具

examples.en: The implication that marital infidelity enhances a leader's credibility is preposterous.
examples.cn: 婚姻不忠会提升领导人可信度的暗示荒谬之极。

examples.en: The president will have to work hard to restore his credibility.
examples.cn: 总统将不得不努力使公众恢复对他的信任。

examples.en: Is there a credible alternative to the nuclear deterrent?
examples.cn: 是否有可以取代核威慑力量的可靠办法?

examples.en: Baroness Thatcher's claims seem credible to many.
examples.cn: 撒切尔女男爵的主张在很多人看来是可信的。

credible.paraphrase: adj.可信的，可靠的，（因看似可能成功而）可接受的

examples.en: Buyers use different ruses to wring free credit out of their suppliers.
examples.cn: 买主们千方百计想从供货商那儿无息赊购。

examples.en: Make a note of credit card numbers and check expiry dates.
examples.cn: 记下信用卡卡号，核对有效期限。

credit.paraphrase: n.信誉，信用，[金融]贷款，荣誉，学分；vt.相信，信任，归功于，[会]记入贷方，赞颂

examples.en: I would creep in and with stealthy footsteps explore the second-floor.
examples.cn: 我会偷偷溜进去，轻手轻脚地查看一下二楼。

examples.en: Back I go to the hotel and creep up to my room.
examples.cn: 我回到旅馆，蹑手蹑脚地上楼回到房间。

creep.paraphrase: vi.爬行，匍匐，缓慢地行进；n.爬行，蠕动，虫爬着似的感觉，毛骨悚然，卑鄙小人，谄媚者

examples.en: That night she, Nicholson and the crew had a celebratory dinner.
examples.cn: 那天晚上，她、尼科尔森和全体工作人员吃了一顿庆功宴。

examples.en: The crew of the ship gave them nothing but bread to eat.
examples.cn: 船上的工作人员除了面包什么也不给他们吃。

crew.paraphrase: n.全体船员，全体乘务员，一群，一帮；vt.当（尤指船上的）工作人员，当（尤指船上的）工作人员；vi.当船员，当机务人员

examples.en: By a curious twist of fate, cricket was also my favourite sport.
examples.cn: 让人感到惊奇的是，板球碰巧也是我最喜欢的运动。

examples.en: There was precious little about the cricket to animate the crowd.
examples.cn: 板球比赛能激起观众热情的地方很少。

cricket.paraphrase: n.蟋蟀，板球，矮木凳；vi.打板球；adj.公平的

examples.en: It was a crime of espionage and carried the death penalty.
examples.cn: 这是间谍罪，应判死刑。

examples.en: The sum of evidence points to the crime resting on them.
examples.cn: 所有证据都表明该犯罪乃他们所为.

crime.paraphrase: n.罪行，犯罪，罪恶；v.指控犯罪，判定犯罪，处罚军事犯

examples.en: Northbridge is a cool, calculating and clever criminal who could strike again.
examples.cn: 诺思布里奇是个头脑冷静、诡计多端、阴险狡诈的罪犯，他可能还会犯案。

examples.en: Too bad he used his intelligence for criminal purposes.
examples.cn: 他把聪明都用在了犯罪上，太可惜了。

criminal.paraphrase: n.罪犯，犯人；adj.刑事的，犯罪的，可耻的

examples.en: Let's try to cripple their communications.
examples.cn: 我们试着破坏他们的通讯设备吧。

examples.en: The national health system saved him from becoming a cripple.
examples.cn: 在国民医疗保健系统的救助下，他免于致残。

cripple.paraphrase: vt.使跛，受伤致残，严重削弱，使陷于瘫痪；n.跛子，瘸子，瘫子，残疾，<美方>杂木丛生的沼地，脚蹬

examples.en: The Kremlin is still insisting on a diplomatic solution to the crisis.
examples.cn: 俄罗斯中央政府依然坚持通过外交方式解决危机。

examples.en: An end to the crisis seems a long way off.
examples.cn: 这场危机看来远未结束。

crisis.paraphrase: n.危机，危难时刻，决定性时刻，紧要关头，转折点

examples.en: The potato cakes should be crisp outside and meltingly soft inside.
examples.cn: 土豆饼应该外面酥脆,里面嫩软.

examples.en: Her house is light and airy, crisp and clean.
examples.cn: 她的房子光线充足，空气流通，清新整洁。

crisp.paraphrase: adj.脆的，干冷的，易碎的，新鲜的，爽快的；n.<英>炸马铃薯片，松脆物；vt.（使）变脆，卷曲，烘脆（面包等）；vi.卷曲

examples.en: Senior managers stipulated work-life balance as their main criterion when choosing jobs.
examples.cn: 高级经理人把工作与生活的平衡作为择业的主要标准。

examples.en: Only social practice can be the criterion of truth.
examples.cn: 只有社会实践才能是检验真理的唯一标准.

criterion.paraphrase: n.（批评、判断等的）标准，准则，规范

examples.en: He was also for a time the art critic of "The Scotsman"
examples.cn: 有相当长的一段时间他为《苏格兰人》报撰写艺术评论。

examples.en: He was a stern critic but an extremely kindly man.
examples.cn: 他是个苛刻的批评家，但却是个非常善良的人。

critic.paraphrase: n.批评家，评论员，批评者，挑剔的人

examples.en: I hated my father. He was hyper-critical and mean.
examples.cn: 我讨厌我父亲。他吹毛求疵，刻薄无情。

examples.en: If someone says something critical I take it to heart.
examples.cn: 如果有人提出批评，我会十分介意。

critical.paraphrase: adj.批评的，爱挑剔的，关键的，严重的，极重要的

examples.en: You can criticise him until you're blue in the face, but you'll never change his personality.
examples.cn: 即使你苦口婆心地批评他，也改变不了他的个性。

examples.en: Far be it from me to criticise, but shouldn't their mother take a share of the blame?
examples.cn: 不是我要挑理，他们的母亲难道就不应该负点责任吗？

criticism.paraphrase: n.批评，批判，鉴定，审定，考证，校勘，苛求，[哲]批判主义，评论，评论文章

examples.en: You were quite right to criticize him.
examples.cn: 你批评他批评得很对。

examples.en: They would criticize me, or worse yet, pay me no attention.
examples.cn: 他们会指责我，或者更糟糕的是，干脆对我毫不理睬。

criticize.paraphrase: vt.& vi.分析，评估，批评，挑剔

examples.en: a feminist critique of Freud's theories
examples.cn: 从女权主义的角度对弗洛伊德理论所作的批评

examples.en: a scorching critique of the government's economic policy
examples.cn: 对政府经济政策的严厉批评

critique.paraphrase: n.评论文章，评论，批评，批判；vt.发表评论，批判

examples.en: Problems will crop up and hit you before you are ready.
examples.cn: 你还未准备好，问题就会突然出现并打击你。

examples.en: I let the horse drop his head to crop the spring grass.
examples.cn: 我让马低下头啃吃春天的青草。

crop.paraphrase: n.农作物，产量，庄稼，平头；vt.种植，收割，修剪，剪短；vi.收成，收获

examples.en: I've never seen him get cross or lose his temper.
examples.cn: 我从未见过他生气或者发火。

examples.en: If you ever cross him, forget it, you're finished.
examples.cn: 如果你曾经跟他作过对，就别想了，你没戏了。

cross.paraphrase: n.十字架，十字形饰物，杂交品种，痛苦；vi.交错而行，横渡，越境；vt.杂交，横跨，穿越，划掉，使相交；adj.坏脾气的， 易怒的，相反的，反向的

examples.en: She gave a little crow of triumph.
examples.cn: 她轻轻地发出了胜利的欢呼声。

examples.en: The crow of the cock is a harbinger of dawn.
examples.cn: 鸡啼报晓.

crow.paraphrase: n.乌鸦，雄鸡的啼声；vi.公鸡啼鸣，报晓，欢呼，（尤指在其他人不成功时）扬扬自得地夸口

examples.en: The crowd in Robinson's Coffee-House was thinning, but only by degrees.
examples.cn: 鲁宾逊咖啡屋里的人正在变少，但也只是渐少而已。

examples.en: Three mortar shells had landed close to a crowd of people.
examples.cn: 3枚迫击炮弹落在人群旁。

crowd.paraphrase: n.人群，群众，一群；vi.拥挤，聚集；vt.挤满，将…塞进，催逼

examples.en: She says the sovereignty of the Crown must be preserved.
examples.cn: 她说必须维护王国政府的主权。

examples.en: He laid his hand gently on the crown of her head.
examples.cn: 他把手轻轻放在她的头顶上。

crown.paraphrase: n.王冠，花冠（有时象征胜利），王权，（某物的）顶部；vt.（尤指通过增添成就、成功等）使圆满，为…加冕，使圆满完成，给…以荣誉；vi.露顶

examples.en: It is crucial that all documents presented are authentic and easily verifiable.
examples.cn: 所有提交的文件必须真实且易于查证，这一点很关键。

examples.en: The ability to separate out reusable elements from other waste is crucial.
examples.cn: 能从其他废料中分离出可重复利用成分是很关键的。

crucial.paraphrase: adj.关键性的，极其显要的，决定性的，十字形的

examples.en: Oil majors need not fear being unable to sell their crude.
examples.cn: 大型石油公司无需担心原油销售不出去。

examples.en: A crude oil slick quickly spreads out over water.
examples.cn: 原油泄露后的浮油很快在水面上扩散开来。

crude.paraphrase: adj.粗糙的，粗杂的，粗鲁的，天然的，未加工的，简陋的；n.原[生]材料，天然物质，原油

examples.en: These cruel devices are designed to stop prisoners bending their legs.
examples.cn: 这些残酷的刑具是用来阻止犯人弯腿的。

examples.en: He is still the butt of cruel jokes about his humble origins.
examples.cn: 他仍然因出身低微而被人无情嘲笑。

cruel.paraphrase: adj.残酷的，残忍的，使人痛苦的，让人受难的，无情的，严酷的

examples.en: He got a job as a singer on a cruise ship.
examples.cn: 他在一艘大型游轮上找了个歌手的差事。

examples.en: The next stop on this cruise is likely to be in Cornwall.
examples.cn: 此次航游的下一站很可能是在康沃尔。

cruise.paraphrase: vi.巡游，漫游，巡航；n.（军舰等）巡逻，巡航，〈口〉游览，旅行，周游；vt.巡航，巡游，漫游

examples.en: Every-where he went he was mobbed by a crush of fans.
examples.cn: 他所到之处都有成群的歌迷簇拥着他。

examples.en: Franklin and his thirteen-year-old son somehow got separated in the crush.
examples.cn: 富兰克林和他13岁的儿子在人群中被挤散了。

crush.paraphrase: vt.压破，压碎，镇压，弄皱，挤榨，榨出；vi.挤，被压碎，被起皱；n.粉碎，被压碎的状态，（特指女子对男性的）迷恋，拥挤的人群，果汁饮料

examples.en: The crust of the bread is burnt.
examples.cn: 这块面包的外皮烤焦了.

examples.en: Sergeant Parrott normally spoke with an upper-crust accent.
examples.cn: 帕罗特军士说话通常带着上流社会的腔调。

crust.paraphrase: n.面包皮，外壳，硬外皮，地壳；vt.用外皮覆盖，在…上结硬皮，生痂儿；vi.结成外壳，结硬皮

cry.paraphrase: vt.& vi.哭，喊，叫；vt.哭着说，叫卖，大声报道；n.哭，叫喊，要求，大喊；vi.鸣，啼叫，嗥叫，吠

examples.en: The cliffs, lapped by a crystal-clear sea, remind her of Capri.
examples.cn: 清澈的海水拍打着悬崖峭壁，令她想起了卡普里。

examples.en: Some of the finest drinking glasses are made from lead crystal.
examples.cn: 一些最高档的酒杯是用铅晶质玻璃制成的。

crystal.paraphrase: n.结晶（体），晶体，水晶，水晶饰品；adj.水晶的，水晶般的，透明的，清楚的

examples.en: She sucked an ice cube into her mouth, and crunched it loudly.
examples.cn: 她吸了块冰块到嘴里，嘎嘣嘎嘣地大声嚼着。

examples.en: A dice is a cube.
examples.cn: 骰子是立方体.

cube.paraphrase: n.立方形，立方体，立方，三次幂，小房间；vt.求…的立方，把（食物）切成小方块，测定…的体积

examples.en: Cucumber is good for soothing tired eyes.
examples.cn: 黄瓜有助于舒缓眼部疲劳。

examples.en: Bess stabbed a slice of cucumber.
examples.cn: 贝丝叉起一片黄瓜。

examples.en: Kevin arrived right on cue to care for Harry.
examples.cn: 凯文到的正是时候，可以照顾哈丽。

examples.en: That was Nicholas's cue to ask for another chocolate chip cookie.
examples.cn: 那表示尼古拉斯还想要一块巧克力曲奇。

cue.paraphrase: n.暗示，提示，线索，[台]球杆，情绪，心情；vt.把…插入演出，给…暗示

examples.en: The police are now on the scent of the culprit.
examples.cn: 警方正在追踪罪犯.

examples.en: He knows the culprit but is not letting on.
examples.cn: 他知道罪犯是谁，但却闭口不说。

culprit.paraphrase: n.犯人，罪犯，肇事者，被告人

examples.en: Estonia has done much to cultivate the friendship of western European countries.
examples.cn: 爱沙尼亚努力发展与西欧国家的友谊。

examples.en: We should cultivate the good habits of diligence and frugality.
examples.cn: 我们要养成勤俭节约的好风气.

cultivate.paraphrase: vt.耕作，种植，教养，栽培，改善，交朋友

examples.en: These high yields have been achieved largely through better methods of cultivation.
examples.cn: 这样高的产量主要是通过改良耕作方法取得的.

examples.en: Farmers with many acres under cultivation profited.
examples.cn: 耕种大片土地的农场主挣了钱。

cultivation.paraphrase: n.教养，栽培，耕作，（关系的）培植

examples.en: In New Zealand, the Maori people maintain a strong cultural tradition.
examples.cn: 在新西兰，毛利人保持着深厚的文化传统。

examples.en: A rich and varied cultural life is essential for this couple.
examples.cn: 丰富多样的文化生活对这对夫妇而言至关重要。

cultural.paraphrase: adj. 文化的，与文化有关的

examples.en: The city of Memphis is promoting a populist approach to culture.
examples.cn: 孟菲斯市在推行文化的民粹主义道路。

examples.en: They no longer worry about the homogenization of culture.
examples.cn: 他们不再担心文化的同质化。

culture.paraphrase: n.文化，[生物学]（微生物等的）培养，修养，养殖；vt.培植，培养

examples.en: His cunning and guile were not attributes I would ever underestimate.
examples.cn: 我从未对他的狡猾和奸诈掉以轻心。

examples.en: Enrico was too good, an old fox, cunning.
examples.cn: 恩里科很有心计，是一只狡猾的老狐狸。

cunning.paraphrase: adj.狡猾的，奸诈的，灵巧的；n.狡猾，诡诈，狡黠

examples.en: Isabelle placed a wine cup on the table within his reach.
examples.cn: 伊莎贝尔把酒杯放在桌上他伸手可及的地方。

examples.en: His next job is to get us to the World Cup finals.
examples.cn: 他接下来的任务是带领我们闯入世界杯决赛圈。

cup.paraphrase: n.杯子，一杯（的量），（胸罩的）罩杯，优胜杯；vt.使（手）窝成杯状，使（双手）成圆状托起，为…拔火罐

examples.en: It was time to consign his bat and glove to the cupboard.
examples.cn: 该把他的球棒和手套搁进柜子里了。

examples.en: There's an extra blanket in the bottom drawer of the cupboard.
examples.cn: 壁橱最下面的抽屉里还有一条多余的毯子。

examples.en: Wade released the hand brake and pulled away from the curb.
examples.cn: 韦德松开手刹驶离路边。

examples.en: You must curb your extravagant tastes.
examples.cn: 你必须控制自己铺张奢侈的嗜好。

curb.paraphrase: n.限制，抑制，勒马绳，马衔索，（人行道的）镶边，（证券的）场外市场；vt.制止，束缚，给（马）扣上马衔，给…加路缘，在…处设井栏

examples.en: He needed surgery to cure a troublesome back injury.
examples.cn: 他需要做手术来治好烦人的背伤。

examples.en: The movie sees Burton psychoanalysing Firth to cure him of his depression.
examples.cn: 在电影中伯顿对弗思进行了精神分析，想要治愈他的抑郁症。

cure.paraphrase: vt.治愈，矫正，解决，消除；vi.受治疗，被加工处理；n.治愈，药物，疗法，措施

examples.en: There was much curiosity about what manner of man he was.
examples.cn: 他究竟是什么样的人，大家都十分好奇。

examples.en: They are there only to satisfy their ghoulish curiosity.
examples.cn: 他们去那里纯粹是为了满足其病态的好奇心。

curiosity.paraphrase: n.好奇心，爱打听的癖性，奇人，奇物，古玩，奇特性

examples.en: Steve was intensely curious about the world I came from.
examples.cn: 史蒂夫非常想了解我以前生活的那个世界。

examples.en: The interior was shielded from the curious gaze of passersby.
examples.cn: 屋子内部被挡住了，以防路人好奇地张望。

curious.paraphrase: adj.好奇的， 好求知的，奇妙的， 稀奇的

examples.en: A curl of black hair fell loosely across his forehead.
examples.cn: 他的额头上垂着一绺散开的黑色卷发。

examples.en: Raise one foot, curl the toes and point the foot down-wards.
examples.cn: 抬起一只脚，弯曲脚趾，使脚尖朝下。

curl.paraphrase: n.一绺鬈发，卷曲物，螺旋状物，（指头发）拳曲；vt.& vi.（使）弯曲，（使）卷曲，盘旋，缠绕；vt.撅起嘴唇，撇（嘴），（使）呈螺旋（或卷曲）状移动，（使）旋绕

examples.en: Currency-conversion costs remain one of the biggest obstacles to cross-border trade.
examples.cn: 货币兑换成本仍是跨境贸易的最大障碍之一。

examples.en: You need hard currency to get anything halfway decent.
examples.cn: 你得有硬通货才能买到还算不错的东西。

currency.paraphrase: n.货币，通用，流通，流传，传播，市价，行情，流通时间

examples.en: The tidal stream or current gradually decreases in the shallows.
examples.cn: 浅滩上的潮水逐渐退去。

examples.en: He must sell the house for the current market value.
examples.cn: 他必须以目前的市价出售这座房子。

current.paraphrase: adj.现在的，最近的，流行的，流传的；n.趋势，电流，水流，涌流

examples.en: 30 percent of reptiles, birds, and fish are currently threatened with extinction.
examples.cn: 目前，30%的爬行动物、鸟类和鱼类面临灭绝的危险。

examples.en: The United States plans to tighten the economic sanctions currently in place.
examples.cn: 美国计划加大现有经济制裁的力度。

currently.paraphrase: adv.当前，目前，通常，一般，现在，容易，流畅，普遍地

examples.en: All the schools have music and dancing as part of the curriculum.
examples.cn: 所有学校都设有音乐和舞蹈课。

examples.en: The staff should work together to revise the school curriculum.
examples.cn: 全体教职工应当齐心协力修订学校课程。

examples.en: He shot her an angry look and a curse.
examples.cn: 他生气地看了她一眼，骂了一句。

examples.en: Apathy is the long-standing curse of British local democracy.
examples.cn: 冷漠是英国地方民主制度长期以来难以推广的祸根。

curse.paraphrase: vt.& vi.诅咒，咒骂，使苦恼，使困苦，把（某人）逐出教门；n.诅咒，咒语，祸害，祸因，咒逐，逐出教门

examples.en: I found myself behind a curtain, necking with my best friend'swife.
examples.cn: 我意识到自己在帘子后面吻着至友的妻子。

examples.en: The shops also offer a keenly priced curtain-making service.
examples.cn: 这些商店也提供价格优惠的窗帘制作服务。

curtain.paraphrase: n.窗帘，门帘，帐幕之物，幕布，启幕，落幕；vt.给（窗户或房间）装上帘子，掩蔽

examples.en: The slope increases as you go up the curve.
examples.cn: 上了弯道以后，路越来越陡。

examples.en: Was it just a temporary blip on an otherwise healthy growth curve?
examples.cn: 这是否是原本良好的增长曲线中暂时的偏离？

curve.paraphrase: n.弧线，曲线，曲线状物，弯曲物，[棒]曲线板；vt.使弯曲，使成曲线，使成弧形；vi.弯曲，弯成曲线，弯成弧形，沿曲线行进；adj.弯曲的，曲线形的

examples.en: The subsidies are designed to cushion farmers against unpre-dictable weather.
examples.cn: 这些补助金用于减轻农民因难以预测的恶劣天气而遭受的损失。

examples.en: He sat on a tapestry cushion next to the hearth.
examples.cn: 他坐在壁炉边上的一块绣花软垫上。

cushion.paraphrase: n.（隔离两个表面的）垫，垫子，起保护（或缓冲）作用的事物，（台球等运动）（台球桌内侧边缘的）弹性衬里；vt.使免遭损害，使免受令人不快的影响，（用垫子）使柔和，（跌倒或碰撞时）起缓冲作用

examples.en: It was his invariable custom to have one whisky before his supper.
examples.cn: 晚饭前来杯威士忌，这是他一直以来的习惯。

examples.en: Furniture can also be custom-made to suit your own requirements.
examples.cn: 你也可以按照自己的要求定制家具。

custom.paraphrase: n.习惯，惯例，海关，关税，经常光顾，[总称]（经常性的）顾客；adj.（衣服等）定做的，定制的

examples.en: She found her customary self-possession had deserted her.
examples.cn: 她发现自己不像平时那样处事不惊了。

examples.en: They interrupted the customary one minute's silence with jeers and shouts.
examples.cn: 他们讥讽着，喊叫着，打破了惯常的那一分钟沉默。

customary.paraphrase: adj.习惯的，通常的，照惯例的；n.习惯法，风俗志

examples.en: It does not matter one whit to the customer.
examples.cn: 这对顾客来说一点关系都没有。

examples.en: Several manufacturers are also nibbling away at Ford's traditional customer base.
examples.cn: 几家制造商也在蚕食福特公司的传统客户群。

examples.en: When she had attempted to cut his nails he resisted.
examples.cn: 她试图给他剪指甲，他不让。

examples.en: Serve the cake warm or at room temperature, cut in squares.
examples.cn: 等蛋糕温热或凉至室温时切成四方块端上桌。

cut.paraphrase: vt.& vi.将（某物）切开（或分割）；vt.削减，剪切，切成，删剪；vi.电影，（为决定谁先出牌等）切牌，可被切割，可用于切割；n.切口，削减，剪裁，切片

examples.en: There was this girl, and I thought she was really cute.
examples.cn: 就是这个女孩，我认为她非常性感。

examples.en: She wasn't beautiful. But she was kind of cute.
examples.cn: 她不漂亮。但她有几分可爱。

cute.paraphrase: adj.漂亮的，娇小可爱的，机灵的，精明的，矫揉造作的

examples.en: She travels in cyberspace by sending messages to friends around the world.
examples.cn: 她利用电子空间给世界各地的朋友们发送信件.

examples.en: The Cyberspace is regarded as a 　 goal of future virtual reality.
examples.cn: 这个Cyberspace被认为是未来虚拟现实的目标.

cyberspace.paraphrase: n.（电子计算机创造的）通讯、信息空间

examples.en: There are a multitude of small quiet roads to cycle along.
examples.cn: 有很多可以骑车的宁静小路。

examples.en: The figures marked the final low point of the present economic cycle.
examples.cn: 这些数据显示了目前经济周期的最低点。

cycle.paraphrase: n.循环，周期，自行车，时代，一段时间，整套；vi.周而复始，循环，骑自行车，轮转；vt.运转，循环，使轮转

examples.en: The Daily Mail has the headline "The Voice of Conscience"
examples.cn: 《每日邮报》的头版标题为“良知的声音”。

examples.en: Be sure you get your daily quota of calcium.
examples.cn: 要确保每天的钙摄入量。

daily.paraphrase: adj.每日的，日常的，一日的，每日一次的，每个工作日的；n.日报，（不寄宿的）仆人，白天做家务的女佣；adv.每日，逐日，每周日，日复一日地

examples.en: The feeding of dairy cows has undergone a revolution.
examples.cn: 乳牛的喂养方法发生了巨大的改变。

examples.en: They ran the general store and the farm dairy.
examples.cn: 他们经营着杂货店和农场的乳品店。

dairy.paraphrase: n.牛奶场，乳品店，牛奶及乳品业；adj.牛奶的，奶制的，乳品的，乳品业的

examples.en: Breaking the dam could submerge downstream cities such as Wuhan.
examples.cn: 摧毁大坝可能会淹没下游城市，比如武汉。

examples.en: The dam will stand 600 feet high.
examples.cn: 大坝将高达600英尺。

dam.paraphrase: n.水坝，堰，水库，（牙科用的）橡皮障，〈比喻〉障碍；vt.用水坝阻止，阻塞，抑制

examples.en: It's a fair guess to say that the damage will be extensive.
examples.cn: 说损失会很严重想必猜得不错。

examples.en: The blast caused extensive damage, shattering the ground-floor windows.
examples.cn: 爆炸造成了巨大的破坏，震碎了一楼的窗户。

damage.paraphrase: vt.& vi.损害，毁坏；n.损害，损毁，赔偿金

examples.en: I couldn't make head nor tail of the damn film.
examples.cn: 这部该死的影片我一点儿都看不懂。

examples.en: "Wait a damn minute," Mindy spat. "Nobody said anything about staying overnight."
examples.cn: “该死的，等一下”，明迪愤愤地说道，“谁也没说过要过夜。”

damn.paraphrase: adv.非常，（表示厌烦）该死，讨厌，十足；vt.诅咒，谴责，指责，使…失败，[永世受罚，定罪；vi.诅咒，咒骂；n.一点也不，丝毫；adj.该死的，（表示厌烦）可恶的

examples.en: The bunk mattress was hard, the blankets prickly and slightly damp.
examples.cn: 这个铺位的床垫很硬，毯子也很扎人，而且还有点潮。

examples.en: If damp, musty buildings make you ill, mould is probably the cause.
examples.cn: 如果潮湿发霉的建筑令你生病了，霉菌很可能是病因。

damp.paraphrase: adj.微湿的，潮湿的，消沉的，沮丧的，沉闷的，情绪低落的；n.潮湿，消沉，失望，矿井瓦斯，有毒气体；vt.使潮湿，使泄气，使沮丧，抑制，阻抑，使减弱；vi.[物]阻尼，减幅

examples.en: Don't dampen the enthusiasm of the masses.
examples.cn: 不要损伤大家的积极性.

examples.en: His equivocal response has done nothing to dampen the speculation.
examples.cn: 他模棱两可的回应丝毫没有消除人们的猜疑。

dampen.paraphrase: vt.抑制，使潮湿，使…沮丧，隔音，防音；vi.变得潮湿，丧气

examples.en: They will dance two performances of Ashton's "Romeo and Juliet".
examples.cn: 他们将表演阿什顿的《罗密欧与朱丽叶》中的两场舞。

examples.en: He got up to strut his stuff on the dance-floor.
examples.cn: 他起身到舞池里炫耀自己的舞技。

dance.paraphrase: n.跳舞，舞会，舞蹈艺术，舞曲；vi.跳舞，手舞足蹈，摇晃，跳跃；vt.使跳舞

examples.en: If there is a danger of famine, we should help.
examples.cn: 如果有可能出现饥荒，我们应该提供帮助。

examples.en: The real danger is civil unrest in the east of the country.
examples.cn: 真正的危险是该国东部地区的民众动乱。

examples.en: He described the situation as very dangerous and called for resolute action.
examples.cn: 他将形势描述得非常危险，并号召采取果断行动。

examples.en: Dangerous undertows make swimming unsafe along most of the coastline.
examples.cn: 由于存在着危险的下层逆流，在大部分海岸线附近游泳都不安全。

examples.en: They established themselves between the Danube and Greece.
examples.cn: 他们在多瑙河和希腊之间定居下来.

examples.en: We drove via Lovech to the old Danube town of Ruse.
examples.cn: 我们开车经由洛维奇到达了多瑙河畔的古镇鲁塞。

examples.en: People always think I'm a fool, and I dare say they're right.
examples.cn: 人们总认为我是个傻瓜，想必他们是对的。

examples.en: Don't speak to me like that. Don't you dare.
examples.cn: 不要那样跟我讲话。我不允许！

dare.paraphrase: vt.敢，敢做，激（某人做某事），问（某人）有没有胆量（做某事）；vi.敢，敢于，大胆，无畏于；aux.敢，竟敢；n.激将，挑战

examples.en: I managed to keep my parents in the dark about this.
examples.cn: 我设法对父母瞒下了此事。

examples.en: He stared into the dark void where the battle had been fought.
examples.cn: 他凝望着那片漆黑的空旷之地，那次战役就是在这里进行的。

dark.paraphrase: adj.黑暗的，乌黑的，忧郁的，神秘的；n.黑暗，暗色，暗处

examples.en: Darling Neville, I couldn't be more pleased for you.
examples.cn: 亲爱的内维尔，我真太为你高兴了。

examples.en: Oat bran became the darling of health freaks last year.
examples.cn: 燕麦麸在去年成为保健狂人的最爱。

darling.paraphrase: n.（用作称呼）亲爱的，心爱的人，倍受宠爱的人，亲切友好的的人；adj.倍受喜爱的，可爱的，迷人的

examples.en: He's in a dash to get Russia back into Europe.
examples.cn: 他急于让俄罗斯回归欧洲。

examples.en: The Prince was driving with great fire and dash.
examples.cn: 王子潇洒威猛地驱车而行。

dash.paraphrase: vi.猛冲，赶紧离开；vt.猛撞，匆忙完成，泼溅，使…破灭；n.少量，些许，猛冲，破折号，短跑

examples.en: Other recommendations relate to the details of how such data is stored.
examples.cn: 其他建议涉及此类信息储存方面的一些细节。

examples.en: If they value these data, let them pay for them.
examples.cn: 他们要是看重这些数据，就让他们出钱买。

data.paraphrase: n.资料，材料，datum的复数，[计算机]数据，资料，从科学实验中提取的价值

examples.en: The Labour government has to date resisted all supplications.
examples.cn: 到目前为止工党政府回绝了所有的请愿求情。

examples.en: The community's links with Syria date back to biblical times.
examples.cn: 这个团体与叙利亚的关系可以追溯到《圣经》时代。

date.paraphrase: n.日期，日子，约会，时代，年代，（北非和西亚常见的海枣树的）海枣；vt.过时，使…显老，显示出…时代（或年龄），鉴定…的年代；vt.& vi.与人约会，相约；vi.属于某一特定时期，从某时起计算日期，记载日期，注有（或注明）日期

examples.en: It's plain that he adores his daughter, and the feeling is mutual.
examples.cn: 明摆着他很喜欢自己的女儿，而且女儿也喜欢他。

examples.en: His daughter was very active and noisy in the mornings.
examples.cn: 他的女儿一到上午就很好动，吵吵闹闹的。

daughter.paraphrase: n.女儿，产物，后代，（某地的）妇女，[生]子代；adj.女儿般的，[生]第一代的，子代的

examples.en: Danger did not daunt the hero.
examples.cn: 危险并没有吓倒这位英雄.

examples.en: Danger didn't daunt the hero.
examples.cn: 危险并没有吓住那英雄.

examples.en: A breakfast will be served to those who last out till dawn!
examples.cn: 坚持到天亮的能吃上早餐！

examples.en: I started work at dawn and returned only at nightfall.
examples.cn: 我披星戴月地工作。

dawn.paraphrase: n.黎明，拂晓，开端，醒悟；vi.破晓，（天）刚亮，开始出现，变得明朗；vt.（开始）被理解，被领悟，被看清，被想到

examples.en: Someone comes in every day to check all is in order.
examples.cn: 每天都有人来检查是否一切都井然有序。

examples.en: Try these toning exercises before you start the day.
examples.cn: 在开始一天的活动之前，试着做做这些强身健体的体操。

day.paraphrase: n.一天，白天，时期，节日；adj.日间的，逐日的；adv.每天，经常在白天地

daylight.paraphrase: n.日光，白昼，清早，黎明，公开，发表，<俚>眼睛，视力

examples.en: Mr Pearson said he knew nothing of his wife's daytime habits.
examples.cn: 皮尔逊先生说，他对妻子白天的生活习惯一无所知。

examples.en: Daytime television tended to remind her too forcefully of her own situation.
examples.cn: 日间电视节目往往使她深刻地认识到自身的境况。

examples.en: It's a long time since I went out on the razzle - dazzle, but your birthday will be a wonderful excuse.
examples.cn: 我好久没出去找乐子了, 你过生日倒是一个好借口.

examples.en: The movie's special effects fail to dazzle.
examples.cn: 这部电影的特效未能出彩。

dazzle.paraphrase: vt.使目眩，使惊异不已；n.耀眼，眩惑，灿烂；vt.& vi.目眩，赞叹

examples.en: The loading bay seemed dazzlingly bright.
examples.cn: 装货区看上去灯火通明。

examples.en: The view was dazzlingly beautiful.
examples.cn: 景色美轮美奂。

examples.en: But that doesn't mean this brand of politics is dead or dying.
examples.cn: 但那并不意味着这种政治主张已经或正在消亡。

examples.en: "That is correct, Meg," he answered in his cold, dead voice.
examples.cn: “没错，梅格。”他用冰冷、阴沉的声音答道。

dead.paraphrase: adj.死去的，完全的，无感觉的，呆板的；adv.完全地，非常，绝对，极度；n.死者，（死一样的）寂静，极寒时候

examples.en: We were still right on target for our deadline.
examples.cn: 我们仍然有可能赶在最后期限前达成目标。

examples.en: We were not able to meet the deadline because of manufacturing delays.
examples.cn: 因为制造方面的延误，我们没能赶上最后期限。

deadline.paraphrase: n.最后期限，截止期限，死线，原稿截止时间；vt.通过设定一时间期限来统治

examples.en: Broadcast news was accurate and reliable but deadly dull.
examples.cn: 新闻广播准确可靠但却非常枯燥。

examples.en: She took the gun and blazed away with calm and deadly accuracy.
examples.cn: 她拿起枪，冷静地连续射击，弹无虚发。

deadly.paraphrase: adj.极端的，非常的，致命的，致死的，非常有效的，如死一般的；adv.极其，非常，死了一样地

examples.en: I'm quite deaf — you'll have to speak up.
examples.cn: 我耳背——你得大声说。

examples.en: He has turned a resolutely deaf ear to American demands for action.
examples.cn: 他对美国提出的行动要求完全不理不睬。

deal.paraphrase: vt.[牌戏]分，分配，经营，施予；n.（一笔）交易，许多，待遇，发牌；vi.论述，（有效地或成功地）处理，惩处，交易；adj.冷杉木制的，松木制的

examples.en: They aim to clear every dealer from the street.
examples.cn: 他们打算把街上所有的毒品贩子都清走。

examples.en: His heir sold the painting to the London art dealer Agnews.
examples.cn: 他的继承人把这幅画卖给了伦敦艺术品经销商阿格纽斯。

dealer.paraphrase: n.商人，发牌人，庄家，以某种方式待人的人，经销商

examples.en: I'll lay odds that Dean is at your office right now.
examples.cn: 我敢打赌迪安现在就在你办公室。

examples.en: She was Dean of the Science faculty at Sophia University.
examples.cn: 她是上智大学科学院的院长。

dean.paraphrase: n.（大学的）学院院长，系主任，教务长，[宗]主任牧师，（大学，尤指牛津、剑桥大学的）学监

examples.en: "Could I have a word?" — "Oh dear, if you must."
examples.cn: “我能说一句吗？”——“亲爱的，如果你非说不可的话，好吧。”

examples.en: Outside, Bruce glanced at his watch: "Dear me, nearly oneo'clock."
examples.cn: 出了门，布鲁斯瞥了一眼自己的手表，“天哪，快一点了。”

dear.paraphrase: adj.亲爱的，敬爱的，昂贵的，严厉的；n.亲爱的人，宠物；int.哎；adv.高价地，疼爱地，贵

examples.en: Bishop Daly said he was devastated by news of the Cardinal's death.
examples.cn: 戴利主教说他听到红衣主教去世的消息后感到极为震惊和难过。

examples.en: A young man plunged from a sheer rock face to his death.
examples.cn: 一名男青年从陡峭的岩壁上坠崖身亡。

death.paraphrase: n.死亡，（某种）死法，死亡方式，病危，死神

examples.en: You must not debase yourself by such behavior.
examples.cn: 你不可以这样的行为来降低自己的人格.

examples.en: Lower and debase myself for the amusement of strangers?
examples.cn: 丑化自己去娱乐那些我完全不认识的人?

debase.paraphrase: vt.降低质量（地位、价格等），降低（硬币的）价值，贬值

examples.en: His comments are bound to add fuel to the debate.
examples.cn: 他的话必将为争论推波助澜。

examples.en: There needs to be a properly informed public debate.
examples.cn: 有必要让公众在充分知情的状况下展开辩论。

debate.paraphrase: n.讨论，辩论，争论，辩论；vt.& vi.辩论，仔细考虑，思考，盘算

examples.en: Spencer waded through the debris of broken chairs and beer bottles.
examples.cn: 斯潘塞艰难地迈过一堆破椅子和碎啤酒瓶。

examples.en: The streets are still full of debris from two nights of rioting.
examples.cn: 街道上仍到处可见连续两晚的骚乱留下的残迹。

debris.paraphrase: n.碎片，残骸，残渣，[地]岩屑，垃圾，破片

examples.en: The Commonwealth Development Corporation has agreed to reschedule Tanzania's debt.
examples.cn: 英联邦开发公司已经同意推迟坦桑尼亚的债务偿还时间。

examples.en: The plan is designed to reduce some of the company's mountainous debt.
examples.cn: 该计划旨在减少公司堆积如山的债务。

debt.paraphrase: n.债务，负债情况，义务，罪，过失

examples.en: She was scarcely 18 when she made her debut.
examples.cn: 首次出镜时，她刚满18岁。

examples.en: His debut album was hugely successful Stateside.
examples.cn: 他的首张专辑在美国获得了巨大成功。

debut.paraphrase: n.初次露面，初次表演，首次出场，处女秀；v.初次表演，初次登台；adj.首张的，首场的，首次的

examples.en: Breakfast television arrived in British life precisely a decade ago.
examples.cn: 准确地说，早间电视节目于10年前进入英国人的生活。

examples.en: A decade later, the company has gone from strength to strength.
examples.cn: 十年后，该公司已经逐渐壮大。

decade.paraphrase: n.十年，十年间，十个一组，十年期

decay.paraphrase: vt.& vi.（使）腐烂，腐朽；vi.衰败，衰退，衰落；n.腐败、衰退的状态

examples.en: He was accused of lies and deceit.
examples.cn: 他被指控撒谎和欺诈。

examples.en: They accused him of weaving a web of lies and deceit.
examples.cn: 他们指控他编织了一个满是谎言和欺诈的骗局。

examples.en: The boys, if my eyes did not deceive me, were praying.
examples.cn: 如果我没有看错的话，那些男孩子正在祈祷。

examples.en: Don't try to deceive me.
examples.cn: 你别诳我.

examples.en: Last December they hunted down and killed one of the gangsters.
examples.cn: 去年12月他们追捕到其中一名匪徒并将其击毙。

examples.en: Their first car rolls off the production line on December 16.
examples.cn: 他们的第一辆车于12月16日下线。

examples.en: I went to Brooks Brothers and bought myself a decent shirt.
examples.cn: 我去布鲁克斯兄弟专卖店给自己买了一件体面的衬衫。

examples.en: You need hard currency to get anything halfway decent.
examples.cn: 你得有硬通货才能买到还算不错的东西。

decent.paraphrase: adj.正派的，得体的，（服装等）相称的，合宜的，相当好的

examples.en: Human beings have an infinite capacity for self-deception.
examples.cn: 人类自欺的本事是无穷的。

examples.en: He was abetted in the deception by his wife.
examples.cn: 他行骗是受了妻子的怂恿。

examples.en: A dentist may decide to extract the tooth to prevent recurrent trouble.
examples.cn: 牙医可能会决定拔掉那颗牙，以免反复发作。

examples.en: He might decide that it is best to induce labour.
examples.cn: 他也许决定最好引产。

decide.paraphrase: vt.决定，决心，解决，裁决；vi.决定，下决心

examples.en: In 1971, the 1p and 2p decimal coins were introduced in Britain.
examples.cn: 英国于1971年开始使用十进制的1便士和2便士硬币。

examples.en: The decimal 0.61 stands for 61 hundredths.
Ministers took the floor to denounce the decision to suspend constitutional rule.
examples.cn: 几位部长发言谴责暂停宪制的决定。

examples.en: There has been a very mixed reaction to the decision.
examples.cn: 对于这个决定的反应非常不一致。

decision.paraphrase: n.决定，果断，决议，（法院的）判决；vt.[口语][拳击]靠判定击败（对手）

examples.en: They were outplayed by the Colombians' slick passing and decisive finishing.
examples.cn: 哥伦比亚队凭借流畅的传球和终场前的制胜进球击败了他们。

examples.en: I work very efficiently and am decisive, and accurate in my judgement.
examples.cn: 我工作非常有效率，处事果断，而且判断准确。

decisive.paraphrase: adj.决定性的，坚定的，果断的，决断的

examples.en: Steamers tooted at us as sailors on deck waved in amusement.
examples.cn: 汽船向我们嘟嘟鸣笛时，甲板上的水手们饶有趣味地挥着手。

examples.en: This boat has a good deck layout making everything easy to operate.
examples.cn: 这艘船的甲板布局合理，使得所有操控都很方便。

deck.paraphrase: n.甲板，舱板，[建]平屋顶，桥面，[铁路]客车车顶，〈俚〉地面；vt.装饰，给…铺上甲板，打扮

examples.en: On the customs declaration, the sender labeled the freight as agricultural machinery.
examples.cn: 在报关单上，寄货人将货物列为农用机械。

examples.en: Some delegates believe the final declaration is likely to be too timorous.
examples.cn: 一些代表认为最后的声明可能不够强硬。

declaration.paraphrase: n.宣言，布告，公告，声明，（纳税品在海关的）申报，[法]（原告的）申诉，（证人的）陈述，口供，[牌]摊牌，叫牌

declare.paraphrase: vt.宣布，声明，声称，申报，[法]供述；vi.声明，发表宣言，宣称

examples.en: The electoral fortunes of the Liberal Democratic party may decline.
examples.cn: 自由民主党的选举运势可能会下降。

examples.en: After years of neglect and decline the city was cleaning itself up.
examples.cn: 多年的玩忽职守和经济萧条过后，这个城市在进行自我整顿。

decline.paraphrase: n.下降，（力量、健康、品格、权力、价值等的）衰退，下倾，（人、生命等的）衰退期；vt.& vi.辞谢，谢绝（邀请等）；vi.（道路、物体等）下倾，（太阳）落下，（在品格、价值上）降低，衰落，谢绝；vt.谢绝，婉拒

examples.en: About 60,000 subscribers have special adapters to receive and decode the signals.
examples.cn: 大约6万用户拥有特殊的适配器来接收和转换信号。

examples.en: You don't need a Ph.D to decode their work, but they do try to challenge audiences with unconventional material.
examples.cn: 解读他们的作品并不需要有博士学位，但他们的确在尝试用一些非传统素材来挑战观众的接受度。

decode.paraphrase: vt.译（码），解（码），分析及译解电子信号

examples.en: Use shells to decorate boxes, trays, mirrors or even pots.
examples.cn: 用贝壳来装点盒子、托盘、镜子甚至是花盆。

examples.en: How could we decorate the room to liven it up?
examples.cn: 我们怎么才能把这房间装饰得更有生气呢？

decorate.paraphrase: vt.装饰，点缀，粉刷，授予（某人）勋章；vi.装饰，布置

examples.en: His genius was not confined to the decoration of buildings.
examples.cn: 他的天赋不单体现在建筑物的装饰上。

examples.en: The most arresting feature is the painted wall decoration.
examples.cn: 最醒目的特点是绘有图画的墙面装饰。

decoration.paraphrase: n.装饰，装潢，装饰品，装饰图案，装饰风格，奖章

examples.en: The demand for tea is on the decrease ( each year ).
examples.cn: 茶叶的需求量 ( 逐年 ) 递减.

examples.en: The prices of polymers and suchlike materials will decrease.
examples.cn: 聚合物及类似材料的价格会下降。

decrease.paraphrase: n.减少，减小，减少量；vi.&vt.减少，减小

examples.en: She vowed to herself that she would dedicate her life to scientific studies.
examples.cn: 她默默地发誓要献身于科学研究.

examples.en: To my father I dedicate this volume in token of affection and gratitude.
examples.cn: 我谨以此书献给我的父亲,以表示对他的爱戴和感激之情.

dedicate.paraphrase: vt.奉献，献身，（为表示感情或敬意将著作、乐曲、艺术作品等）题献给（某人、某事业等）(to)，（在书、音乐或作品的前部）题献辞，以…供奉

examples.en: We can deduce a conclusion from the premise.
examples.cn: 我们可以从这个前提推出结论.

examples.en: Can we deduce from your silence that you do not approve?
examples.cn: 你保持沉默，我们是否可以据此而推断出你不赞成？

deduce.paraphrase: vt.推论，推断，演绎，追溯根源

examples.en: It is not the bank's policy to deduct interest on withdrawals.
examples.cn: 提款需扣除利息这并非是本银行的政策.

examples.en: In special cases, a husband can deduct the travel expenses of his wife who accompanies him on a business trip.
examples.cn: 在特殊情况下，丈夫可以扣除陪同出差的妻子的旅费。

examples.en: A man's deed is the touchstone of his greatness or littleness.
examples.cn: 行动是一个人伟大或者渺小的试金石.

examples.en: Smith changed his name by deed poll to Jervis-Smith.
examples.cn: 史密斯通过单边契据将自己的名字更改为杰维斯&dash1;史密斯。

deed.paraphrase: n.行为，行动，<律>契约，证书；v.立契转让

examples.en: I deem it an honour to accept your invitation.
examples.cn: 承蒙您的邀请,我觉得很荣幸.

examples.en: Don't you deem that it is your duty to help?
examples.cn: 你不认为助人是你的责任 吗 ?

deem.paraphrase: vt.认为，视为，主张，断定；vi.认为，视为，以为，作某种评价

examples.en: The economy remains deep in recession with few signs of a pick-up.
examples.cn: 经济仍深陷衰退之中，几乎没有好转的迹象。

examples.en: Deep down, she supported her husband'sinvolvement in the organization.
examples.cn: 在心底里，她支持丈夫参加这个组织。

deep.paraphrase: adj.深的，深远的，深奥，重大的，深刻的，强烈的，痛切的，深厚的；n.深处，深渊；adv.深深地，深入地

examples.en: The default is usually the setting that most users would probably choose.
examples.cn: 默认选项通常是大多数用户都会选择的设置。

examples.en: Death, not life, is the default state of cells.
examples.cn: 细胞的常态是死亡而不是存活。

default.paraphrase: vi.未履行任务或责任，受传唤时未出庭，由于不到庭而败诉，弃权；vt.未履行，拖欠，未参加或完成（例如，比赛），[法]因未到庭而败（诉）；n.未履行，拖欠，[法]未到庭，弃权，[计] 缺省，默认

examples.en: After the pain of defeat passes, England have some thinking to do.
examples.cn: 失败的痛苦过去以后，英国人应该认真反思一下。

examples.en: Sampdoria lost their unbeaten record with a 2-1 home defeat against Genoa.
examples.cn: 桑普多利亚队主场1比2负于热那亚队之后，终止了自己的不败纪录。

defeat.paraphrase: vt.击败，战胜，挫败，[法]宣告无效，作废；n.战胜，失败，[法]废除

examples.en: Stammering is probably an inherited defect.
examples.cn: 口吃很可能是一种遗传性缺陷。

examples.en: The defect in the drainage must be remedied.
examples.cn: 这排水系统的缺陷该设法补救.

defect.paraphrase: n.瑕疵，毛病，欠缺，缺点；vi.叛逃，背叛

examples.en: It is quite clear that we were firing in self defence.
examples.cn: 事实很清楚，我们开枪是出于自卫。

examples.en: The defence counsel warned that the judge should stop the trial.
examples.cn: 被告辩护律师强烈建议法官应该休庭。

defence.paraphrase: n.辩护，防御，防御工事，后卫

examples.en: Torrence expects to defend her title successfully in the next Olympics.
examples.cn: 托伦斯希望在下届奥运会上能够卫冕成功。

examples.en: Those people who took up weapons to defend themselves are political prisoners.
examples.cn: 那些拿起武器自卫的人是些政治犯。

defend.paraphrase: vt.& vi.辩护，保卫，（足球、曲棍球等）防守，进行辩护

examples.en: The defendant asked for 21 similar offences to be taken into account.
examples.cn: 被告要求考虑到类似的21起违法行为的情况。

examples.en: He overturned the conviction, saying the defendant was entrapped.
examples.cn: 他声称被告是被诱骗的，从而推翻了有罪的判决。

defendant.paraphrase: n.[法]被告人；adj.[法]被告的，辩护的

examples.en: Is abortion morally defensible?
examples.cn: 堕胎从道德上讲合乎情理吗？

examples.en: Economic activities were seen as the only defensible form of American involvement abroad.
examples.cn: 经济活动被认为是美国插手海外的唯一可以辩护的形式.

examples.en: We will defer to whatever the committee decides.
examples.cn: 我们遵从委员会作出的任何决定.

examples.en: We wish to defer our decision until next week.
examples.cn: 我们希望推迟到下星期再作出决定.

defer.paraphrase: vt.使推迟，使延期，拖延，推迟，[军]使延期入伍；vi.服从，延期，推迟

examples.en: They did blood tests on him for signs of vitamin deficiency.
examples.cn: 他们给他验了血，以检查是否有维生素缺乏的迹象。

examples.en: Symptoms of anaemia include weakness, fatigue and iron deficiency.
examples.cn: 贫血的症状包括虚弱、疲劳和缺铁。

deficiency.paraphrase: n.缺乏，不足，缺点，缺陷，不足额

examples.en: By 1973 the government deficit equalled thirty per cent of GNP.
examples.cn: 到1973年，政府财政赤字相当于国民生产总值的30%。

examples.en: These will be very constrained budgets designed to get the deficit down.
examples.cn: 这些预算旨在减少赤字，将会大大受限。

examples.en: It's hard to define exactly what has changed.
examples.cn: 很难解释清楚到底发生了什么变化.

examples.en: Please listen while I define your duties.
examples.cn: 在我规定你的职责时,请仔细听好.

define.paraphrase: vt.规定，使明确，精确地解释，画出…的线条；vi.（给词、短语等）下定义，构成释义

examples.en: Her Royal Highness has definite views about most things.
examples.cn: 女王陛下对大多数事情都有明确的观点。

examples.en: Mary is very definite about this.
examples.cn: 玛丽对此非常肯定。

definite.paraphrase: adj.明确的，一定的，肯定，有把握

examples.en: It all depends on your definition of punk, doesn'tit?
examples.cn: “这全视乎你对朋克摇滚乐的定义，不是吗？”

examples.en: Give your brows extra definition with Outdoor Girl'sEyebrow Pencil in Brown.
examples.cn: 用“户外女孩”品牌的棕色眉笔更加清晰地勾勒出眉形。

definition.paraphrase: n.定义，规定，明确，[物]清晰度，解释

examples.en: I wouldn't have dared to defy my teachers.
examples.cn: 我可不敢不听老师的话。

examples.en: Her criteria defy analysis.
examples.cn: 她的标准让人搞不明白。

defy.paraphrase: vt.不服从，公然反抗，蔑视，向…挑战；n.挑战，对抗

examples.en: Will too much freedom make them degenerate?
examples.cn: 太多的自由会令他们堕落 吗 ?

examples.en: The newly emerging forces are bound to defeat what is corrupt and degenerate.
examples.cn: 新生力量必然战胜腐朽力量.

degenerate.paraphrase: adj.退化的，堕落的，变质的，变性的；vt.使退化，恶化，使变质，衰减；vi.退化，堕落；n.堕落的人，腐化的人，精神变态者，退化的动物

degree.paraphrase: n.[乐]音阶，度，[数]度，度数，程度，学位

examples.en: The time delay would be smaller by eight orders of magnitude.
examples.cn: 如果按8个数量级来看，延时量会显得小一些。

examples.en: How much delay should we build into the plan?
examples.cn: 我们应该为这个计划预留多少富余的时间？

delay.paraphrase: n.延迟，拖延，耽搁，被耽搁或推迟的时间；vt.延期，推迟，耽搁；vi.延缓，延期

examples.en: The delegate moved for a reconsideration of the suggestion.
examples.cn: 这位代表提议重新考虑这一建议.

examples.en: Horton's Achilles heel was that he could not delegate.
examples.cn: 霍顿的软肋在于他不懂得放权。

delegate.paraphrase: n.代表，代表团成员；vt.委派代表，授权给，[法律]债务转移

examples.en: Delete what is dispensable and give more prominence to the essentials.
examples.cn: 可以不说的去掉,该说的就可以更突出.

examples.en: Select "Delete all" from the drop-down list.
examples.cn: 在下拉列表项中选择“全部删除”。

examples.en: The Deputy Commander has condemned this weekend's protest as deliberate provocation.
examples.cn: 副指挥官谴责本周末的抗议活动是蓄意挑衅。

examples.en: He got sent off for deliberate handball in the 32nd minute.
examples.cn: 他在第32分钟时因故意手球犯规被罚下场。

deliberate.paraphrase: adj.故意的，蓄意的，深思熟虑的，慎重的；vt.权衡；vi.熟虑，商讨

examples.en: With almost evangelical fervour, Marks warns against deliberately seeking a tan.
examples.cn: 几乎是凭着一股疯狂的热情，马克斯警告人们不要刻意追求晒成一身古铜色。

examples.en: The police deliberately kept a low profile in most places.
examples.cn: 警方在大多数地方有意保持低调。

deliberately.paraphrase: adv.故意地，深思熟虑地，从容不迫地

examples.en: Although the coral looks hard, it is very delicate.
examples.cn: 珊瑚虽然看上去坚固，实际上非常易碎。

examples.en: Its large leaves often show a delicate purple tint.
examples.cn: 它的大叶子往往带点紫色。

delicate.paraphrase: adj.微妙的，熟练的，纤弱的，易损的

examples.en: Chick peas have a distinctive, delicious and nutty flavour.
examples.cn: 鹰嘴豆有独特可口的坚果风味。

examples.en: Traditional Spanish food is delicious and its specialities are worth searching out.
examples.cn: 传统的西班牙食品美味可口，其特色菜肴值得寻访。

delicious.paraphrase: adj.美味的，可口的，有趣的，，喷香

examples.en: The British team did not disguise their delight at their success.
examples.cn: 英国队毫不掩饰他们获胜的喜悦。

examples.en: Good day to you, Bernard! It's a positive delight to see you.
examples.cn: 你好，伯纳德！见到你真高兴。

delight.paraphrase: n.快乐，高兴，使人高兴的东西或人；vt.使高兴，使欣喜；vi.感到高兴[快乐]

examples.en: The authorities are at their wits'end about juvenile delinquency.
examples.cn: 当局对青少年犯罪束手无策.

examples.en: We can curb juvenile delinquency by education.
examples.cn: 我们可以通过教育来控制少年犯罪.

delinquency.paraphrase: n.不法行为，少年罪犯，过失， 罪过

examples.en: I have orders to deliver it to Mr Demiris personally.
examples.cn: 我奉命要把它送给德米里斯先生本人。

examples.en: As long as I deliver the goods, my boss is very happy.
examples.cn: 只要我做好本职工作，我的老板就很高兴。

deliver.paraphrase: vt.发表，递送，交付，使分娩；vi.投递，传送

examples.en: His speeches were magnificently written but his delivery was hopeless.
examples.cn: 他的发言稿写得非常精彩，但他的演讲风格真是无可救药。

examples.en: Use recorded delivery for large cheques or money orders.
examples.cn: 对于大额的支票和汇款单要使用挂号邮寄。

delivery.paraphrase: n.传送，投递，[法]（正式）交付，分娩，讲演

examples.en: He was much in demand as a lecturer in the US.
examples.cn: 他的讲座在美国很受欢迎。

examples.en: The fusty old establishment refused to recognise the demand for popular music.
examples.cn: 这一古板的老旧机构拒绝承认人们对流行音乐的需求。

demand.paraphrase: vt.要求，请求，需要，[法]召唤，询问，盘问；n.需求，需要，要求，请求，销路；vi.需要，请求，查问

examples.en: He said parliament and the process of democracy had been debased.
examples.cn: 他说议会和民主程序已遭贬值。

examples.en: The person who embodies democracy at the local level is the mayor.
examples.cn: 在地方上代表民主的人是市长。

democracy.paraphrase: n.民众，民主国家，民主主义，民主政治

examples.en: The Democratic candidate is still leading in the polls.
examples.cn: 民主党候选人的得票数依然领先。

examples.en: The Social Democratic Party has sunk without trace at these elections.
examples.cn: 社会民主党在这些选举中已销声匿迹。

democratic.paraphrase: adj.民主的，民主政体的，民主主义的，<美>民主党的

examples.en: Demographer William Frey says immigrants with young families will help keep the United States competitive.
examples.cn: 人口统计学家佛瑞表示这些年轻的家庭会帮助美国保持竞争力.

examples.en: Professor Antonio Golini is a demographer at the University of Rome.
examples.cn: 罗马大学安东尼奥教授是位人口统计学家.

examples.en: Most of our listeners are in the 25-39 demographic.
examples.cn: 我们的大多数听众都属于25至39岁这个年龄段。

examples.en: These demographic changes help to create a virtuous circle of growth.
examples.cn: 人口结构的变化有助于创造一个良性的增长循环.

demographic.paraphrase: adj.人口统计学的，人口统计的

examples.en: The government'sgoing to great lengths to demonstrate its military might.
examples.cn: 该政府正不遗余力地展示其军事力量。

examples.en: These designs demonstrate her unerring eye for colour and detail.
examples.cn: 这些设计体现了她对颜色和细节的精准眼光。

demonstrate.paraphrase: vt.证明，证实，论证，显示，展示，演示，说明；vi.示威游行

examples.en: Either the Soviets sensed an imminent victory or they feared the approaching demoralization of their clients.
examples.cn: 要么是苏联人感到胜利已经呼之欲出,要么是他们担心他们的被保护人的士气行将崩溃.

examples.en: Top military leaders say there have been reports of demoralization in the ranks.
examples.cn: 最高军事指挥说有报告称士兵中出现了士气低落。

demoralization.paraphrase: n.道德败坏，纪律松弛，士气消沉

examples.en: The Foreign Ministry has issued a flat denial of any involvement.
examples.cn: 外交部已经坚决否认参与过此事。

examples.en: This does not justify the denial of constitutional protection.
examples.cn: 这不能成为剥夺他人受宪法保护权利的正当理由。

denial.paraphrase: n.否认，否定，克制，拒绝，拒绝接受

examples.en: Sometime the term artesian is used to denote a confined aquifer.
examples.cn: 有时候人们也用自流含水层这一术语表示承压含水层.

examples.en: Red eyes denote strain and fatigue.
examples.cn: 眼睛充血表明压力过大、身心疲惫。

denounce.paraphrase: vt.公开指责，正式指控，告发，通告废除

examples.en: They walked through the dense Mozambican bush for thirty six hours.
examples.cn: 他们花了36个小时穿过茂密的莫桑比克丛林。

examples.en: Dense smoke swirled and billowed, its rank fumes choking her.
examples.cn: 滚滚浓烟盘旋翻腾，恶臭味呛得她喘不过气来。

dense.paraphrase: adj.密集的，稠密的，浓密的，浓厚的，愚钝的

examples.en: Mercury has a much greater density than water.
examples.cn: 水银的密度比水大得多.

examples.en: the density of a gas
examples.cn: 一种气体的密度

density.paraphrase: n.密度，稠密，浓厚，[物]浓度，比重，愚钝

examples.en: I know it's a good idea to use dental floss.
examples.cn: 我知道用洁牙线是一个好主意。

examples.en: The coroner recorded a verdict of acci-dental death.
examples.cn: 验尸官作出了意外死亡的结论。

dental.paraphrase: adj.牙齿的，牙科的，（辅音）齿音的；n.齿音

examples.en: Think of the clammy hands you get when you visit the dentist!
examples.cn: 想想你去看牙医时那双黏糊糊的手！

examples.en: A dentist may decide to extract the tooth to prevent recurrent trouble.
examples.cn: 牙医可能会决定拔掉那颗牙，以免反复发作。

examples.en: I would not want to deny them a harmless pleasure.
examples.cn: 我不想剥夺他们这点无伤大雅的乐趣。

examples.en: Who can deny his stature as the world's greatest cellist?
examples.cn: 谁能否认他是世界上最伟大的大提琴演奏家呢？

deny.paraphrase: vt.拒绝，拒绝承认，拒绝…占有，否认知情

examples.en: My connecting plane didn't depart for another six hours.
examples.cn: 我搭乘的联运航班又过了6个小时才起飞。

examples.en: We do depart for Wales on the morrow.
examples.cn: 我们明天确实要前往威尔士。

depart.paraphrase: v.离开，出发，去世，离职，脱轨

examples.en: She appears nightly on the television news, speaking for the State Department.
examples.cn: 她作为国务院的发言人，每晚都会出现在电视新闻中。

examples.en: Officials at the State Department say the issue is urgent.
examples.cn: 国务院官员说该问题很急迫。

department.paraphrase: n.部门，部，系，学部，知识范围，车间

examples.en: Just phone in your order three or more days prior to departure.
examples.cn: 在出发的三天之前打电话预订即可。

examples.en: They checked in their luggage and found seats in the departure lounge.
examples.cn: 他们办完行李托运，到候机室找了座位坐下。

departure.paraphrase: n.离开，离去，起程，背离，东西距离

examples.en: Remember, happiness doesn't depend upon who you are or what you have; it depends solely upon what you think.--Dale Carnegie
examples.cn: 请记住，幸福不在于你是谁或者你拥有什么，而仅仅取决于你的心态！

examples.en: They depend on the goodwill of visitors to pick up rubbish.
examples.cn: 他们相信游客会自觉捡起垃圾。

examples.en: Many sufferers have been reclaimed from a dependence on alcohol.
examples.cn: 许多嗜酒成癖的受害者已经被挽救过来.

examples.en: He was freed from financial dependence on his parents.
examples.cn: 他在经济上摆脱了对父母的依赖.

examples.en: We worried about his dependency on his mother.
examples.cn: 我们担心他可能对母亲太过依赖。

examples.en: In 1985, he began to show signs of alcohol and drug dependency.
examples.cn: 在1985年，他开始表现出酗酒嗜毒的迹象。

examples.en: She had grown ever more peevishly dependent on him.
examples.cn: 她脾气变得更坏，对他的依赖更重了。

examples.en: Matt is weak and dependent, but you love him all the same.
examples.cn: 马特软弱无能且依赖性强，但我们照样爱他。

dependent.paraphrase: adj.依靠的，依赖的，取决于…的，有瘾的；n.受抚养人，受赡养者，依赖他人者，扈从，侍从

examples.en: The media depict him as a left-wing bogeyman.
examples.cn: 媒体把他描述成一个左翼大反派。

examples.en: Some nationalists would like to depict the British monarchy as a purely English institution.
examples.cn: 一些民族主义者喜欢把英国的君主政体描绘为纯粹的英格兰制度。

examples.en: What they find could provide clues to what might happen worldwide if ozone depletion continues.
examples.cn: 他们的发现可以揭示如果臭氧持续减少，世界范围内可能会出现什么情况。

examples.en: Increased consumption of water has led to rapid depletion of groundwater reserves.
examples.cn: 用水量的增加导致了地下水贮备迅速枯竭.

examples.en: We deplore the accident.
examples.cn: 我们对这一事故深感遗憾.

examples.en: Like everyone else, I deplore and condemn this killing.
examples.cn: 我同所有人一样强烈谴责这桩凶杀案。

deplore.paraphrase: vt.悲悼，哀叹，谴责，强烈反对

examples.en: This is more like a downpayment, or a deposit, if you like.
examples.cn: 这更像是首付，也可以说是定金。

examples.en: Dermot's putting his money by, in a Deposit Account.
examples.cn: 德莫特把钱存在一个定期存款账户里。

deposit.paraphrase: n.储蓄，存款，保证金，沉淀物，寄存，寄存品；vt.&vi.储蓄，寄存，放置，安置，付保证金；vi.沉淀

examples.en: The car value will depreciate by 2000 dollars in the first year.
examples.cn: 汽车在第一年将减值大约2000美元.

examples.en: New cars start to depreciate as soon as they are on the road.
examples.cn: 新车一上路就开始贬值。

depreciate.paraphrase: vi.贬值，跌价，轻视；vt.<正>贬低，轻视，使贬值

examples.en: The rainy days always depress me.
examples.cn: 雨天总是使我沮丧.

examples.en: I know he is too optimistic but I don't want to depress him.
examples.cn: 我知道他太过乐观了，但我不想令他灰心丧气。

depress.paraphrase: vt.压下，压低，使沮丧，使萧条，使跌价

examples.en: When depressed, they dramatically overindulge in chocolate and sweets.
examples.cn: 情绪低落的时候，她们就疯狂地猛吃巧克力和糖果。

examples.en: The construction industry is no longer as depressed as it was.
examples.cn: 建筑业不再像以往那样萧条了。

depressed.paraphrase: adj.情绪低落的，沮丧的，萧条的，下陷的，低的，中间凹下的；v.压下(depress的过去式和过去分词)，使愁苦，降低（价格），使跌价

examples.en: You even want to deprive us of the freedom of our hearts.
examples.cn: 我们心里的自由你都要剥夺了.

examples.en: To deprive the boy of his education is a violation of state law.
examples.cn: 剥夺这个男孩受教育的权利是一种违反国家法律的行为。

examples.en: Mr Gibson is clearly intellectually out of his depth.
examples.cn: 吉布森先生显然才智不逮。

examples.en: White wines tend to gain depth of colour with age.
examples.cn: 白葡萄酒年头愈久，颜色愈深。

depth.paraphrase: n.深度，深处，深海，深奥，奥妙，进深

examples.en: The Deputy Commander has condemned this weekend's protest as deliberate provocation.
examples.cn: 副指挥官谴责本周末的抗议活动是蓄意挑衅。

examples.en: He was given the title of deputy prime minister.
examples.cn: 他被授予副总理之职。

deputy.paraphrase: n.副手，代理人，代表；adj.副的，代理的

examples.en: Most patients derive enjoyment from leafing through old picture albums.
examples.cn: 大多数病人都很喜欢翻看旧相册。

examples.en: Nor does scientific knowledge derive straightforwardly from experiments and observations.
examples.cn: 科学知识也并非简单地从试验和观察中得来。

derive.paraphrase: vt.& vi.得到，导出，源于，来自，（从…中）提取

examples.en: She's got too much dignity to descend to writing anonymous letters.
examples.cn: 她是个自尊心很强的人，绝不会自贬身份去写匿名信。

examples.en: Things are cooler and more damp as we descend to the cellar.
examples.cn: 当我们往下走去地窖时，四周愈见阴冷潮湿。

descend.paraphrase: v.下来，下降 ，下斜，降临，突然造访

examples.en: His design was a descendant of a 1956 device.
examples.cn: 他的设计是从一个1956年的装置衍生而来的。

examples.en: He was an O'Conor and a direct descendant of the last High King of Ireland.
examples.cn: 他属于奥康纳家族，是爱尔兰最后一位君王的嫡系后裔。

descendant.paraphrase: n.后代，后裔，（由过去类似物发展来的）派生物，弟子；adj.下降的，祖传的

examples.en: Two men answer-ing the description of the suspects tried to enter Switzerland.
examples.cn: 与描述的疑犯样子相符的两名男子试图进入瑞士。

examples.en: Her description of the nature and action of poisons is amazingly accurate.
examples.cn: 他对一些毒药的性质和作用的描述惊人地准确。

examples.en: The vehicles have been modified to suit conditions in the desert.
examples.cn: 车辆已改装过以适应沙漠的环境。

examples.en: The paper'sprice rise will encourage readers to desert in even greater numbers.
examples.cn: 报纸价格的上涨将导致更多的读者不再订阅。

desert.paraphrase: n.沙漠，荒地，应得的赏罚，功劳，美德；adj.沙漠的，荒芜的，不毛的，无人的

examples.en: He does deserve some good luck after so much wretchedness.
examples.cn: 经过这么多苦难之后，他应该行点好运了。

examples.en: Clare did not deserve the vilification she had been subjected to.
examples.cn: 克莱尔不该受到这样的诽谤。

deserve.paraphrase: vt.应受，应得，值得；vi.应受报答，应得报酬，应得赔偿，应受惩罚

examples.en: The intelligence service conceived a grand design to assassinate the War Minister.
examples.cn: 情报机构策划了一项暗杀陆军部长的重大计划。

examples.en: They drew up the design for the house in a week.
examples.cn: 他们在一周内就画出了房子的图样。

design.paraphrase: vt.& vi.设计，绘制；vt.设计，计划，企图，决意（做）；n.设计，图案，结构，计划；vi.设计略图，（为工艺品、装潢项目等）设计，当设计师，构思

examples.en: Will you designate the flowers you wish?
examples.cn: 你能说出你想要的花 吗 ?

examples.en: Japan'sPrime Minister-designate is completing his Cabinet today.
examples.cn: 日本的当选首相今日将完成组阁。

designate.paraphrase: vt.指明，指出，指派，表明，意味着，把…定名为；adj.指定而尚未上任的，选出而尚未上任的

examples.en: She asked her son, a graphic designer, to create letterheads and stationery.
examples.cn: 她请做平面设计师的儿子设计了信头和信笺。

examples.en: People want to buy designer labels for snob value.
examples.cn: 人们想买名牌是为了满足虚荣心。

designer.paraphrase: n.设计师，设计者，构思者；adj.由专门设计师设计的，标有设计师名字的，时尚的，时髦的

examples.en: The most desirable properties necessarily command astonishingly high prices.
examples.cn: 最值得拥有的财产必然要价不菲。

examples.en: Rolls Royce produces around 1,000 extremely desirable cars a year.
examples.cn: 劳斯莱斯公司每年生产约1,000辆非常吸引人的汽车。

desirable.paraphrase: adj.令人满意的，值得拥有的，可取的，性感的；n.称心如意的人[东西]

examples.en: The desire to be a mother may creep up on you unexpectedly.
examples.cn: 你会不知不觉地产生想当母亲的渴望。

examples.en: She confessed to her parents her desire to act.
examples.cn: 她向父母坦言了自己想演戏的愿望。

desire.paraphrase: vt.希望，渴望，要求，请求；n.愿望，欲望，希望，请求；vi.有希望，期望，愿望，想望

examples.en: They will need a reasonable amount of desk area and good light.
examples.cn: 他们将需要一个面积较大的摆放办公桌的地方和充足的照明。

examples.en: He gave the girl at the desk the message.
examples.cn: 他把便条递给了桌旁的女孩。

desk.paraphrase: n.书桌，办公桌，服务台，部门，（美）讲道台；adj.书桌的，书桌上用的

examples.en: The house was desolate, ready to be torn down.
examples.cn: 这房子没人居住, 等着拆除.

examples.en: a bleak and desolate landscape
examples.cn: 一片荒凉的景色

desolate.paraphrase: adj.无人的，荒凉的，孤独的，凄凉的，荒废的；vt.使荒无人烟，使荒芜，使凄凉，使孤单

examples.en: As his energy drained away, his despair and worry grew.
examples.cn: 当他的精力耗尽时，他的绝望和担心也增加了。

examples.en: Don't let yourself despair; this will only make matters worse.
examples.cn: 不要想不开，这样只能使情况变得更糟。

despair.paraphrase: n.绝望，使人绝望的人（或事物）；vi.绝望

examples.en: The despatch of the task force is purely a contingency measure.
examples.cn: 派出特遣部队纯粹是应急之举。

examples.en: The fox takes his chance with a pack of hounds which may catch him and despatch him immediately.
examples.cn: 那只狐狸和一群随时可能置其于死地的猎狗冒险周旋。

despatch.paraphrase: n.& v.派遣；n.急件；vt.快递，调遣；vi.赶紧，匆匆离开

examples.en: Car firms are desperate to achieve economies of scale.
examples.cn: 汽车厂商拼命想要实现规模经济。

examples.en: The company'sclosure has left many small businessmen in desperate financial straits.
examples.cn: 该公司的倒闭让很多小商人陷入了经济困境。

desperate.paraphrase: adj.绝望的，由绝望而引起的，铤而走险的，孤注一掷的，急切的，极度渴望的

despite.paraphrase: prep.不管，尽管（自己）不愿意，不在乎，虽有；n.侮辱，憎恨，怨恨，轻蔑的拒绝或不承认

examples.en: "I really want some dessert," Keaton says, smacking his lips.
examples.cn: “我真的很想吃点儿点心，”基顿咂着嘴说。

examples.en: He finished his dessert and patted his paunch.
examples.cn: 他吃完甜点，拍了拍他的大肚子。

examples.en: His destination was Chobham Common, a long way from his Cotswold home.
examples.cn: 他的目的地是乔伯姆公地，那里和他在科茨沃尔德的家离得很远。

examples.en: You can check your baggage right through to its final destination.
examples.cn: 你可以把行李直接托运到终点。

destination.paraphrase: n.目的，目标，目的地，终点，[罕用语]预定，指定

examples.en: It is my destiny one day to be king.
examples.cn: 我命中注定有一天要成为国王。

examples.en: Destiny has ordained that they are who they are.
examples.cn: 命运已经决定了他们的性格为人。

destiny.paraphrase: n.命运，天命，天数，命运的三女神，主宰事物的力量

examples.en: Frogs eat pests which destroy crops and carry diseases.
examples.cn: 青蛙吃破坏庄稼、传播疾病的害虫。

examples.en: They can't destroy truth without destroying each and every one of us.
examples.cn: 除非他们将我们赶尽杀绝，否则真理不灭。

destroy.paraphrase: vt.破坏，摧毁，消灭，歼灭（敌人），杀死，使失败

examples.en: To that extent they helped bring about their own destruction.
examples.cn: 他们正是如此推波助澜，导致了自己的毁灭。

examples.en: There is worldwide concern about the destruction of the rainforests.
examples.cn: 全世界都在关注热带雨林遭到破坏的问题。
